name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
It is, therefore, completely unaccountable to “we the people.”.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zolvtb3abs6ambi4t9d3jnbi8kur6plev4nt7tq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmapb4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0oosmplbme0965p79p3idlcv0mnvuh9qoit1cu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmapb4cjh2bs)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9lsclbv95vcqsdbh54ej9f6del7h9v9th4tpn4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmapb4cjh2bs)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before February 28.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9k8g96a6fmcmu45stdljpqsv4qhlbo4ajrk9f9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmapb4cjh2bs)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zekpedkjrj4p4r1k8nf8k30pnviqh92g7rl3i26g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob2c3gmap7246h22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmapb4cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7i0a7tkddtutbgsuo4o8ckdjufuivpdbmg2gn7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmapb4cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg9i29tgpeau4952s65adil101tk1e29djdpmmho_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmapb4cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
This is not ordinary food.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdcjag8a8racrt9s60rr35e7fljbtr3rr5tdb1e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4c5h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5c0cujkh32ak9ku5rtk01rdp1u1ol9anhlr5ado_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4c5h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4pqkitk7e5akh8h12tsk3ivooh8s7q1ssrr0lpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4c5h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqcvgain5oi4et759f7vcrl3oq477up3lbfc4sbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4c5h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjdgq9417mar0ubsn60o76kuqcdbtu8npt7loh2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4c5h2bs)

clean_body: This is not ordinary food. Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
It is, therefore, completely unaccountable to “we the people.”.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgaj8soo7al5prrn4anmnb1kka98506fp7p2mrqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z39cv724p0daighbukor0beio3sm0rcl3p4akur8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4cph2bs)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcrv8mksj17bvca04j8ng1i6u29kgeejh9hds0mo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4cph2bs)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before February 28.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq4q6tro33hiomkfro03sl37t7sphuf6omol9jao_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4cph2bs)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z45opqujhoinfkgdm2q5onb8vmkciqv5hnq9pqb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5h61ob7chh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zap8s01q2ddb5ssr6cnnld77j94oqihpkb30am28_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm6ob4cph2bs)_

name: Greg Lopez
subject: 🚨 MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT 🚨
body:
I’m Running for Governor—And I Want to Hear From You

| | | | [](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.yeJr5X6gmNE~k-U)
---
Hey Peter,
I’m Greg Lopez.
I’m not a career politician. I’m a husband, a dad, a veteran, a small business owner and someone who still believes in Colorado Common Sense.
**Today, I’m letting you know that I’m running for Governor of Colorado.**
But this isn’t just about me. It’s about _you_.
Colorado’s not completely broken. But the folks running it? **They stopped listening.**
They’re more interested in headlines than real people. They push out-of-state agendas while families here struggle just to stay afloat.
Groceries, gas, rent—it’s all through the roof. Small businesses are drowning. Kids are falling behind in school. Crime is rising, and accountability in government is nowhere to be found.
**Here’s what I believe:**
We’re not California. We’re Colorado. And it’s time we started acting like it.
That’s why I’m running to put **People Over Politics**.
That’s not just a slogan. It’s how I’ve led my whole life as a Mayor, as head of the SBA, and as a servant to the people of this state.
But before I talk policy, I want to hear your story.
**What’s your Colorado Dream?
Or what’s your Colorado Nightmare?**
What’s standing in the way of you and your family living your best Colorado life?
Use **#LopezListens** on social media to post your story, or share it directly with me directly here:
[_www.greglopez.co_](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.yeJr5X6gmNE~k-w)
I’m running to serve. To listen. To lead. Not just for one party, or one region—but for all of Colorado.
If you’re tired of the noise...
If you believe in freedom, fairness, and common sense...
If you want to be heard, not herded... Then I’d be honored to have your support.
Let’s fix what’s broken. Let’s build what’s next. Together.
With you, for you, always.
Greg Lopez
[ _greglopez.co_](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.yeJr5X6gmNE~k-w)

|
---
**Watch and share our campaign announcement video: **

[](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.yeJr5X6gmNE~k-0)
| | |
---
\n\n\n | [](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.yeJr5X6gmNE~k-c) | [](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.yeJr5X6gmNE~k-g) | [](https://greglopez.acemlnc.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDKIqGh5K4uzty9VxJw1K-okADyw~dhZ5k7VnGiEHV5-0y.yeJr5X6gmNE~k-k)
---|---|---
|
---
Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Unsubscribe](http://greglopez.activehosted.com/proc.php?nl=2&c=20&m=20&s=71a82ae71f7b50c88b4fbb88fe19f90c&act=unsub)
Greg Lopez For Colorado, PO Box #0028, Elizabeth, CO 80107, United States
---

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
It is, therefore, completely unaccountable to “we the people.”.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6dvlk87dc39tjj8o7sjobct3gvg15kimmk5907o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmepj6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkc779i4mmh7o4glcrglnk3nb5l07c7ssfb38vmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmepj6clh2bs)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zant3998vjj14ftn9mf8albvpqle8ss22brv0j5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmepj6clh2bs)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before February 28.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zge8nuvj8fpsv4stfthrsjt72hp6i91tq5uo4aq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmepj6clh2bs)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt1k6vu6qpgl7qdl3dnl3jmvkhtrb6tq4elf5crg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c9geao31c8gq48bi4bh28pr1c5hm2pr6cpim49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2bul4lob380cgiiq6eid6r80ud9e48l09gml690_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgmepj6clh2bs)_

[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z31eoqou89cign0j8qhb0jcc46a9nsh4hulseavo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1c5hm2pr6cpim49fg)

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zo1kqjaij92ph4cava0kjt879pacr0vj3fg2l1ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z924opdf91jcfn73vkknoic0osajvtbj3hj5jrdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zo7e543aq5ltpnj3v3rf8m02i4u85fl4qmspa248_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf615spj5nds7llo6ftmrp38jq8feedqgvbkeav8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgi4uqcq0sfn8mh3i3e4saed528o76qtnmmkl49g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zeaj7l611a941gkhjjssmbetlrdf0rinegdijvf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znl1vtamtndb7nedfrtgp684mk5gklp6sc2hmce8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7mj6ajl5jo4ggklfijqfp5629hecnjo7dvb0va8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztiqjk139er25g70gh8ad2dcij0mmotdnofoo9uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1gl3t7kjigu47rlsts7vjd1u6nhgfni494h7g28_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0k8q0qcmdc1dbuhj8r1kkosi5kecususmeksgmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze0kqf417lot3gjc68rllmi8kl23qqjr8d426klg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0l7l4aafmaq44c1dmdgc2u7madthr62i5h0b41g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4eob63petd41ii9t8f7dom76njv3drhk6lr4h8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)
---
---
2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748
---
|
---

Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0licjf2ubv0n59l4jmag4membqg8942ognkkov0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c9geapj0s8gq48bi4bh28pr1c5hm2p74c9h649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjompeke1ttnpisc6ej0jge6ssjbdkuu4384tid0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs)_

And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, . Thank you for taking action when action is needed! | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
This is not ordinary food.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziu3gu5o5lv0g07gceq1oci9q161dl5sngilmrh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32cth2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z79olail85cpr3nbcj6fj5odu0lddo7430pen8d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32cth2bs) [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsa74ubr2ndnaqr1effpgvl848k7p1sjptigbvug_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32cth2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrem14f0ukvmceetc12q220dacg77ie949m2drqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32cth2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd055poukokpf68vcim3e9c1233rqdj5ttgr58b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32cth2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
This shirt would look good on you!

|

| | | **WE DID IT! 🙌**

Thanks to patriots like you, the _Gulf of Mexico_ is now officially the **Gulf of America!** And as Elon Musk said, it's a name that "has a beautiful ring to it" \- and we couldn't agree more!

body:
I am running for U.S. Senate in Michigan to help President Trump! Will you stand with me today?

| | | [](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=07dbd1ca037f41058e5d1d0873408ea4&_e=O7O6m0Yc3zGmBC463HsFUeRPI0NJTJ608MkEX2xw_UGcG81mw0f34xSBvb6XLDYP1bTJU-NK3ijQSJTc8M6Ir7BweOQyHBBysqJnw2ygvzrDQcYm7qd0LIxkmpeB874J-k9dZwqI_NpJ5J8v8A-p1cbqdy9Z4EwylOM-NlDw_Uwf6Qa-mLvfVb5nhkhvKq0CuICU0p8PhbRgwcdlh8GS5ymoNg9gq2pZYnsLkQCtIRXy8DWW56J2IIO-gT96-PH0F7FGLNY_PZzoF2aRsjCuja3t5xB8aqPi3VUFkUFukC0wROgZJbAJjxO9iyc4kat67Ixet9QgtCLtsy3xPj4Ufya6ZUIQ3MCDfF_v1TqeZ-tuNsXNIbnXFETnLSzVPD88dCkusjsRUou-HQFuz-drmA4k6E_SPBGV2kpb15tczwn31PxksFJrNjqdCGpKtKW8HvnXc68mp3u88zKsmn88qrMeTvEAjwqyto7F98X-tVQ%3D)

Friend, I have good news. I am running for U.S. Senate in Michigan because President Trump needs strong allies to help him Make America Great Again! I am proud to have a proven track record of service in the military, in law enforcement, and in Congress. America is worth fighting for and I am stepping up again to win today’s fight. _**[_**Will you stand with me today?**_](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=07dbd1ca037f41058e5d1d0873408ea4&_e=O7O6m0Yc3zGmBC463HsFUeRPI0NJTJ608MkEX2xw_UGcG81mw0f34xSBvb6XLDYP1bTJU-NK3ijQSJTc8M6Ir7BweOQyHBBysqJnw2ygvzrDQcYm7qd0LIxkmpeB874J-k9dZwqI_NpJ5J8v8A-p1cbqdy9Z4EwylOM-NlDw_Uwf6Qa-mLvfVb5nhkhvKq0CuICU0p8PhbRgwcdlh8GS5ymoNg9gq2pZYnsLkQCtIRXy8DWW56J2IIO-gT96-PH0F7FGLNY_PZzoF2aRsjCuja3t5xB8aqPi3VUFkUFukC0wROgZJbAJjxO9iyc4kat6Oez01rOy58kxlRD4zdAJ36JfE5bEZKCmZN3NQkU7pDak7GogEEF6PeS4KGmnRbjG-guFcQwgdTkC-nniYB6DABEn5tjftr2wbOfkdH7kiSEQCgcakKmq-d7SMQQEn-4WmHkPb1bhFOnHTBxZ9i8i3BNyRj3iXGsl8wiaDr022bM%3D)**_

| | **We MUST grow our Senate majority to implement the America First agenda — that’s why Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat will be the #1 race in the country in 2026.** President Trump received a mandate to secure the border, clean up our cities, and stop reckless government spending. And he needs strong allies to finish the job! I am running for Senate because it is time for leadership that you can trust. It is time for a safer, stronger Michigan and America. _Michigan, I’ve got your back! President Trump, I’ve got your back! America, I’ve got your back! I am running for U.S. Senate in Michigan because President Trump needs strong allies to help him Make America Great Again! I am proud to have a proven track record of service in the military, in law enforcement, and in Congress. America is worth fighting for and I am stepping up again to win today’s fight. | | We MUST grow our Senate majority to implement the America First agenda — that’s why Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat will be the #1 race in the country in 2026. President Trump received a mandate to secure the border, clean up our cities, and stop reckless government spending. And he needs strong allies to finish the job! I am running for Senate because it is time for leadership that you can trust. It is time for a safer, stronger Michigan and America. Michigan, I’ve got your back! President Trump, I’ve got your back! America, I’ve got your back! Friend, I’ve got your back! Thank you, Mike Rogers Candidate for U.S. Senate in Michigan | |

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfmsg5md3uf31vkgielc1vidsoh6v5ovudr2cb88_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs2ku3fp4nsergacs3ep120evrbqodd36nobn3ag_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcp97827v1hqq65svkvuq6m4ilren202e09uqeho_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zju782a6oqj8kj52u0qc86lmk7nklqjb0hlfch18_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsocjq8ro5n69qiqrgok7ekkjo8ddppgb6l5hn6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn68i3ldclog9687vr6uegtrnhvab9cjdb4lkagg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zql8aqh8np55guemsqa56lsj5f954tfkj4ooqr6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8uv2lqnleec3ujoksslj08hs9h2qd12j4ulehjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf2goiqb7nba2jvfhs8bnjfnqaclbsqlk43d8el8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8vniugfgbcjgiqdk71nmaq8hht386i0uostcne0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs3t8ndc4pkq2hln0kf1m1b4mkuie5c4bsfdhu28_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu9su3rdqkmkpl6ha4lcch1ch6eav9ku5j30f280_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zls4osaoie4g9lvc1epgob9963i028ilolj6vskg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z082gs1hldncov1jja6uo663cskj0j93jr04ma98_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0o32c5h2bs)

## Birmingham City Council debt ‘may be growing by £14million a month’, Councillor claims
The Shadow Cabinet Member for Finance on Birmingham City Council has claimed that the city’s ongoing bin crisis is “entirely attributable” to the “dreadful Labour administration”, as residents are now living among more than 20,000 tonnes of waste. Speaking to GB News, Councillor Meirion Jenkins suggested that the £760million debt at the heart of the [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/8WWPX4QxE-kY1ELfQgHLSOlbZ4GWhiti0i0d3JzjbwWpUVm2UNePHZv5kaQCG6gjQfn6JBvbNu52uF0Il5OWCBz2ANOV_Lc7a_n1gxSCFzxtGhzdVYWZCgLyntR7p9_4wji9_PxWUIZHmW1kK5iCfKDHWK2BpXWCntBpAI7yhaD6kJFEiO22_ARoB3Pk7tmUdrIJVC3IO3l0Bc2B5EfNCrqha0MGMl0QeEmnFGeySkoDZf6hCAEWpaAaOpk8xcctFIJbly_UlJOt-dVpAh-oQn9e3FH0ZR3yYmlboeCDZ1btytyC6c6MeZHPZBm55046uFwJGDPDlf5fUbN3Pa3AV1KyunFfdy2l9l73LIzEOANwSJ4c0SRkDfCuwkF_ag/GhhgvJvZyaWTUmuE-KpZgCh_sr4bQ-Nd/8)

## Dog owners warned two common garden flowers are poisonous to pets | UK | News
Spring blooms encouraged by the UK’s recent burst of sunshine are finally brightening up homes and gardens ahead of Easter. But an expert has issued a stark warning over the potential consequences of common flowers for pets. name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z51irjku7j3218fm0usvp6ve01uuqjti5gto66qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z09e4h09m7v87f3lhsonbtpcjmm4t28tj817j8mo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0jckdki0431c7sqa1rmd7odq1bi9dhqn8lc1a70_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zpulsirnjpi3ckbdcaphivcghk8rnhgcc5f8le98_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgsgcgkkal9njc8n3h6d6n37dduk7f5aovqtn3qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zb7p5s4j42jc4od03e9kc80hcgf3g0uu49d0qvko_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z9hah0es35egccru5os30rf669qiuafplvusap1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbkn7oeh2h8u2qbtgoh6kjh95uqk4a5dgalt55qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z95ntuph7rutjvi6fakh93ids25lphd00luk5vl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbp1on28cje180vvcdtqbcfvdq8j9jvonkkbe42g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdgm9p32c9h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---

---

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Ohio gubernatorial candidate Vivek Ramaswamy **[confronted protesters face-to-face](https://substack.com/redirect/d67b5f98-aed0-485c-bf0d-5e3ee782d17b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** outside a campaign event, Thursday.
One woman approached him claiming "diversity is our strength" while holding a sign that read "Vivek hates DEI." She wasn't ready for what he says next:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d67b5f98-aed0-485c-bf0d-5e3ee782d17b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d67b5f98-aed0-485c-bf0d-5e3ee782d17b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The thing is, you're in Mason right now," the woman said, ready to spar with her perceived enemy. "Our diversity is our super power here! This is why we live here,... we have people from many different countries here and some of my friends are scared. I'm out here because I have some cover, I'm a blue-eyed old white lady!"
**[Ramaswamy respectfully interjected,](https://substack.com/redirect/d67b5f98-aed0-485c-bf0d-5e3ee782d17b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** telling the woman, "I would frame it a little bit differently. I think our strength is not our diversity. Our strength is what unites us across our diversity."
"That's just word salad!!" The woman fired back, frustrated by his answer.
Watch the clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d67b5f98-aed0-485c-bf0d-5e3ee782d17b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Trump to make bold renovations at the White House: report
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/41b2a8d8-4fb8-496b-8eae-2909456d2c24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump is planning a major White House renovation, inspired by his Mar-a-Lago estate, **[the NY Post reports](https://substack.com/redirect/0dc4d8af-3db5-4a65-b2cb-075cbc7ca642?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. The overhaul aims to modernize the 230-year-old residence while preserving its historical essence, blending luxury with function updates.
"It keeps my real estate juices flowing," Trump told a reporter.
Trump's vision includes replacing certain lawn areas with paved flat surfaces to make it easier for women in heels to walk. Some public spaces may feature gold accents and marble finishes, echoing his Florida resort's opulence.
The biggest possible addition would be a large and glamorous ballroom, which he has reportedly offered to pay for himself.
"I am very good at building ballrooms," he said at a reception in February. "I build beautiful ballrooms ... like I have at Mar-a-Lago, as beautiful as it can be."
"I offered to do it to the Biden administration, a very active administration, but I didn't hear back [so] I'm going to try to make the offer to myself ... because we could use a bigger room ... I think we've outgrown the tent stuff."
Estimated to cost hundreds of millions, the project has divided opinions. Supporters see it as a vital update to a national symbol, boosting tourism. Critics call it extravagant, questioning lavish spending amid economic concerns. Trump's team suggests private donations and his wealth could reduce taxpayer costs, though specifics details are not yet clear.
* * *

## The Colonel Blimp of the Old Right ~ The Imaginative Conservative
Hoffman Nickerson and a coterie of essayists in the 1920s and 1930s comprised the “Old Right,” a loose confederation of thinkers and writers animated by anti-modernism, suspicion of democracy, and worries over the debasement of Western culture. name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkt910eaumvgn3i44hhivkropjbib5qm4l8mm5v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdftg1vum7iedlimo42u1hkfp32bp503nsrcu6s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztkj496n4g8k9uo9g810uahg94utqv82k8o6f760_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq4ipau11115u0aldk9r1eo3retsahiqmgrehe9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv6ah29m33ktrnlq4v0r3appblv91fa6u5tagj78_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zavfqtiabm5j4c1bvubfs5l17rm2pjs254ttebl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zon9r689a8seihltcbg0jaoc7bfg51i7ru20fik8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3cikpvq6iuipo2uqcebri3nmibi0bt2df191psg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4fla93plv2dbm4q3gpjajkvs5qr0antkgcdj570_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z731cim5oa2ph72j2g4dl0lf0bdas56clk7ib36o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcpi862bdikib7m32qbsd4iao7shqg29p8vo6a38_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim0p74c5h2bs)
