# ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON SB 623 AND NO ON HB 1787
|
---
SB 623 by Senator Charles Schwertner would allow pharmacists to decline to administer any vaccination to customers, without penalty. It is being heard in the Senate Committee on Health and Human Services on April 15. HB 1787 by Representative Donna Howard would require the state health department to promote the HPV vaccine on college campuses as part of a “prevention strategy”. It is being heard in the House Committee on Higher Education on April 15. **TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE SENATE HHS COMMITTEE TO SUPPORT SB 623 AND TELLING THE HOUSE HIGHER ED COMMITTEE TO OPPOSE HB 1787!** ****1 – Email the Senate Committee Members about SB 623:****
|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:lois.kolkhorst@senate.texas.gov,charles.perry@senate.texas.gov,kelly.hancock@senate.texas.gov,molly.cook@senate.texas.gov,cesar.blanco@senate.texas.gov,bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov,borris.miles@senate.texas.gov,bob.hall@senate.texas.gov,kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov?subject=Vote%20YES%20on%20SB%20623&body=Dear%20Senator%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20support%20SB%20623%20which%20is%20being%20heard%20in%20Health%20and%20Human%20Services%20on%20Tuesday%2C%20April%2015.%0A%0AThis%20bill%20would%20encourage%20patient-centered%20care%20on%20the%20part%20of%20pharmacists%20and%20protect%20pharmacists%E2%80%99%20right%20of%20conscience.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|
---
___The button above_ _will populate with a sample message. You are welcome to use it as is_** _by signing your name._**
_If this button does not work on your device, please copy and paste all of the emails below in the TO: field of your draft to send just one email to all committee members at once:_____[](mailto:bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov)bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov; bob.hall@senate.texas.gov; kelly.hancock@senate.texas.gov; borris.miles@senate.texas.gov; molly.cook@senate.texas.gov; lois.kolkhorst@senate.texas.gov; charles.perry@senate.texas.gov; cesar.blanco@senate.texas.gov; kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov _[](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_**SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:
SUBJECT: Vote YES on SB 623**
Dear Senator, I am writing to you today to ask you to please support SB 623 which is being heard in Health and Human Services on Tuesday, April 15. This bill would encourage patient-centered care on the part of pharmacists, and protect pharmacists’ right of conscience. Thank you,
[YOUR NAME] _Or use your own personal experience in your email to the committee regarding why pharmacists' reasons of conscience should be protected.__
_******2- Call the Senate Committee Members about SB 623:**
Chair Lois Kolkhorst - 512-463-0118
Vice Chair Charles Perry - 512-463-0128
Sen Cesar Blanco - 512-463-0129
Sen Molly Cook - 512-463-0115
Sen Kelly Hancock - 512-463-0109
Sen Bryan Hughes - 512-463-0101
Sen Borris Miles - 512-463-0113
Sen Kevin Sparks - 512-463-0131
Sen Bob Hall: 512-463-0102

**SAMPLE MESSAGE:
** Please vote YES to support Senate Bill 623 to protect pharmacists and patients! **3- Email the House Committee Members:**

| | | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:terry.wilson@house.texas.gov,donna.howard@house.texas.gov,aicha.davis@house.texas.gov,suleman.lalani@house.texas.gov,stan.lambert@house.texas.gov,vincent.perez@house.texas.gov,matt.shaheen@house.texas.gov,joanne.shofner@house.texas.gov,tony.tinderholt@house.texas.gov,gary.vandeaver@house.texas.gov,charlene.wardjohnson@house.texas.gov?subject=Vote%20NO%20on%20HB%201787&body=Dear%20Representative%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20oppose%20HB%201787%20which%20is%20being%20heard%20in%20Higher%20Education%20on%20Tuesday%2C%20April%2015.%0A%0AThis%20bill%20would%20focus%20on%20the%20promotion%20of%20a%20for-profit%20pharmaceutical%20product%20as%20an%20HPV%20prevention%20strategy%20rather%20than%20providing%20education%20about%20detection%2C%20which%20is%20the%20best%20way%20to%20avoid%20cervical%20cancer.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|
---
_____The button above_ _will populate with a sample message. You are welcome to use it as is_** _by signing your name._**
_If this button does not work on your device, please copy and paste all of the emails below in the TO: field of your draft to send just one email to all committee members at once:_____[](mailto:Jeff.Leach@house.texas.gov)terry.wilson@house.texas.gov; donna.howard@house.texas.gov; aicha.davis@house.texas.gov; suleman.lalani@house.texas.gov; stan.lambert@house.texas.gov; vincent.perez@house.texas.gov; matt.shaheen@house.texas.gov; joanne.shofner@house.texas.gov; tony.tinderholt@house.texas.gov; gary.vandeaver@house.texas.gov; charlene.wardjohnson@house.texas.gov[](mailto:Mike.Schofield@house.texas.gov)[](mailto:Mike.Schofield@house.texas.gov) ****SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:
SUBJECT: **Vote NO on HB 1787** Dear Representative, I am writing to you today to ask you to please oppose HB 1787 which is being heard in Higher Education on Tuesday, April 15. This bill would focus on the promotion of a for-profit pharmaceutical product as an HPV prevention strategy rather than providing education about detection, which is the best way to avoid cervical cancer. Thank you,
_[YOUR NAME]
_
___Or use your own personal experience in your email to the committee regarding why a bill using taxpayer funds to promote the HPV vaccine should be opposed.___
**4- Call the House Committee Members about HB 1787:**
Chairman Terry Wilson 512-463-0309
Vice Chair Donna Howard 512-463-0631
Rep Aicha Davis 512-463-0953
Rep Suleman Lalani 512-463-0596
Rep Stan Lambert 512-463-0718
Rep Vincent Perez 512-463-0638
Rep Matt Shaheen 512-463-0594
Rep Joanne Shofner 512-463-0592
Rep Tony Tinderholt 512-463-0624
Rep Gary Vandeaver 512-463-0692
Rep Charlene Ward Johnson 512-463-0554**

****SAMPLE MESSAGE:**
Please vote NO to oppose House Bill 1787 to keep taxpayer funds from promoting Gardasil!
**5- Provide Public Comments**
If you are a Texas resident, you can submit public comments that will be distributed to the committee members by using [THIS FORM](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUxNjYzMzEyODcwODM1NzkzLFwiclwiOjE1MTY2MzM0ODk2NDkxODYzOX0iLCJzIjoiN2IzZGZiOWZmMzQxMTc3YiJ9) and separately selecting "HB 1787 by Howard." Please indicate “self” in the “Organization/Representing” field. You may use the sample email above or your own words for your comments.

| | | Our message to the American people is simple:

**If partisan judges exploit their offices to sabotage President Trump, House Conservatives should IMPEACH every last one of them. **

## Tariff Announcements Are Bad. Unless They’re Good
When President Donald Trump made his Liberation Day announcements, his harshest critics immediately declared him an economic arsonist playing with fire he didn’t understand, while his strongest acolytes insisted he was 10 moves ahead, playing 4D chess with geopolitical mastery. Both camps jumped the gun. His was the opening salvo in a high-stakes game. name: GULF OF AMERICA ALERTS
subject: This shirt could be in a museum one day. Own a piece of history >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This shirt would look good on you!

|
---
| | | **WE DID IT! 🙌**

Thanks to patriots like you, the _Gulf of Mexico_ is now officially the **Gulf of America!** And as Elon Musk said, it's a name that "has a beautiful ring to it" \- and we couldn't agree more!

---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6ucmhd78ovhbg6q8uiau82v8p2thrrnbsv4vp38_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim4pr4cph2bs)
---

**[To celebrate this historic moment, we're excited to introduce our exclusive Gulf of America t-shirt, designed specifically for America First supporters like you. And as a valued member of our team, we're offering you an exclusive 24-hour hold on this limited-edition gear.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6ff4jbrbq4nov45rvs4lpnn0krv8o2d3ffqv1cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim4pr4cph2bs "To celebrate this historic moment, we're excited to introduce our exclusive Gulf of America t-shirt, designed specifically for America First supporters like you. And as a valued member of our team, we're offering you an exclusive 24-hour hold on this limited-edition gear.")**

But don't wait - this offer expires at 11:59 PM sharp, and we can't guarantee availability after that. Elon's DOGE team is all about efficiency, and we're taking a page from their book by keeping this offer short and sweet.

---

---

This shirt is more than just a fashion statement - _it's a declaration of your pride in America's greatness_. So claim yours now and show the world what we're made of!

Don't miss out on this opportunity to own a piece of American history. **[Order now and we'll get your shirt in the mail ASAP!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf91jrs715fi0k7nrp9ekl1tj455r5tjshndkv5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim4pr4cph2bs "Order now and we'll get your shirt in the mail ASAP!")**

name: Richard Carlbom
subject: We can't afford to wait, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
body:
I’ll get right to the point: to win tough races in the future, we need to go on offense now. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105800472/539437917/-1825947567?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjljNDVlMC0zNzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41vgj-1WLuhwty9P_dcoCPyAU5nlh3wryJo6p7MpCvo=)**
---
Peter, I’ll get right to the point: to win tough races in the future, we need to go on offense now. To maximize our wins up and down the ballot, we need to put organizers on the ground—not months from now, but today. We need to show up in every region of the state and build lasting, authentic relationships. And we need to earn voters’ trust, especially in Greater Minnesota and other communities that are too often overlooked. **To make that happen, we have to raise $30,000 by this Friday, April 18. It’s an ambitious goal, but the stakes are high—and I know we can get there together. ** I’ve sent three emails to you in my new position as DFL chair, but this is my first fundraising request. I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t essential. Our records show that you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, so you can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) to our party and receive a full refund from the state. **[Peter, will you make your refundable $75 donation right now to help us hire organizers, reach more voters, and build the momentum to win critical elections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105800485/539437930/-1514823153?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjljNDVlMC0zNzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41vgj-1WLuhwty9P_dcoCPyAU5nlh3wryJo6p7MpCvo=)** | | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

To maximize our wins up and down the ballot, we need to put organizers on the ground—not months from now, but today. We need to show up in every region of the state and build lasting, authentic relationships. And we need to earn voters’ trust, especially in Greater Minnesota and other communities that are too often overlooked. To make that happen, we have to raise $30,000 by this Friday, April 18. It’s an ambitious goal, but the stakes are high—and I know we can get there together. I’ve sent three emails to you in my new position as DFL chair, but this is my first fundraising request. I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t essential. name: Giffords.org
subject: The Trump admin is trying to hide the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must raise a bullhorn and call out their attacks.
#

Friends -
As you might’ve heard by now, Donald Trump and his administration are firing federal workers left and right in an effort to find money for their tax cuts for billionaires.
Those firings have *huge* consequences for our fight against gun violence. Let us explain.
A few weeks ago, Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. announced that his department would cut more than 10,000 jobs. On April 1, those cuts began. One of the largest divisions hit was the CDC’s Injury Center and its Division of Violence Prevention.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250414-1-b&t=1&akid=10300%2E3935704%2Ew9je8D)
Gun violence is the _#1_ cause of death for children and teens today. For years, the CDC has helped research and prevent more violence in our communities.
Now, the Trump administration’s move puts us all at risk. An expert estimates that the unit likely lost about 75% of its staff.
Are kids going to be safer because of this?
Is this going to save lives?
Will this help prevent future deaths?
The answer is no.
Donald Trump and the NRA know that the facts don’t support their agenda -- so they’re doing all they can to undermine that research altogether. **We must raise a bullhorn and call out their attacks.**
[**Will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS today? We are leading the fight to save lives from gun violence -- in communities, courts, and ballot boxes nationwide. Any donation will help us stand up against the Trump administration’s attacks.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250414-1-b&t=2&akid=10300%2E3935704%2Ew9je8D)

name: Cory Booker
subject: We cannot afford to be silent
body:
---
Derek, As I said again and again on the Senate floor earlier this month, this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent, when we must speak up. It’s clear that Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. That’s why last night, I joined a People’s Town Hall in Arizona’s 6th Congressional District. Since their Republican Congressman refuses to show up to listen to his constituents, I joined a group of Arizona Democrats and showed up to hear directly from folks in Tucson about their concerns and what’s at stake. The truth is that right now, our nation is in crisis. The President has inflicted harm after harm on Americans’ safety, financial stability, the foundations of our democracy, and any sense of common decency. But we are not powerless. There are tens of thousands of Americans standing up and fighting back against the Trump administration every single day. They’re showing up at town halls like the one I just attended. They’re calling their Republican representatives. They’re protesting. And they’re showing up to voting booths across the country. **But we need your help to keep it going.** Every action you take, no matter how small it may seem, will put us one step closer to winning elections and winning this fight for our country and building a better future. [**So, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC today. Democrats are committed to expanding our on-the-ground efforts to make sure people are being heard, and countering the lies and fear we are seeing from the White House:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025-booker?amount=10&refcode=em_20250414_3191_fr&refcode2=3191_22930333_2f6G9W&akid=3191%2E22930333%2E2f6G9W) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Cory Booker's campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025-booker?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250414_3191_fr&refcode2=3191_22930333_2f6G9W&akid=3191%2E22930333%2E2f6G9W)**

Cory

| Peter, Trump just said 'he couldn't care less' about higher car prices! [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb13d41c1-359e-42b1-a74d-789674731f5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26b3641f-1684-4676-ab99-01a10f288703/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Donald Trump's priorities are not with working families. His economic plan has tanked the stock market and increased the price of everyday goods, all while pursuing a reckless trade war with our allies. His current trade war means families are expected to pay an additional $3,800 per year! Trump is betraying Americans by putting a financial burden on them after promising to lower the costs of everyday goods, and what's worse is he doesn't even care that working families feel the pinch! Fortunately, Democrats like Angela Alsobrooks are taking a stand by introducing bills that would stand with working families. We need more fighters like her to stop Trump from preventing people from putting food on the table while waging a chaotic trade war. But we wanted to hear from you: Do you approve of Donald Trump?

[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c62643e-9517-495d-95b1-71dc84d227c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Poll responses from VA due by midnight tonight.**

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2ed14f0-39ca-4248-a2b6-9a8ed3b86494/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Here’s how state Democrats in places like your community are taking action to protect people like you →

1. **Democracy:** States like Michigan and Nevada have passed new laws to criminalize attempts to intimidate election workers or impede voting.
2. **Abortion Access:** States like California, Illinois, and Maine have passed laws to protect out-of-state patients seeking care and shield providers.
3. **LGBTQ+ Rights:** Democratic legislatures in Minnesota, Michigan, and Nevada passed laws to ensure equal rights and ban conversion therapy.

_...And that’s just scratching the surface._

Everything from the roads you drive to what your children are taught in school is decided by your state legislators. We must continue to build Democratic power in our statehouses to counter Trump and Republicans’ right-wing agenda.

clean_body: Everything from the roads you drive to what your children are taught in school is decided by your state legislators. We must continue to fund states that are being attacked hard by Trump and his administration. | | | | | ---|--- | 🚨 ATTENTION LOCAL DEMOCRATS During Trump’s first term, Democratic legislators in statehouses across the country worked to protect our fundamental freedoms and keep our communities safe. Now, they need our support to continue resisting the MAGA movement. Here’s how state Democrats in places like your community are taking action to protect people like you → 1. Democracy: States like Michigan and Nevada have passed new laws to criminalize attempts to intimidate election workers or impede voting. 2. Abortion Access: States like California, Illinois, and Maine have passed laws to protect out-of-state patients seeking care and shield providers. 3. LGBTQ+ Rights: Democratic legislatures in Minnesota, Michigan, and Nevada passed laws to ensure equal rights and ban conversion therapy. ...And that’s just scratching the surface. Everything from the roads you drive to what your children are taught in school is decided by your state legislators. We must continue to build Democratic power in our statehouses to counter Trump and Republicans’ right-wing agenda. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. This is important. Hey Friend, this is President Trump. Hope you’re doing well. Listen, I’m reaching out because we’re closing REGISTRATION for MAGA Memberships TODAY at midnight,and I’d hate to lose touch with you.** I just added exclusive new perks. You’re going to LOVE THEM! NEW SPECIAL:** Everyone who completes their membership with a donation of any amount is automatically entered for a chance to win a FREE DINNER AT MAR-A-LAGO! PLEASE, time’s running out, so renew before we close submissions for good! Anyway, Friend, have a great rest of your day, and I hope to hear from you soon. Sincerely, Donald J. * * *
Medicaid and SNAP programs are lifelines for millions of Americans who rely on them for essential healthcare and nutrition. YET Trump, Musk and the Republicans are targeting them with HUGE cuts. Medicaid provides vital health coverage to [72 million](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfF5X7cN-ykzuKqMRAE46IjGk4BgV29tU9LZ_e8SQxjYu3yzNCh0UAq8WgaPfrBqNHqzVMCyE9GXCs-AbXi6gTyQ165xk39w8BQ5fDEGShchtXOnrPZZbJcn0wbha7QWoM6Bq9DOoG5uMB9U84v4cH9nDN2xfpSF-yxl5lg1AygGObJOCwSSs0kEjdZhaqAXXj5q0R8YsjlkvsdOaUuJuOnSC_h_dbhM-chOXy3YXZTTUEfVs0cqZhgs6HyIR9yj-E7yZ6GcFK0lLAjSniV0CioKZ_u8Bery-_FJFkS6ehCORgpnXg_9ryUMjwZaKpdzCQjEF3cCHVBgqKd_Y0uZXR1Mw4KwtiJ_VEdsl4efCvCJ3vU3j316uwQbUmgVgYOvmuAJUu9fm_JVLm3fSm6loBt_36DzvjjrTehKA0tfqisg/4fn/f6p2XLw_R7WRhk0aBLT2JQ/h2/h001.XDxxLgDQg6eMErPf6QXAXuveZpWORcgCdMzsxVpnnts) people, including children, seniors, and people with disabilities. Similarly, [41 million](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfF5X7cN-ykzuKqMRAE46IjGk4BgV29tU9LZ_e8SQxjYu3yzNCh0UAq8WgaPfrBqNHqzVMCyE9GXCs-AbXi6gTyQ165xk39w8BQ5fDEGShchDm2ulIPzB7ZnNUbUv7ypCxKDJJSnvpARku8wesGl4CNhvsAWsI1mEPDOthxixfI0plU7bECw0iTCRfiIIwPoKXw_QxUK05xCUXhGWdOcxHt4KBdFNNqx4QwrpGpc30J6gO3BKWDmMa7l0vZMgP4tO-Q88X9w4ezgX7k5nVR3YcSX8FnKJ6dn3WaIgvl-QmqLGCd2xzgM3fYDQVWlmgN1qmlwNx40hB8pwu4YWSxlu1fs2QxMupO-T9M6pe3Sdck6gN0kLe5sUb4o-Uikll_Nt6IEAHrr1EQZOYOd7kvNYaK7wKWYNwp57fe2yqnVfwOu/4fn/f6p2XLw_R7WRhk0aBLT2JQ/h3/h001.8Vho8Kw5mkucSXDXIsLpEh0_3nbvqAO5AvRHki50cRY) people rely on SNAP which ensures that families across the nation do not go hungry. Cutting these benefits would be cruel, leaving countless individuals without the medical care and food they need to live healthy lives, and it will lead to economic pain for the entire nation! **Join us at the Local Democracy Project in our fight to protect the critical services that uphold the well-being of our communities.** **[We are calling on you to sign our petition demanding Congress reject any proposed cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, which are being considered to fund yet another tax cut for the obscenely rich.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGBFjVk5EO-QzD0ZVhsS94zbup0WWvrJKvQvEMcmltH_iY9jIES4V4p_ZTyHOEefDDZuJpM1QtRbheYyTFCF7E6OalLOvYH-d7GwuZQsiZAZ5XeeMiBTQj8kBmVsuGE_lcs4rKMMusdC496wd8-Znk7qpyWxObefkCXjyeRYeh9T3M1NzF9-m1oL1p2efXJIl_GCPeFp3GIWV83Kon9REwza7jZWf8Iw3OPx0PPwmuc8k-IoOgPHtPHelOHAHZB3c0VLvN2pAFi1XPavy2Q_MnLekBI8gq1gxSbYdWJunRdm6Dwy69NEXi-4Ijh-4zA7s6PmPiHWpBQMNcD_5y6cHEPkj9VQLoc64lH1hFAIwfV9X4Eh2BkWhrwBamUiNOP8ipXw5gtF1MK0s2Ar2qcy04Rohi3XP7jEc9dvdraPXmFT0PMKiWcadaCby02MzOtn9GAGECkkOnE7yjDPRDzLOQU2JxhT-YQhzBwwwEHfsdNFalX0bkcnhpn87f2Q02bC1dkIAcbgGIgX0wC5R5XTpVrkbsVf2O3bPfvM7kSVrSVe7wkGNk2RuOvKS7Ado8iz7I3DtLYglx8-hTCkL4yspWSw/4fn/f6p2XLw_R7WRhk0aBLT2JQ/h4/h001.iIU8jZQCv1OMy6EBew1NY64ROIu60ITeac0kTvUP_G8)** **** [SIGN ON

According to recent analyses, slashing Medicaid and SNAP could lead to the loss of [1 million](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfF5X7cN-ykzuKqMRAE46IjGk4BgV29tU9LZ_e8SQxjYu3yzNCh0UAq8WgaPfrBqNHqzVMCyE9GXCs-AbXi6gTyQ165xk39w8BQ5fDEGShchEG10WGPc2Jn6Ag_FEAyK6YV2sUvQ_TC9hLnHRvTbf4bPS2_l-VjCnA6s_c-WZ9J-3VRMr_ELewMJLMTpCBvmdpQKXlNPXoI23gmTRl_e9VojXOAjITyk1zc1TKvtwZRPjllk1pp89pIT1Vw1fzLRZmi42YpQrB_kFUGFYCi1R-yskQf_Zj0L4IpqoDB004_TzIyYeRSBmSX5KYyZpomHCqqLU34HOn6Io9WZY2IVM0RMDzPyECsPw3IC4jB4npAI_ze41lkm3-DxolqSWIif9w_XIhCHf8bmHCseujRPW8xOGWMPNxpel2xCziQUGDeU/4fn/f6p2XLw_R7WRhk0aBLT2JQ/h6/h001.SC1HJeX0RuSK9VPO7w0CLhPU4BRHmCSKlGk2MNiek_k) jobs across the country, further destabilizing our economy and hurting working families. _The Local Democracy Project is committed to rebuilding our democracy from the ground up, because real change begins at home. clean_body: | | | Republicans’ proposed cuts will harm local communities across the country, but their rich donors will enjoy a windfall! Medicaid and SNAP programs are lifelines for millions of Americans who rely on them for essential healthcare and nutrition. YET Trump, Musk and the Republicans are targeting them with HUGE cuts. Medicaid provides vital health coverage to people, including children, seniors, and people with disabilities. Similarly, people rely on SNAP which ensures that families across the nation do not go hungry. Cutting these benefits would be cruel, leaving countless individuals without the medical care and food they need to live healthy lives, and it will lead to economic pain for the entire nation! Join us at the Local Democracy Project in our fight to protect the critical services that uphold the well-being of our communities. These cuts are not only heartless but also economically damaging. According to recent analyses, slashing Medicaid and SNAP could lead to the loss of jobs across the country, further destabilizing our economy and hurting working families. The Local Democracy Project is committed to rebuilding our democracy from the ground up, because real change begins at home. We believe in a government that works for its people, not one that prioritizes the wealth of the few over the needs of the many. These proposed cuts lack public support, and together, we can make our voices heard. ** Thanks for your support. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Working Families Party
subject: HANDS OFF Mass Call This Wednesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Last Saturday, April 5, millions of Americans — including WFP members like you — came out to tell Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their power-hungry cronies in no uncertain terms: HANDS OFF our Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and more. At over 1,300 peaceful demonstrations worldwide, we shared our anger, our dreams for the country, and our resolve to build a government that works for the many, not the few. Now you might be wondering... _what’s next in the fight?_ **The Hands Off! Coalition, including Working Families Power, are hosting a mass call this Wednesday, April 16 at 8 PM ET/5 PM PT to tell you exactly that.[Click here to RSVP and learn how we can build on last week's resounding success and keep up the pressure.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa2J2F9-GOeJSFpuNdJr44Ekr1P1zlOtgCgZVVysd3Wy64tXUlwQQ0Ak1cRV8r-puob-UisSzLi9qaWRPE0sN44HIjlWbgWvxqcre7fRm90mlMsBXAq4dqBkH2CB9Q7nKQxPp1IuwTpUze9kcybpW6_JY4_-cGL08Ifpbd9plV_m9Mzftsoq7y8GMTd5fpgiD4orRLl5FRnGmXOD7kzmyRv8xn2Gy8PaICa-pJprVS5vzsfIr8LhleCdk4pC7Ts19yedvxrWQHfW_Y2AihRTKus5BCTQJbGEzCUIU_YHq4gYwAYcQaPDpgqPF4I3QKR5jQ/4fn/yzcexWAlSvyVDQVzdbIO4w/h0/h001.V66Om3V98-YtG8Vwb0xRFFfn6L99xL3PycSbKB6n7EQ)** **[RSVP for the mass call](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa2J2F9-GOeJSFpuNdJr44Ekr1P1zlOtgCgZVVysd3Wy64tXUlwQQ0Ak1cRV8r-puob-UisSzLi9qaWRPE0sN44HIjlWbgWvxqcre7fRm90mlMsBXAq4dqBkH2CB9Q7nKQxPp1IuwTpUze9kcybpW68pvC-Z0l6XnKhDKUifEUApf-q8dzfapYYOlXGhhXvLVpERgzAm2B8hFHiq8-lWPHVv7_dKs9E0TlpgrahbRN_4slzZaRp59LJ6lXFuRdOe8HQ-gB-vgyWOdfz7LdfDQLmRmsy1Guh_cIGsSDdMDjZ8RRGZW842XQWOcLQwp6GSRw/4fn/yzcexWAlSvyVDQVzdbIO4w/h1/h001.92N8NF49zGG_BInga-KWU1knjnhMrfL81uBDkROI6Mg)** Our work is about more than one protest — it’s a movement to build power for working people and protect our communities from the morally bankrupt politicians trying to gut Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security to fund tax cuts for billionaires. They don’t care about our lives or our hopes for the future, just about finding new ways they can hoard even more of the wealth that we the workers create. It’s not going to be an easy fight. But we the people, united, are _powerful._ We can use our voices to halt the Trump agenda and lift up working people everywhere. **[To learn more about how you can make an impact in the fight ahead, At over 1,300 peaceful demonstrations worldwide, we shared our anger, our dreams for the country, and our resolve to build a government that works for the many, not the few. Now you might be wondering... what’s next in the fight? The Hands Off! Coalition, including Working Families Power, are hosting a mass call this Wednesday, April 16 at 8 PM ET/5 PM PT to tell you exactly that. Our work is about more than one protest — it’s a movement to build power for working people and protect our communities from the morally bankrupt politicians trying to gut Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security to fund tax cuts for billionaires. They’re willing to throw every last one of us under the bus to enrich themselves and their already disgustingly wealthy donors. They don’t care about our lives or our hopes for the future, just about finding new ways they can hoard even more of the wealth that we the workers create. It’s not going to be an easy fight. But we the people, united, are powerful. We can use our voices to halt the Trump agenda and lift up working people everywhere. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families Party and Working Families Power, please .

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Honor Veterans with the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVES8UgLR6Yp_em4VrKZPVulN5lWDM8ODAXM1a8rBH_hplJ73487eq2ufR21EPzaUiaNYMGU-vnm4DI6hqF8uVFe0v9YJrNmXbm5zvyKvFx2YZ-6xj4cYvZvfpXyahAk7hZPZ2a32CsEOQi0xuqFn-tFN)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVERIkkabpuZhVKcDZU4f6rxBL2BY8G6hD4_CUCgw_89ix05CIDJZ1IfzTUcb377PFtKtSaA5wY4BtzUOJ7WHXboccfdRAnEl6ipXqdqgfzFBOh-GxXLrRpg0N0xRT2y7H7D37s0Jb6MEQsMiVOh3F6c5)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVEQUkbGuArUA-7m8RehKSqbdt9v5RD2xpFkl8_XlmVcgwKKx1z6TWpk1lSh3TdUF1IBeVx-PNIcsIupr15Jrwbpt-_hV9mEfhUn8T0uRniBD2Ujir7cBRpbLKuvRFFpBLVLemVxTqfnTNQR6LuZxeSOz)
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVES1NixFOfc2NjHk1dzQc-JI7rZ0wCqLt0NMZoGO8ibvCWbb8-e4Fu0obNPTS1M14WYusrDfs_QYezHtuPWb5uwX06fcfbuprch4f38YjXJH3kvtBnHGh1J98dFIG6yvMVU8ZSFGX0GyAN2MwVunEx0B)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLMxcHScTngO7Wf4zL4iZJD4wmOK6pXqTtCm54Uc0hhXigMptwrs5YOHsLCVVvJorpcElcVaQNRmRvUh9v2WnxOJ2t_LqHY2KPMimlGMs2AyiO2Go8kFAIzc9w3qp3ToAU0poAFhRYuX_Y_0alBNmQEvI1gAhYRM5ChscFFd7DOOLjbv4CTc-efs5h3JK8I3Hgv4Y_GkqVvqJeYzdEGmzMk_OpwRgEbAX9WWf2sYHiVxI%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVETUGW2vICm-N2VsAxYR-6rC-RMHZoipY2zoky1SD78kpfXJsvIQxTeHaH9Lpia9PKzUdHgVsnmEJ0gdriqaJeQcoQigQp3o6YSECj_fMEagtnzblNCJcX-BCbZybSVFlpxB7i_RfyFo1Jxx8VBj-XlH) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVETZ5No7s4kyo0klq4F1Mps0rpmwoTLCgwKHr64Jtzxlee-XlDTefybhqGVK7Zs2uYquCreNnTHc-JHXeM7s8wkC54mnYJawqpbbwFHUVwYqVhmwTCqNdHEU5o6WmBI7lULS-cxGPfq2VeTFMIAh3iJF)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVEShLZu_V8Lq1ZUct3uHbdanI_s_tPy_g_Jn4gn0BoqvTQKh0tJ9u2jqpuMGImNaXwy5odlBHoflphK6j7shYzF5MgwCJbsGtCCUn8m5fxqvPJ_Bahck-EzAFBYp-1NZDn4GtEgexVpuXNWqLguU17ZU)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVEQwK7q8QDZefOxuBA6eBiAFhg5XdWyQUqPIIabQ3OjAGfwvSYvR-5wUAC8mZdZG1joDNUvWmxTbPMb3lXKBndXWwXTmLKyrpDRzQl-mHvz__vKsjkm97HreWgjw17-ncvewCko4txBeuhX24kTwOzkl)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac3d666f87dc41fab81ef720bf9ca48e&_e=vl3UaTfpp11A5WfzqJXkErbNS6AMRGyR_yOXDd3swNPxVMJcsaFCUMTIw7bpX4nLu8M31Qh-94O4FyomhC9CsfB5gmY4H-u7WOyun6SSFDoip1h-BSazcJWUcLqWY0-QRAL2aK_Q_mlmSU3bGRqJHK7genaQJUqLvTFF1EjFVETIf0NgeZb24ugrxbFs50dupx835TBtxpQBiJcUgDwsRkEllJxBcjK1ESD0H-xpMLVvGFcGHyN1IJpm2GcT7M3SeoVv3lrdmKRGUwkI0nqWkiaOLmRsGehM15ef3S-O08JkL1C2Pm-1i1QFveYVpfzD)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This is the most important email I've sent yet -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. This is one of the longest emails I've sent as DSCC Chair -- **but it's also the most important.**

**I hope you'll read every word, but if you can't, here's the top-line info:** [**The DSCC has their mid-month deadline coming up tomorrow -- and without your help, we could fall _short_ of the $125,000 goal we need to raise to flip the Senate. Will you chip in $5 to make sure we hit it? Your gift will be tripled, but only until the deadline.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21415?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250414-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250414-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20013%2E9716520%2E_GId-T)

| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/21415?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250414-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250414-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20013%2E9716520%2E_GId-T)
---

Here are three things you need to know right now:

**DONALD TRUMP IS HURTING -- NOT HELPING -- HARDWORKING AMERICANS.**

Trump's second term is already as bad as we've feared. Worse, even. He's packing our government with MAGA loyalists, undermining our democracy, and grabbing unprecedented power and wealth for himself and billionaires like Elon Musk -- but he's done _nothing_ to tackle the issues that matter most, like lowering costs and protecting Social Security.

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE PUSHING TRUMP'S DANGEROUS AGENDA.**

On issue after issue, the Republican majority has moved in lockstep with Trump -- no matter how far he pushes our country in the wrong direction. They're rubber-stamping his radical, unqualified nominees and actually defending his pardoning of hundreds of January 6th insurrectionists!

Fortunately, we have an alternative path forward:

**DEMOCRATS HAVE A _REAL CHANCE_ TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE.**

With multiple special elections in key battlegrounds on the map and some of the most vulnerable Republicans up for reelection, we have no shortage of chances to flip seats blue. But to win back a majority and deliver on the issues that matter most, I'll need Democrats like you on my side.

[**So today, with our critical mid-month deadline approaching, I'm asking you to make a difference. Will you chip in $5 (becomes $15) to fight for a Democratic Senate majority that will fight for you?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21415?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250414-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250414-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20013%2E9716520%2E_GId-T)

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. This is one of the longest emails I've sent as DSCC Chair -- but it's also the most important. I hope you'll read every word, but if you can't, here's the top-line info: | | Here are three things you need to know right now: DONALD TRUMP IS HURTING -- NOT HELPING -- HARDWORKING AMERICANS. Trump's second term is already as bad as we've feared. Worse, even. He's packing our government with MAGA loyalists, undermining our democracy, and grabbing unprecedented power and wealth for himself and billionaires like Elon Musk -- but he's done nothing to tackle the issues that matter most, like lowering costs and protecting Social Security. SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE PUSHING TRUMP'S DANGEROUS AGENDA. On issue after issue, the Republican majority has moved in lockstep with Trump -- no matter how far he pushes our country in the wrong direction. They're rubber-stamping his radical, unqualified nominees and actually defending his pardoning of hundreds of January 6th insurrectionists! Fortunately, we have an alternative path forward: DEMOCRATS HAVE A REAL CHANCE TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE. With multiple special elections in key battlegrounds on the map and some of the most vulnerable Republicans up for reelection, we have no shortage of chances to flip seats blue. But to win back a majority and deliver on the issues that matter most, I'll need Democrats like you on my side. We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you -- let's win this together! name: Frank Wojtash: Political Director - Rob for PA
subject: Rob's NEPA Rundown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
Fighting for NEPA 🇺🇸

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/755816929128/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | |
---
| Good Morning,
Rob had a jam-packed week in D.C. and at home. He voted to get closer to reconciliation on the budget, went to a Wilkes-Barre Township rally to drum up support for Luzerne County candidates, and met with the PA Secretary of Agriculture to discuss how we can work with the Commonwealth to give our farmers the best opportunity to succeed!
---
|
---
| Rob was so excited to see many of our phenomenal Team Rob volunteers attend a rally in Wilkes-Barre Township to drum up support for local candidates on the ballot THIS YEAR! The best government is one closest to the people, so make sure to get out and vote for the candidates you believe in on May 20th.
---
|
---
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=b2477be7f4&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Cosmo’s, in Scranton. Be sure to grab a cheese steak at Cosmo’s!
---
|
---
|
The Democrats are already coming after our Congressman for 2026! They’re gearing up to lie and slander Rob, and we need your help to put our side of the story out there. If you are able, please donate to our campaign to keep NEPA out of the grasp of the far-left.
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!
---
| [Click Here to Donate ](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=a99abdc7ba&e=131e83a3c2)
---
| Best Regards,Frank WojtashPolitical Director

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 😠 Demonstrate Your Displeasure Loudly!
body:
Act swiftly to have MAXIMUM impact! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=77610ed88d&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9f00b26a5e&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | ** **
**CALL TO

"DIGITAL ACTIVISM"!**
** **
**THE OHIO HOUSE PASSED A '26-'27 BUDGET WITH A $600M GIVEAWAY TO BILLIONAIRES, INCREASED SPENDING, NO HEALTH FREEDOM & NO ELECTION INTEGRITY!

ARE YOU ANGRY? TAKE IT OUT ON THEM DIGITALLY! YOU DON'T EVEN NEED TO LEAVE THE COUCH!**
\
---
| **UPDATE: Republican Ohio House Leadership rejected every health freedom amendment put forward by Ohio's health freedom activists & agreeable sponsors, YET LEFT THE $600M GIVE-AWAY to the BILLIONAIRE Haslam family IN THE 26-'27 OHIO STATE BUDGET BILL (HB 96) now sent to the Ohio Senate for approval to be sent to the governor to make it LAW!**

It's time to **take** **massive action** , and GFI has implemented a "Digital Activism System" (aka "Digital Activism Platform") to make it **quick & easy** for you to make your displeasure known to every House Member who sold us out -- with the **push of a button** \-- **WITHOUT LEAVING THE HOUSE**!

**Here's a video explanation of the system:**

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5ebd3397ec&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
CLICK for a video explanation of GFI's new "Digital Activism System".
|
**NOW: Here's where YOU come in!**

Please go to [**THIS WEB PAGE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b43a2958a5&e=5c740fa3e2) (or click on the image below) and follow the directions. It simple, easy, and quick ... a minute or two tops! We want to let our elected officials know we're not happy and we're no longer going to sit quietly in our dipleasure. It's time to **PROUDLY SPEAK UP & SPEAK OUT, DIGITALLY!

_Thank you!_**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=666bd43bf0&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| | | ** **
**A CONTINUING

CALL TO ACTION!**
** **
**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**
** **
**SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=94de315f3f&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9f8aad12f1&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=186c60b9da&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7776a97139&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e5c9bfa263&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=677eb816dd&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f17ac526bc&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bab9024b42&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b4f3331625&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=1d0a9303ea) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=1d0a9303ea).

Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, A VERY REASONABLE thing to do. 4) SECOND , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections and get them to vote , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also A VERY REASONABLE thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county. 5) WHEN we do this, WE WIN! The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, AVERY REASONABLE objective! WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN! Over the next week, PLEASE : Make 10 social media posts on the issue Send texts about the issue to 10 people Send emails about the issue to another (different) 10 people Make calls about the issue to 10 more (different) people Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go to vote with you Persuade 10 people not previously contacted to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help **Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people. If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this stealthy, unnecessary, costly , $2.5B bond issue! LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN! We made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH! HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP! 1) PLEASE forward this message to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election! 2) PLEASE download (same as below) to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election! NEW >>>> 3)** PLEASE refer as many people as you can to the new Issue 2! (Click the image above to download!) BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can! Thank you! EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue" | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | | | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here! Best regards, Mark Pukita A GFI Person mark@gfiohio.com 614-499-0599 (c) | | Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn24hbhqqo45kbc7d44l6hhlq03cv42j9olgjfeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmcr90nq8iptpaunqa442kkco1jqvkloolvht0qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsoq50k0s1fbtv2osmfq4a666ifbsv8gi9j1epgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z32c5i3cv21olbhsbis0su8lmjs2krm1f6o12ccg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znfmur9hk410v6r64evglo8tf7tp0ptgetftl08g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp45sstebunmrsgktjha60jgqlrj4iviup4np7u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh2efdh1a8os36jmbqa6rgoak94ih0iiobc5shd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs145q33gtvmu7mksjq66iujbcfdjeltegvjsr2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zluf924hj6car94hmvvobcp22oc0q31bj67csbe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdim6pj6c5h2bs)
---

---

---

---
| Apr 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=161307242&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMzA3MjQyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ2NDI4MTUsImV4cCI6MTc0NzIzNDgxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nT632WGDOLKjuVLqX9HICJ7wbmCadWygVbKXOWbkGDM)

| | [](https://substack..4hrDfSFTyLzdOWncp2wc7I7pA2Fv_xQlFqYLjO963C4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/state-kidnaps-kids-over-vaccine-status?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This is nuts...
Massachusetts [tore five children from a homeschooling family's arms](https://substack.com/redirect/1e0e41c5-077e-4851-9320-c30500a9514e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for one reason:
Because they refused to vaccinate their infant.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1e0e41c5-077e-4851-9320-c30500a9514e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**This isn 't "overreach."**
It's a ruthless assault on parental rights and personal freedom. Snitched on by a pediatrician and harassed by police and the Department of Children and Families, the family fled to Texas to escape persecution.
This type of tyranny is why, in my first term as an Idaho state legislator in 2023, [I poured my heart into S1029](https://substack.com/redirect/d047af8a-1772-4a03-8c82-3afb21a536aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (my very first bill). And in just six weeks, I pushed it through and got it signed into law.
Enter the critics:
* _" There's no need for this."_
* _"This is a solution looking for a problem."_
* _"Idaho doesn't need this bill!"_

Yet I still got it pushed through and signed into law.
_**So now, in Idaho, because of S1029, no Idahoan faces discrimination based on their child's vaccine status.**_
CPS cannot initiate an investigation or determine parental rights based on your child's vaccine status.
Your health choices are your business, not the government's.
No government should ever steal children over private medical choices.
_**The scene unfolding in MA proves that we should continue to stand for liberty, protect families, and lock out overzealous bureaucrats who want our kids.**_
Idaho's leading the charge ([especially with the wins from the 2025 session](https://substack.com/redirect/c27104a0-a2dd-4e0d-be72-da1f5580aeee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
Let's keep our foot on the gas.

---

subject: ICYMI: Get Your Official Finstad Gear for Summer
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ9dECGIy40AgguLs_U7YZ_2mBOxXbIp0VKYFPbbHA7Irab7E96ZKH5tax6Cs)
---
| Dear Friend,
---

subject: Wes didn’t flinch
body:
If Washington won’t stand up for working families, Wes will. But he can’t do it alone.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105808665/539457004/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE3ZDEyNi00MTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sctLel-DDxYzS5w73GwfzBAxi6ss6WBjUogP2jNYJXY=&emci=76f3e584-3419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8617d126-4119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
Between Elon Musk’s DOGE dismantling key government programs, the reckless federal workforce cuts, and Trump’s tariffs cratering our economy, the federal administration has thrown our country into crisis. **But, while the federal administration has turned its back on us, Governor Moore didn’t flinch. He stepped up and took action.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105808666/539457005/-1659520369?source=em20250414-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE3ZDEyNi00MTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sctLel-DDxYzS5w73GwfzBAxi6ss6WBjUogP2jNYJXY=&emci=76f3e584-3419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8617d126-4119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485) First, Governor Moore launched hiring programs and career resources for Maryland federal workers who were laid off through no fault of their own. Then, he worked with the General Assembly to pass legislation that expands apprenticeships, grows small businesses, and unlocks economic opportunity across our state. This is what economic leadership looks like, and Governor Moore isn’t stopping. He needs members of this team by his side who are ready to sound the alarm, which is why we’re asking: [**Sign on now to show you’ve got Governor Moore’s back as he builds an economy that leaves no Marylander behind.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105808667/539457006/-1659520369?source=em20250414-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE3ZDEyNi00MTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sctLel-DDxYzS5w73GwfzBAxi6ss6WBjUogP2jNYJXY=&emci=76f3e584-3419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8617d126-4119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485) | **[Sign on »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105808668/539457007/-1659520369?source=em20250414-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE3ZDEyNi00MTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sctLel-DDxYzS5w73GwfzBAxi6ss6WBjUogP2jNYJXY=&emci=76f3e584-3419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8617d126-4119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)**
