body:
Puppet-masters for our future elections| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e45ac13b792420cacc94d310dd7cd81&_e=nK387VhuzKi01tqHoT54TJ1wjqWLBzIwx6Zl_S6eTF_wje3B5o2gMkw9wylubSCzFEIxqbmG0Eud23zw0sweZFCO_Q1Ecc9yg7QxZ39Ln0nSkVPhTNim9sQ1nUC_lOfyAY9TK1E2zX4Uk5ouxUpG3so87gbgTwQMc9BUmH9370-4eoxxhJPf3Fyc5HPSQbR1tRDQieuuowpPYwE1_VLjCZvIdsnPmr_9C4n9KSWwi8HBRDhu-91aOHqg9rWOam-X34mtsjrLUlNL0LCh1ONbMGuxrRzOh9DY2tvSQOvIPnEnXxev1ryvDhXU6PRNmvQeVvWB6-tB_HDIFiWrbloxHePjTRdvxPg3xrp5bOL8Dio%3D)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e45ac13b792420cacc94d310dd7cd81&_e=nK387VhuzKi01tqHoT54TJ1wjqWLBzIwx6Zl_S6eTF_wje3B5o2gMkw9wylubSCzFEIxqbmG0Eud23zw0sweZFCO_Q1Ecc9yg7QxZ39Ln0nSkVPhTNim9sQ1nUC_lOfyAY9TK1E2zX4Uk5ouxUpG3so87gbgTwQMc9BUmH9370-4eoxxhJPf3Fyc5HPSQbR1tRDQieuuowpPYwE1_VLjCRu6Un6QUZWuPxXxtC3KwCUTq5nlzQMVDTPSA-7SrtqrSAcXtAOKPs9Byn8rx3r5c3awB1GK_-dRfHtQ5027fdlKW8oQff_3_pmIMV93LORKwJ2KZDFp6-YhCJt8d_g4cEGdoNHrEnKhfYlm4KUuyAc%3D) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e45ac13b792420cacc94d310dd7cd81&_e=nK387VhuzKi01tqHoT54TJ1wjqWLBzIwx6Zl_S6eTF_wje3B5o2gMkw9wylubSCzFEIxqbmG0Eud23zw0sweZFCO_Q1Ecc9yg7QxZ39Ln0nSkVPhTNim9sQ1nUC_lOfyAY9TK1E2zX4Uk5ouxUpG3so87gbgTwQMc9BUmH9370-4eoxxhJPf3Fyc5HPSQbR1tRDQieuuowpPYwE1_VLjCZB0EUjRrxYjrMex-iTTRZTVEh_rptngUbCsfO4YVgaqsKey3JHflE9cTw3ZJq7nEqAdu5NIZ99K18ywGFTl8AXftggjRRQiz6RM7-QA8VXHDoCEupLXLLm4NnUOeKQoEKzHdzXIajV0NpGv5APfAPA%3D)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e45ac13b792420cacc94d310dd7cd81&_e=nK387VhuzKi01tqHoT54TJ1wjqWLBzIwx6Zl_S6eTF_wje3B5o2gMkw9wylubSCzFEIxqbmG0Eud23zw0sweZFCO_Q1Ecc9yg7QxZ39Ln0nSkVPhTNim9sQ1nUC_lOfyAY9TK1E2zX4Uk5ouxUpG3so87gbgTwQMc9BUmH9370-4eoxxhJPf3Fyc5HPSQbR1tRDQieuuowpPYwE1_VLjCfcQ41otMHdeLahGmqL-G1lBcvfNTJKplrWYshh3-hlgvn2wbHkukFfysHS5wOGIeQbAGQgIm9nMGGnU8qZ0NSPtPO7IgwENnmBeCONY9SYlPRsAlmSPO6s2HkoZmXU_PCEt8nW1IBrkd54KY4CgD8g%3D)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e45ac13b792420cacc94d310dd7cd81&_e=nK387VhuzKi01tqHoT54TJ1wjqWLBzIwx6Zl_S6eTF_wje3B5o2gMkw9wylubSCzFEIxqbmG0Eud23zw0sweZFCO_Q1Ecc9yg7QxZ39Ln0nSkVPhTNim9sQ1nUC_lOfyAY9TK1E2zX4Uk5ouxUpG3so87gbgTwQMc9BUmH9370-4eoxxhJPf3Fyc5HPSQbR1tRDQieuuowpPYwE1_VLjCRpeYxXyV5XeQ7rOhEywSy0e254fi2xUf0pa_8Kt6D-MDhnU-n9zKM3vm22YdrGhKOvbg-5VLBQYhfUguiWUquaVC-DFpTRjGF_vgj6f6SbKjKXpJ-Q9kFtyLTCHeApty0KlaXZm14bWihrqEVaXzVA%3D) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. | | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4065156166be4922b9b72f2ef8d68d94&_e=SMwXEezRi-HFLtRkT495h4fD4xTWV9kXRWJ43MkoSK4CVSU3CRI0Pl9iC3a2of4lrk5oZ12mhz5hkZpC_yOExCjdTEuwjAJSMyfDcR2xwFUQBfOOzN9hx-GzcOOusFzO9zhl6BS0A6qb8GNEZgIn0go5AuEnrPTzTzrtULAhB3ChW_3QGQcatpc4Fsxr3tPQmzOhNClb3i3Ctp5Rl8Vhgp4QmW8SSVIiPa_SHFYxkchXQNz_OeBrcAkKa_P5CvnhzehveicHEddBOaEuEReqzo2ZxaJYCXhO-1xigaEy5U1InYwqrK2ZmZJjVbzhoJcJ8IOEwLyxXx0RcKH-W8oCRSQZNZwiax3PSeA7L1WILsKfMA8REYT74FEB1OL9FCxwTPq60wJP1lydpT-oEvyP-ydennWzqouFvImyi4S8wAzwIOd0vROFhMwD5hGZCrG6)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4065156166be4922b9b72f2ef8d68d94&_e=SMwXEezRi-HFLtRkT495h4fD4xTWV9kXRWJ43MkoSK4CVSU3CRI0Pl9iC3a2of4lrk5oZ12mhz5hkZpC_yOExCjdTEuwjAJSMyfDcR2xwFUQBfOOzN9hx-GzcOOusFzO9zhl6BS0A6qb8GNEZgIn0go5AuEnrPTzTzrtULAhB3ChW_3QGQcatpc4Fsxr3tPQmzOhNClb3i3Ctp5Rl8Vhgp4QmW8SSVIiPa_SHFYxkchXQNz_OeBrcAkKa_P5CvnhzehveicHEddBOaEuEReqzo2ZxaJYCXhO-1xigaEy5U0MCtSRlNoDERZ0ESxkEpr3OTbKn72f4C08QP5G--jcgj2Nzm1CcD68s-5hjO5AHYFtN8sVqeaPULGhEekp3aUhxu3uYax2RcZX8mkRs63yp_XZVDJiSZL6QjWoTkyegHzHlDOj1BFLSq1IJisBvVOI)

clean_body: Watch the trailer A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Dear Friend, Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "," now available on DVD. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below: -) Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | |

Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d2807d0a553f4e7286de2afd413ab798&_e=36p3gnh9Oyt6nlMBA2HJzqNxXQWwaCb80QFXpG87Ch9ChYZC9UK3kimqOlBYOzrgUy48HtcXAywrHzRGrEB-MoMFCJdeAy9iyK3MvS8uM4lmUjNCT1xxPY4H2qeePrZ6lHlyaa-FOTjAG0171z0JoMohrf4D9f8GFZ4LhaRZNVOssZ6x8eelJFF5s0ASWPRz8YJdsvZQ0ViDoHeTu0KUKd5VG--uPIauKWfyrrMKb3NlKPwHWamymlE-QEmia5bM5rlPyjA27UXY1nyPpGBVq6O4fg48pQQ821zncBn5-IySnBqCBY53tXps_6KmxIBg)**

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d2807d0a553f4e7286de2afd413ab798&_e=36p3gnh9Oyt6nlMBA2HJzqNxXQWwaCb80QFXpG87Ch9ChYZC9UK3kimqOlBYOzrgI7u1mzb81i2yV2Pbc-VaStjJJgqO0qNFT1vtwfjkwv-8PPYFoe-R4M7na6TwzJCNB9dC1ccYCO4TfXYtDjeBcYq9RV3a-p0Lvu5RaisHZY-9g--QulA5fH03qzPBKzd3aAvuudPsinJWnX6MUK3IAyOH4030nx3kILxOBCc8dZQaB4Foel580eea4hVjECNScwZeBgUv6cJgG6RYB-wiNZVHZTf_4ktueTOiGeMJ4AQ%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d2807d0a553f4e7286de2afd413ab798&_e=36p3gnh9Oyt6nlMBA2HJzqNxXQWwaCb80QFXpG87Ch9ChYZC9UK3kimqOlBYOzrgUy48HtcXAywrHzRGrEB-MoMFCJdeAy9iyK3MvS8uM4lmUjNCT1xxPY4H2qeePrZ6lHlyaa-FOTjAG0171z0JoMohrf4D9f8GFZ4LhaRZNVM9br9G-4Ch2cP6nS8Fd1EJv3eqw-RRD1wzoCcJqF1ZDDgeAc8nne3Jn41C98ByoDcbIxVjhOa-zTRYtMwgNdN_39fzWaq2d8T0WpLeZACc4MMTtQbfOTMfHRQ49q91EBjKYzL0k3dUPqKmGCQ4imTn) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d2807d0a553f4e7286de2afd413ab798&_e=36p3gnh9Oyt6nlMBA2HJzqNxXQWwaCb80QFXpG87Ch9ChYZC9UK3kimqOlBYOzrgUy48HtcXAywrHzRGrEB-MoMFCJdeAy9iyK3MvS8uM4lmUjNCT1xxPY4H2qeePrZ6lHlyaa-FOTjAG0171z0JoMohrf4D9f8GFZ4LhaRZNVMBUFo50IwnnQmiJDOuaPkodWJiwxOLJDZG6zsCDh0rnaawpFclnVzC0SOXO81my3sDOW8kZDZhM2haTz-nAdYgifEMUZoGQHi0AEyOnp921WK4ngNe4PysXGO6yLCy87iCLTgwp7in0Yt4wUXKdjkY)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

| | It’s Josh Hawley, Missouri’s Senator. You may have seen the viral clips of me bringing the hammer down on Joe Biden’s administration in committee hearings or defending Donald Trump’s agenda night after night. And while I am a consummate conservative and one of Trump’s most steadfast allies, my top priority remains being a husband, father, and unapologetic Christian. Since I was a boy, my faith in Christ has been my compass. I was raised to know that we have NOTHING without the grace of God, and as a Senator, I lean on scripture to guide me in every area of my life. That may be why the radical Left attacks me at every turn. I will always protect our shared values. _**[_**Will you stand with me so I can continue to fight for you?**_](http://e.hawleyformissouri.com/c/eJxsks9ygjocRp8Gd3SSHyGBBQtBabFaRmlV3HRiCIISwAD-4env3HZuV3d9zll9X-blDrYlmkgPM0IocQhyJ4VHLMQkymjmAstdzrAA5iBhyyNCGeJ8UnqAwEYEE2zb2LZeGBfcBpvnjuvmmZsZBBX8Xsln3mhVdl0z6PJFNGpSeUXft4Y1NSA0IKzK-tK9_K9qQNgZEAoDQrbGNuuSB50nl_KyWg2D2-fnyqzVCa2j-7hUeULp3hWBNM9R25vgtx9xMwTjk0438rJV5PTUlyB6X-njKW3rMB5CNTsvXoviqobmOmZ0KtObsKo6XrRaW7t9x76eQUseaxc3vXaSnUjR53ZrZpCgcr89-Kj82q_jZhyZrJiCcVBziww9xprd7juSPMPi7tjCXdBd8Fov--8rZ-RtWi1Aa-vTV3LGreUpacryaB_TqLCX9Ly_3_IE640_du-bIEjfHjORmyqemXTlp8lHBsvYlH1RV216iXzz7hMI56v6JvTD9M9W6GxnoxWtF5u-2CQPppardqpTRcgWxYeDAaGfxNFl_lE2baK_Fyq2p-36UOlHEfmpc76aBoTORMmeZ7znnsF8A0DJruMnGWUGwM9yII9HIY52ljtCEJJhzi0BjLgI5bmdS_hXhMAA6KVqK97_tZgBdikhv7TVzVmK_j8IlLnWLxFctbw81X-dhSmi2DXYbKK9rL2XVVV2lBkEnRQvq59v3Tz4JwAA__8dP-Lq)**_ The decisions I make in Washington aren’t just for my family—they’re for yours too. Because our future matters. And we’ve seen how much damage has been done under the Biden administration — how, in just four years, America can descend into despair. _**So here’s my promise to you:**_ I promise to fight for a prosperous America.I promise to fight for a strong America.I promise to fight for a safe America. I promise to fight for a free America. I'm fighting for this generation, the next generation, and the generations to come. I love my children too much to let the Left impose their warped agenda on their minds, and I know you do too. **[**Join me today to DEFEND the future of America.**](http://e.hawleyformissouri.com/c/eJxskkuXojgARn8N7qpOEgNJFiykFcUGFctHFRtOyIOHRGhBEX_9nOk6U6tZ33tX3yddTaGtwES5kGDsYIoBmxQukJooqohmmRSCAk4Fo0xCiDWhGYST0kUA2QBDDG0b2tN3wgW3kc01ZUxLJi0MCj7UatTNzZRd19xv5btozKR2i75vrenMQr6F_Lq8Xrr3_1Ut5HcW8oWFfEYuTruPnsds_wBp2qZZddlPX8VBPdMojYND2evd7iBHNqv-7OEtXo6hU-nUvjwu-HGmt3m5eTum6-XcaV5-FTbgsfPC0ZCpfdZBFv_yZqvTy1susID57QzSE3xd1ZB04_36GUXIfipZtPXZVPZ2pWIFZnkURNs5iEMOn1-6Gz43uXcU5_tzPFQXJpwPWYHVqkMnivtx5ujt86NbOkPRzLvfx8Um25Lh9XWYFfGCfdXUJPU59nh_KIg-aRDMvXSEwenjtauTY3mnYsbMAtH7tXu7P_mgN7mnGAzpuMu65JyMQc_WxSqC4dhmKFzI_Lf5lDuyGdY0BcGftG_WsWdjYiF_tWSXxbYJzJtJEruKgv1R7U6x8ZJw3nJ8spBPJ0b1XPKeuxbxLISM6jqeq0BaCP1dDqksEyKzpaZCYCwh51OBCGYAaG1rhf4V0S8LoV6Ztub9TwsJgszB-Ju2t6ZSov8PIoew6TcR3LS8zK8_3RQ6wIHMIvPJzZXtUNZ12TnEwiA3vKz_fuvhon8CAAD__7pm44k)**

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, | | It’s Josh Hawley, Missouri’s Senator. You may have seen the viral clips of me bringing the hammer down on Joe Biden’s administration in committee hearings or defending Donald Trump’s agenda night after night. And while I am a consummate conservative and one of Trump’s most steadfast allies, my top priority remains being a husband, father, and unapologetic Christian. Since I was a boy, my faith in Christ has been my compass. I was raised to know that we have NOTHING without the grace of God, and as a Senator, I lean on scripture to guide me in every area of my life. That may be why the radical Left attacks me at every turn. I will always protect our shared values. The decisions I make in Washington aren’t just for my family—they’re for yours too. Because our future matters. And we’ve seen how much damage has been done under the Biden administration — how, in just four years, America can descend into despair. So here’s my promise to you: I promise to fight for a prosperous America.I promise to fight for a strong America.I promise to fight for a safe America. I promise to fight for a free America. I'm fighting for this generation, the next generation, and the generations to come. I love my children too much to let the Left impose their warped agenda on their minds, and I know you do too. | | Thank you for standing with us. In Liberty, | | Josh Hawley U.S. Senator, Missouri | | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

Only 18% of all House races are competitive this cycle — and Oregon’s 6th District is one of them. Congresswoman Andrea Salinas is rallying supporters across the district to fight back against Donald Trump’s agenda. She’s fighting for Oregon’s small business owners whose livelihoods are being upended by Trump’s reckless tariffs. And she’s raising the alarm to hold House Republicans accountable for voting to rip away healthcare from millions of hardworking Americans. Andrea is the fighter we need in Congress – but her race is projected to be one of the only competitive races in the country. Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
Peter, we’ll be upfront: we’re about to ask you to chip in $10 to the Texas Organizing Project PAC. We’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re already on board, consider donating $10 or more here » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_041425_TEN_ATO_D1_S1_RES1

Since Donald Trump took the White House in January, he’s taken every opportunity to undermine our fundamental rights and freedoms. Just so far, he has:

❌ Attacked immigrant communities and birthright citizenship
❌ Threatened to cut funding to Social Security and Medicare
❌ Undone years of climate progress to “drill, baby, drill!”

Peter, we refuse to concede to Trump’s extremist agenda and illegal power grabs that threaten the livelihoods of millions of Americans. And with just $10, you can help us:

✅ Organize working Black and Latino communities across Texas
✅ Win issue-based and electoral campaigns for healthcare, housing, climate, voting, and immigration justice
✅ Expand the reach of our message to grow our movement

...and so much more!

Peter, we can only do this if we have you in our corner. Will you chip in $10 or more to fuel our fight for progressive reform for working families in Texas?

name: Katie Niejadlik
subject: President Trump's assault on the law
body:
Your rights under attack | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105813868/539472029/2141984067?sourceid=1150590&utm_campaign=25emaus-0402aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=amicusbrief&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZjNDU3OS00OTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FK1Bxxs59-GyvK5ENDQQpyQtetUMqlNq1Kas6-KwI14=&emci=b8126042-1a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2ffc4579-4919-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105813870/539472032/2141984067?sourceid=1150590&utm_campaign=25emaus-0402aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=amicusbrief&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZjNDU3OS00OTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FK1Bxxs59-GyvK5ENDQQpyQtetUMqlNq1Kas6-KwI14=&emci=b8126042-1a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2ffc4579-4919-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)
---|---
Dear Peter,

The Trump administration is violating the First Amendment by trying to intimidate lawyers, and we’re calling it what it is:**a direct threat to the freedoms of every American, and an attack on the rule of law.** | [**SUPPORT OUR LEGAL FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105813872/539472033/2141984067?sourceid=1150590&utm_campaign=25emaus-0402aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=amicusbrief&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZjNDU3OS00OTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FK1Bxxs59-GyvK5ENDQQpyQtetUMqlNq1Kas6-KwI14=&emci=b8126042-1a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2ffc4579-4919-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
Last week, the Center joined nearly two dozen nonprofits in filing multiple “friend of the court” briefs to support lawsuits filed by firms targeted by Executive Orders. In these briefs, we argue that President Trump’s orders calling out these firms violate the First Amendment by:
* **Chilling the ability of nonprofits and nongovernmental organizations to petition the government** by targeting a law firm that has represented clients challenging the administration—raising the threat of retaliation for future legal action.
* **Infringing on our right to associate freely with legal counsel** by deterring law firms like Perkins Coie from providing _pro bono_ legal services to organizations like the Center.
* **Threatening the independence of lawyers** and the ability of courts to serve as a check on executive power.

[**FIGHT BACK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105813874/539472037/2141984067?sourceid=1150590&utm_campaign=25emaus-0402aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=amicusbrief&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZjNDU3OS00OTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FK1Bxxs59-GyvK5ENDQQpyQtetUMqlNq1Kas6-KwI14=&emci=b8126042-1a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2ffc4579-4919-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
The Center relies on an army of _pro bono_ lawyers to support our innovative legal strategies, research and policy work. But now these critical partners—and the rule of law—are under attack, [**and we’re not going to let it happen.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105813876/539472039/2141984067?sourceid=1150590&utm_campaign=25emaus-0402aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=amicusbrief&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZjNDU3OS00OTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FK1Bxxs59-GyvK5ENDQQpyQtetUMqlNq1Kas6-KwI14=&emci=b8126042-1a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2ffc4579-4919-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)
President Trump is trying to silence everyday Americans by targeting the lawyers who represent them. This is a direct attack on the right to challenge the government—and we won’t back down. [**We are taking action to defend our freedoms and protect the rule of law.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105813879/539472040/2141984067?sourceid=1150590&utm_campaign=25emaus-0402aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=amicusbrief&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZjNDU3OS00OTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FK1Bxxs59-GyvK5ENDQQpyQtetUMqlNq1Kas6-KwI14=&emci=b8126042-1a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2ffc4579-4919-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

Standing firm,

Katie Niejadlik
Global Director, Pro Bono Services

clean_body: Your rights under attack | | | ---|--- Dear Peter, The Trump administration is violating the First Amendment by trying to intimidate lawyers, and we’re calling it what it is:a direct threat to the freedoms of every American, and an attack on the rule of law. | "DONATE NOW" Last week, the Center joined nearly two dozen nonprofits in filing multiple “friend of the court” briefs to support lawsuits filed by firms targeted by Executive Orders. In these briefs, we argue that President Trump’s orders calling out these firms violate the First Amendment by: Chilling the ability of nonprofits and nongovernmental organizations to petition the government by targeting a law firm that has represented clients challenging the administration—raising the threat of retaliation for future legal action. Infringing on our right to associate freely with legal counsel by deterring law firms like Perkins Coie from providing pro bono legal services to organizations like the Center. Threatening the independence of lawyers** and the ability of courts to serve as a check on executive power. "DONATE NOW" The Center relies on an army of pro bono lawyers to support our innovative legal strategies, research and policy work. But now these critical partners—and the rule of law—are under attack, President Trump is trying to silence everyday Americans by targeting the lawyers who represent them. This is a direct attack on the right to challenge the government—and we won’t back down. Standing firm, Katie Niejadlik Global Director, Pro Bono Services "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: COURIER
subject: Can we count on you to sponsor a newsroom, Peter?
body:
We’re building the fastest-growing, values-driven news network in America—and we need your help to keep going.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105813986/539472216/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk0MzQ5ODgtNDkxOS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OLFH9fncHJRxGEgBfhuTuOm_6ZEQ1Y6Fe-fL5LoD4To=&emci=05d55d9e-2f19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=79434988-4919-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Trump’s second term is already a chaotic, authoritarian nightmare—marked by economic sabotage, attacks on the free press, and government-led persecution and deportation of political enemies.
The legacy media? They’re folding—settling lawsuits, softening headlines, and sane-washing Trump just when we need them the most.
**COURIER is doing the opposite.**
We’re building the fastest-growing, values-driven news network in America—and we need your help to keep going.
**[Right now, you can sponsor a battleground newsroom in one of the 11 states where we operate—not with a corporate check, but with a grassroots donation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105813988/539472218/188564078?refcode=20250414&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk0MzQ5ODgtNDkxOS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OLFH9fncHJRxGEgBfhuTuOm_6ZEQ1Y6Fe-fL5LoD4To=)**
**You’ve been chosen to sponsor our local news teams! Your donation will support our newsrooms across 11 battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Texas, Virginia, New Hampshire, and Wisconsin.**
**Can we count on you to chip in $25 now and help our newsrooms spread their stories across their states?** **[Chip in $25 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105813990/539472220/188564078?refcode=20250414&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk0MzQ5ODgtNDkxOS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OLFH9fncHJRxGEgBfhuTuOm_6ZEQ1Y6Fe-fL5LoD4To=)**
---
Our newsrooms are reporting stories that legacy media won’t touch. Just this week:
* In Michigan, we exposed Trump’s plan to revoke student visas and legal residency from international students at Michigan universities.
* In North Carolina, we sounded the alarm about a new MAGA-led effort to completely ban abortions in the state.
* In Virginia, we reported how local leaders are warning DOGE cuts could devastate working families—worse than COVID.

**This is what impactful, local journalism looks like in the Trump era.**
And it’s reaching millions.
**Last week, our most-liked Instagram post hit 151,000 likes and 2.6 million views. On TikTok, our top post reached 5.5 million views and 458,000 likes. We’re not waiting for people to come find the news—we’re putting the truth directly in their feeds, inboxes, and communities.**
We don’t “both sides” fascism. We don’t sanitize propaganda. And we don’t take orders from billionaires or corporate boards. We rely on grassroots support to power every newsroom we run.
[**If you believe in fearless, independent journalism that fights back, chip in $25 or whatever you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105813991/539472222/188564078?refcode=20250414&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk0MzQ5ODgtNDkxOS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OLFH9fncHJRxGEgBfhuTuOm_6ZEQ1Y6Fe-fL5LoD4To=)
**[Sponsor a Newsroom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105813993/539472224/188564078?refcode=20250414&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk0MzQ5ODgtNDkxOS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OLFH9fncHJRxGEgBfhuTuOm_6ZEQ1Y6Fe-fL5LoD4To=)**
Thank you,
COURIER

# BLUE LETTER
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60e644fd-f695-4f6c-92f1-f1d139db7b21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### CLIFF'S NOTE: Hate Speech Leads To Hate Crimes. It's Called Stochastic Terrorism. And It's A MAGA Staple
In yet another infected chapter in America's untreated wound that's led to MAGA madness, Cody Balmer--the suspect charged with scaling a security fence at the Pennsylvania Governor's Mansion, [breaking in and lighting a homemade incendiary device](https://substack.com/redirect/3a6cb59b-26cb-4921-8148-e4db4e4e0d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in an effort to murder Governor Josh Shapiro and his family--we again see an extremist blueprint for inspiring violence. A concept with which you may not be familiar, but we all should be: Stochastic Terrorism.
It's not a "concept" in the sense that [terror-cheerleader Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/b21de28f-1248-48db-8d67-f440cf870803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has "concepts of a plan" for replacing Obamacare. I.e. the okra-tinted conman has no f*king idea how to do it, much like [his understanding of, well, his entire job](https://substack.com/redirect/0eed9943-56ea-41c7-804a-e87ec745e43d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), yet needed to pull some bs outta an orifice in his bloated, decrepit carcass on the spot during a debate. And that phrase slinked through of a pile of crushed adderall likely high enough to re-focus a day-dreaming elephant.
No, [this is a genuine concept](https://substack.com/redirect/dacfb190-d4fb-4480-ae0b-bbb1d359c3ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). From [Encyclopedia Brittanica](https://substack.com/redirect/c442e603-42f1-43db-b7cd-c363c225678d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> **Stochastic terrorism** refers to the **indirect incitement of violence** through public discourse, where the repeated use of hate speech or vilifying rhetoric by public figures inspires individuals to commit acts of violence against targeted groups or individuals. This phenomenon is characterized by the unpredictability of the violent acts, which are statistically probable but cannot be specifically predicted. Essentially, it highlights how dehumanizing rhetoric can provoke ideologically driven attacks, often by "lone wolf" extremists.
Not only is hate speech and disinformation _not_ free speech, _it undermines free speech_ , as my friend, Salon columnist and former Playboy Magazine White House correspondent [Brian Karem, put it to me in a discussion we had](https://substack.com/redirect/e4d24cda-a932-458e-8aee-fdd643b039cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**WHO IS CODY BALLMER?**
A 38-year old white man steeped in online extremism, with a history of criminal acts from three charges of misdemeanor assault to forgery and theft--and a habit of hating Joe Biden in online posts. But, Balmer isn't just some "lone wolf," he's the inevitable byproduct of years of right-wing propaganda poisoning our airwaves and echoing off the bleachers at Trump's Il Duce ingatherings.
To paraphrase Barack Obama: They built this.
Fox"News", Donald Trump, Elon Musk, Steve Bannon, Alex Jones, Marjorie Taylor Greene and many more on The Right stoke this violence virtually every time they open their gaping pie-holes to barf up their blather to the brainwashed. Painting Democrats as child-trafficking tyrants or vaccine-wielding fascists, someone like Balmer doesn't just _hear_ the message--he treats it like a call to arms.
**Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders **_**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought; We Need Your Support.**_**Please become a paid subscriber**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.hx1Ik-JACWEXGlQBuhkE2sEYCyekmf9zczUzNfG3MvI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161273755)
In the affidavit of his arrest, when asked what he would've done had the Governor caught him in the act. He responded he "would have beaten him with his hammer." Sound familiar? It should. Because this is what a crazed right-wing cretin did to Paul Pelosi when he broke into Nancy Pelosi's house and she wasn't there. After talk of a "caravan" coming from Mexico, Latino shoppers were murdered in [a Walmart in El Paso Texas](https://substack.com/redirect/4faf55ee-ce8f-42ec-8459-07ad5e713ceb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But George Soros was sponsoring it, per many right-wing voices, so to take revenge a reactionary bobblehead walked into the Tree of Life Temple in Pittsburgh and [murdered Jews in their House of worship](https://substack.com/redirect/a50ffd58-7495-46fc-8dac-39072630acd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Which brings us back to this case. Shapiro is Jewish, a Democrat and a leader who stood up to Trump's lies--so of course he's a target. He'd only hours earlier participated in a Passover Seder with his family. We'll see what the investigation finds, but let's just say I don't think there's a ton of suspense here. This isn't isolated, it's _orchestrated chaos with plausible deniability_.
The same people who rile up the Balmer types with ["stolen election"](https://substack.com/redirect/22340a49-9978-4f58-9d48-75d675c171dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) screams and [QAnon fairy tales](https://substack.com/redirect/e1f8c1ee-45c3-4755-9a2e-59e44b1ee84e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) will now act shocked, _shocked I tell you_ , that their rhetoric lit the match. This isn't politics--it's incitement dressed up as patriotism, **and every time we fail to call it what it is, we 're just setting the next stage for disaster.**
* * *

If you give this man a ride. Sweet memory will die. Killer on the road - The Doors | | | Apr 14 | | | | | | | | | | | | BLUE LETTER | | ---|---|--- CLIFF'S NOTE: Hate Speech Leads To Hate Crimes. It's Called Stochastic Terrorism. And It's A MAGA Staple In yet another infected chapter in America's untreated wound that's led to MAGA madness, Cody Balmer--the suspect charged with scaling a security fence at the Pennsylvania Governor's Mansion, in an effort to murder Governor Josh Shapiro and his family--we again see an extremist blueprint for inspiring violence. A concept with which you may not be familiar, but we all should be: Stochastic Terrorism. It's not a "concept" in the sense that has "concepts of a plan" for replacing Obamacare. I.e. the okra-tinted conman has no fking idea how to do it, much like , yet needed to pull some bs outta an orifice in his bloated, decrepit carcass on the spot during a debate. And that phrase slinked through of a pile of crushed adderall likely high enough to re-focus a day-dreaming elephant. No, . From : Stochastic terrorism refers to the indirect incitement of violence through public discourse, where the repeated use of hate speech or vilifying rhetoric by public figures inspires individuals to commit acts of violence against targeted groups or individuals. This phenomenon is characterized by the unpredictability of the violent acts, which are statistically probable but cannot be specifically predicted. Essentially, it highlights how dehumanizing rhetoric can provoke ideologically driven attacks, often by "lone wolf" extremists. Not only is hate speech and disinformation not free speech, it undermines free speech , as my friend, Salon columnist and former Playboy Magazine White House correspondent . WHO IS CODY BALLMER? A 38-year old white man steeped in online extremism, with a history of criminal acts from three charges of misdemeanor assault to forgery and theft--and a habit of hating Joe Biden in online posts. But, Balmer isn't just some "lone wolf," he's the inevitable byproduct of years of right-wing propaganda poisoning our airwaves and echoing off the bleachers at Trump's Il Duce ingatherings. To paraphrase Barack Obama: They built this. Fox"News", Donald Trump, Elon Musk, Steve Bannon, Alex Jones, Marjorie Taylor Greene and many more on The Right stoke this violence virtually every time they open their gaping pie-holes to barf up their blather to the brainwashed. Painting Democrats as child-trafficking tyrants or vaccine-wielding fascists, someone like Balmer doesn't just hear the message--he treats it like a call to arms. Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders telling you what others won 't. We 're un-bought; We Need Your Support.Please become a paid subscriber In the affidavit of his arrest, when asked what he would've done had the Governor caught him in the act. He responded he "would have beaten him with his hammer." Sound familiar? It should. Because this is what a crazed right-wing cretin did to Paul Pelosi when he broke into Nancy Pelosi's house and she wasn't there. After talk of a "caravan" coming from Mexico, Latino shoppers were murdered in . But George Soros was sponsoring it, per many right-wing voices, so to take revenge a reactionary bobblehead walked into the Tree of Life Temple in Pittsburgh and . Which brings us back to this case. Shapiro is Jewish, a Democrat and a leader who stood up to Trump's lies--so of course he's a target. He'd only hours earlier participated in a Passover Seder with his family. We'll see what the investigation finds, but let's just say I don't think there's a ton of suspense here. This isn't isolated, it's orchestrated chaos with plausible deniability. The same people who rile up the Balmer types with screams and will now act shocked, shocked I tell you , that their rhetoric lit the match. This isn't politics--it's incitement dressed up as patriotism, and every time we fail to call it what it is, we 're just setting the next stage for disaster. ... In the first 100 days of the Trump administration, it’s more important than ever that we hear from you.

The GOP wants you to believe that division and fear are a necessary aspect of our politics.

_But more often than not, we can find common ground over the issues that our families are facing — from rising grocery costs to attacks on our public schools._

As Kirsten Gillibrand and other top Democrats fight for the progress we deserve and block the Trump administration’s attempts to turn back the clock, we want you to be a part of our strategy.

name: Steve Andersen
subject: Tax Time Is a Good Time to Evaluate Your Charitable Giving Goals
body:
As income tax time approaches, now is a good time to evaluate your charitable giving options and plan your 2025 charitable giving goals. As Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization, you might consider taking advantage of several special ways of giving, including:

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As income tax time approaches, now is a good time to evaluate your charitable giving options and plan your 2025 charitable giving goals. As Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization, you might consider taking advantage of several special ways of giving, including:
**1) Making Your Best Charitable Donation Now to Judicial Watch**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73386&L=27098&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLzEzNjgwMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=cc9816801a7712595f7cd4ab625515894ce151180deb312bef4b7ab5350952e4)
---

**2) Becoming a Monthly Amicus Donor to Help Fight Corruption Every Month**

Set up an automatically recurring credit card donation to Judicial Watch by calling JW Member Services at (888) 593-8442 or going to our secure online donation page at [www.JudicialWatch.org](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73386&L=6&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL3d3dy5qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLm9yZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=fedfa27ca6f9b3c54b443956cf654d2267fe406cbe8ecf9cd7a4886f67ac63ce) and checking the “Make this a monthly donation!” box after selecting an amount to donate.

**3) Making a Qualified Charitable Distribution (QCD) Directly from Your IRA**

If you are 701⁄2 or older, tax law allows you to donate up to $108,000 each year tax-free from your IRA to Judicial Watch without that distribution being subject to federal income tax withholding. These "Qualified Charitable Distribution" (QCD) contributions count toward your Required Minimum Distribution (RMD) but aren't included in your adjusted gross income. Even though the minimum age for RMDs is now age 73, (or 72 if you were born before July 1, 1949), it is still 701⁄2 for QCDs. This may be an excellent strategy for donors who can no longer itemize charitable donations on their income taxes.

**4) Donating Appreciated Stocks or Mutual Funds**

By donating appreciated securities that you have owned for more than one year, you can deduct the full value of those shares, while also avoiding paying capital gains taxes on those shares should you have sold them. Call us at (888) 593-8442 to get more information about how to donate stocks or mutual funds, and to see if your mutual funds can be accepted.

**5) Establishing a Charitable Gift Annuity**

If you are 55 or older, you could set up a Charitable Gift Annuity (CGA) with Judicial Watch that would generate a fixed income payment to you for life while helping Judicial Watch. A portion of your donation is tax-deductible. Call us at (888) 593-8442 to get a detailed personalized illustration showing how a CGA could work for you (minimum amount $5,000). A CGA may also be funded with a Qualified Chartable Distribution directly from your IRA. CGAs with Judicial Watch are not available in Washington State or Hawaii.

**6) Including Judicial Watch in Your Will or Other Estate Plans**

By including Judicial Watch in your estate plans, you will leave a legacy of freedom for your loved ones and future generations of Americans. Contact us for more information about how you can include Judicial Watch in your plans, including our brochure, "How to Make a Will that Works."

We are grateful to you for your support however you choose to donate to Judicial Watch. If you would like to find out more about any of these charitable ways of giving, please contact us by calling (888) 593-8442 or by replying to this email.

Sincerely,

Steven C. Andersen
Director of Development
Judicial Watch
425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024
[www.judicialwatch.org](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73386&L=6&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL3d3dy5qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLm9yZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=fedfa27ca6f9b3c54b443956cf654d2267fe406cbe8ecf9cd7a4886f67ac63ce)

_"Because no one is above the law."_

_" Those who expect to reap the blessings of freedom, must, like men, undergo the fatigue of supporting it."_
~Thomas Paine

This email is intended for informational purposes only and is not intended to provide tax, legal or accounting advice. You should consult with your tax, legal or accounting advisers should you have any questions as to how these special ways of giving could benefit you.

These "Qualified Charitable Distribution" (QCD) contributions count toward your Required Minimum Distribution (RMD) but aren't included in your adjusted gross income. Even though the minimum age for RMDs is now age 73, (or 72 if you were born before July 1, 1949), it is still 701⁄2 for QCDs. This may be an excellent strategy for donors who can no longer itemize charitable donations on their income taxes. 4) Donating Appreciated Stocks or Mutual Funds By donating appreciated securities that you have owned for more than one year, you can deduct the full value of those shares, while also avoiding paying capital gains taxes on those shares should you have sold them. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 4/14/2025
body:
Colorado Dems Go Too Far – Gun Control, Gender Bills, and a TABOR Attack
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sev2707224a)
---
**April 14, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
This week, we’re launching a powerful new series: **[The COvid Chronicles](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s1o19e0f53c)**. Five years after "15 days to slow the spread," Rocky Mountain Voice is digging into how fear, force, government overreach and enabling media reshaped life in Colorado. From shuttered churches to shattered trust, we’re revisiting the decisions that defined the pandemic—and exposing the lasting impact on freedom, faith, and families. It’s time to set the record straight, and we’re starting now. [Read the first edition here!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sched27fe21)
This past week, Colorado Democrats have moved full-speed ahead on some of the **most radical legislation** **in recent memory** —from gutting taxpayer protections to undermining parental rights and pushing unconstitutional gun restrictions. Here’s what you need to know:
🛑 [SB25-003 was signed into law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/scs1890ba42)—quietly and behind closed doors. Despite 95,000 petitions, bipartisan opposition, and national outcry, Governor Polis signed the semi-auto firearm licensing and training bill without so much as a press release. Coloradans won’t just face new bureaucratic hoops—they’ll be forced into a state-controlled gun registry with steep fees and fingerprinting.
👨👩👧 [HB25-1312 is gaining national backlash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s9gd2cae19d) for redefining family disagreement over gender identity as “abuse.” The bill gives courts the power to remove children from their homes—simply for misgendering. From Fox News to Congress, critics are calling it one of the most extreme anti-parent bills in America.
And just last week, over [20 Colorado pastors issued a public warning](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s3n63aa3f85) that HB25-1312 threatens parental rights, targets Christian schools, and criminalizes biblical truth. They issued an urgent call to action to fellow pastors: lead your congregations to action before it’s too late.
🏠 [HB25-1169 would strip local zoning control from cities and counties](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s3he01bbfe1), forcing them to allow dense housing developments on church, school, and college land—regardless of neighborhood input. Douglas County is already moving toward [Home Rule](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s2o47a8e1d7) in response, calling this a a massive overreach by Denver politicians.
💸 [HJR25-1023 seeks to destroy TABOR.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s8u54ced551) Forty-four lawmakers have signed on to a resolution calling for a lawsuit to overturn Colorado’s Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights. That means they want to eliminate your right to vote on new taxes, spending, and debt. Constitutional scholars have called it “deeply ignorant” and a direct assault on representative government.
**If it feels like everything is moving at once—you’re right.** The Capitol is in overdrive, and it’s hard to keep up. That’s exactly why we exist: to cut through the chaos and bring you the truth.
And here’s what we know: They are counting on your exhaustion. They’re hoping Coloradans are too distracted, divided, or disillusioned to fight back.
Let’s prove them wrong. We’ll keep reporting. You keep showing up.
In liberty and truth, The RMV Team
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Polis signs SB25-003 into law after months of protest and 95,000 petitions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s0of6f3682b)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s8j5b08029a) In the end, Governor Jared Polis didn’t make a speech. He didn’t stand before cameras or take questions. He didn’t even put the signing on his public calendar.

**[New council, new direction: Grand Junction voters back reform candidates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sbl71c344b8)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sdpa78897d7)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/scp9529779e) All four City Council seats up for election in Grand Junction this April have been claimed by candidates promising a new direction for the city. While official results won’t be certified until later this month, the margins are clear—and the message from voters, even clearer.

**[The fine print of SB25-063: Speak up about inappropriate books in schools, get doxxed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sbg397d2ac5)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sbv608931d9)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s4n5795b028) When Colorado lawmakers debated Senate Bill 25-063—titled the “Freedom to Read Act”—most eyes focused on the usual battle lines: controversial books, age appropriateness and the role of librarians. But tucked inside the bill is something less publicized—and more dangerous to parents who dare to speak up.

|
---
**LEGISLATIVE SESSION**
**[HB25-1169 would strip local control, override zoning to force housing on church and school property](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sci14b040a5)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s4oa68d1890)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s6i5dc7ba36) A bill making its way through the Colorado legislature—HB 25-1169, the “Faith and Education Land Use” bill—is under growing scrutiny from local officials, school communities, and everyday Coloradans who see it as a sweeping override of local zoning authority.

**[Over 20 Colorado pastors unite in urgent call to action against HB25-1312](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s7v28f9d473)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s6rcb517681) “If you don’t speak up now, it may be too late.” That’s the message from a growing coalition of Colorado pastors urging fellow faith leaders to take a public stand against HB25-1312 — a bill they say undermines parental rights, criminalizes biblical truth and puts families at risk.

**[House approves $44B budget, GOP spending cut efforts rejected](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s5r633d1d4b)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/scnaabc138a) Colorado state House legislators on Wednesday debated and advanced a $44 billion spending plan for the next fiscal year. They also approved 63 “orbital” bills designed to change state law in order to balance the state budget.
**[State bill rewrites how Colorado decides school vaccine mandates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/savc8f936f1)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sfg8d25ef44)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s3k82336699) Colorado lawmakers have quietly moved to shift the state’s school immunization requirements away from the recommendations of a prominent federal committee, in response to Robert F. Kennedy Jr. taking over the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.

**[New Democrat bill would hamper ICE, prioritize illegal immigrants over Rule of Law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s0o14c2d384)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sbv10e3680f)**[KUNC](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s7k0ebda66f) Several Colorado lawmakers are trying to create new protections for the state’s immigrants against hardline deportation policies under the Trump administration.

**[READ MORE LEGISLATIVE SESSION UPDATES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s9u9c1f9d71)**
|
---
**STATE**
**[The COvid Chronicles: How fear and force reshaped Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s8p3ceff3f7)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s7t56a3ad4d)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sco23d3afc3) It’s one of the more ubiquitous storytelling styles in legacy corporate media — anniversary time pegs. In editorial meetings, reporters and editors look at a calendar, see what historic newsy event(s) are upcoming that originally occurred 5, 10, 25 years ago, and put into proper historical perspective said event on the respective anniversary.
**[“Celebrate the win”: Boebert’s gray wolf delisting bill clears key House committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s2ldf91476a)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sau94fa5813)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s4kab0d4e03) In rural Colorado, the fight over wolves isn’t just about wildlife—it’s about life and livelihoods. On Tuesday, a bill sponsored by Reps. Lauren Boebert and Tom Tiffany passed a key House committee, aiming to take gray wolves off the Endangered Species List and block federal courts from reversing the move.

**[Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold joins Democratic primary for attorney general](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/scqfa6c0917)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s3oe3905ae6)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s6nfe8f3b05) Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold announced Monday that she is seeking the Democratic nomination for attorney general in next year’s election, promising to “stand up to Donald Trump to protect our rights and freedoms.”
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s3s2ea04b93)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Trump to pull all federal funding going to sanctuary cities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s7s9dd9f88c)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s5v63b5b69a)**[THE POST MILLENNIAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s7h07cc5d00) President Trump announced on Thursday that he would be withholding federal funding to sanctuary cities, referring to them as a national disgrace. The move would impact Democratic-run cities across the nation, including Seattle, Chicago, Denver, Boston, New York, Los Angeles, and others.

**[Promises made, promises kept: Consumer prices fell in March, defying predictions of tarifflation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s6r0b36133c)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sdg92b073e2)**[BRIETBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/s8o6c29a6d1) U.S. consumer prices fell in March, pushed down by a decline in the price of goods and defying predictions that President Trump’s tariff plans would push up prices. This was the first drop in consumer prices in nearly three years and only the second decline since inflation accelerated under Joe Biden to the worst rates in decades.

**[Supreme Court allows Trump Administration to fire thousands of federal workers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._04aQ/sfv72416288)**

clean_body: Colorado Dems Go Too Far – Gun Control, Gender Bills, and a TABOR Attack | | | | April 14, 2025 SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST By Heidi Ganahl | | Dear Readers, This week, we’re launching a powerful new series: . Five years after "15 days to slow the spread," Rocky Mountain Voice is digging into how fear, force, government overreach and enabling media reshaped life in Colorado. From shuttered churches to shattered trust, we’re revisiting the decisions that defined the pandemic—and exposing the lasting impact on freedom, faith, and families. It’s time to set the record straight, and we’re starting now. This past week, Colorado Democrats have moved full-speed ahead on some of the most radical legislation in recent memory —from gutting taxpayer protections to undermining parental rights and pushing unconstitutional gun restrictions. Here’s what you need to know: 🛑 —quietly and behind closed doors. Despite 95,000 petitions, bipartisan opposition, and national outcry, Governor Polis signed the semi-auto firearm licensing and training bill without so much as a press release. Coloradans won’t just face new bureaucratic hoops—they’ll be forced into a state-controlled gun registry with steep fees and fingerprinting. 👨👩👧 for redefining family disagreement over gender identity as “abuse.” The bill gives courts the power to remove children from their homes—simply for misgendering. From Fox News to Congress, critics are calling it one of the most extreme anti-parent bills in America. And just last week, over that HB25-1312 threatens parental rights, targets Christian schools, and criminalizes biblical truth. They issued an urgent call to action to fellow pastors: lead your congregations to action before it’s too late. 🏠 , forcing them to allow dense housing developments on church, school, and college land—regardless of neighborhood input. Douglas County is already moving toward in response, calling this a a massive overreach by Denver politicians. 💸 Forty-four lawmakers have signed on to a resolution calling for a lawsuit to overturn Colorado’s Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights. That means they want to eliminate your right to vote on new taxes, spending, and debt. Constitutional scholars have called it “deeply ignorant” and a direct assault on representative government. If it feels like everything is moving at once—you’re right. The Capitol is in overdrive, and it’s hard to keep up. That’s exactly why we exist: to cut through the chaos and bring you the truth. And here’s what we know: They are counting on your exhaustion. They’re hoping Coloradans are too distracted, divided, or disillusioned to fight back. Let’s prove them wrong. We’ll keep reporting. You keep showing up. In liberty and truth, The RMV Team | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK In the end, Governor Jared Polis didn’t make a speech. He didn’t stand before cameras or take questions. He didn’t even put the signing on his public calendar. All four City Council seats up for election in Grand Junction this April have been claimed by candidates promising a new direction for the city. While official results won’t be certified until later this month, the margins are clear—and the message from voters, even clearer. When Colorado lawmakers debated Senate Bill 25-063—titled the “Freedom to Read Act”—most eyes focused on the usual battle lines: controversial books, age appropriateness and the role of librarians. But tucked inside the bill is something less publicized—and more dangerous to parents who dare to speak up. | LEGISLATIVE SESSION A bill making its way through the Colorado legislature—HB 25-1169, the “Faith and Education Land Use” bill—is under growing scrutiny from local officials, school communities, and everyday Coloradans who see it as a sweeping override of local zoning authority. “If you don’t speak up now, it may be too late.” That’s the message from a growing coalition of Colorado pastors urging fellow faith leaders to take a public stand against HB25-1312 — a bill they say undermines parental rights, criminalizes biblical truth and puts families at risk. Colorado state House legislators on Wednesday debated and advanced a $44 billion spending plan for the next fiscal year. They also approved 63 “orbital” bills designed to change state law in order to balance the state budget. Colorado lawmakers have quietly moved to shift the state’s school immunization requirements away from the recommendations of a prominent federal committee, in response to Robert F. Kennedy Jr. taking over the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services. Several Colorado lawmakers are trying to create new protections for the state’s immigrants against hardline deportation policies under the Trump administration. | STATE It’s one of the more ubiquitous storytelling styles in legacy corporate media — anniversary time pegs. In editorial meetings, reporters and editors look at a calendar, see what historic newsy event(s) are upcoming that originally occurred 5, 10, 25 years ago, and put into proper historical perspective said event on the respective anniversary. In rural Colorado, the fight over wolves isn’t just about wildlife—it’s about life and livelihoods. On Tuesday, a bill sponsored by Reps. Lauren Boebert and Tom Tiffany passed a key House committee, aiming to take gray wolves off the Endangered Species List and block federal courts from reversing the move. Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold announced Monday that she is seeking the Democratic nomination for attorney general in next year’s election, promising to “stand up to Donald Trump to protect our rights and freedoms.” | NATIONAL President Trump announced on Thursday that he would be withholding federal funding to sanctuary cities, referring to them as a national disgrace. The move would impact Democratic-run cities across the nation, including Seattle, Chicago, Denver, Boston, New York, Los Angeles, and others. U.S. consumer prices fell in March, pushed down by a decline in the price of goods and defying predictions that President Trump’s tariff plans would push up prices. This was the first drop in consumer prices in nearly three years and only the second decline since inflation accelerated under Joe Biden to the worst rates in decades. The Supreme Court is allowing the Trump administration to move forward with its plans to fire thousands of probationary federal employees, overturning a lower court order preventing the terminations. | LOCAL The Cherry Creek Republican Women (CCRW) held their general meeting and luncheon on April 8 in Centennial. Attendees heard from Elizabeth School District Superintendent Dan Snowberger and Centennial Mayor Stephanie Piko, who each addressed pressing issues facing schools and cities across Colorado. A crew of “highly sophisticated” Colombian nationals has been arrested in Aurora, Colorado, after allegedly targeting and burglarizing nearly two dozen homes, authorities revealed. A federal judge ruled on Thursday that Denver Water is permanently barred from expanding the reservoir if an emergency stay is not obtained from the 10th Circuit Court of Appeals within 14 days. | COMMENTARY At the start of our devotional journey this year, we uncovered God’s armor (Ephesians 6:10-18) and explored the Helmet of Salvation—our foundational assurance in Christ. On April 6, 2025 the Colorado House of Representatives crossed a line – a Rubicon, as it were – into territory so profane, so fundamentally corrosive to the bedrock of human society, that it demands not just opposition but a thunderous rebuke. Confidence in experience is never misplaced, least of all in the arena of energy policy. Chris Wright, Secretary of Energy under President Trump, spoke frankly at a recent luncheon hosted by Colorado’s Ladies 4 Liberty. So I’m asking: Will you be one of the 3,041 supporters I need to step up in these final 24 hours? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105816869/539482484/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250414_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2IyMDZiOS00ZDE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cq063trnWdJhEt1w1BdwilRr4obxfxyohdcWGRsPalk=) I’m so thankful for your help. We will never sell out working people, families and seniors to give tax handouts to the ultra-wealthy and big corporations. We must band together and hold House Republicans accountable for any instance of overreach and corruption. Especially when their massive scheme includes tax breaks for billionaires, abolishing the Department of Education and throwing children with disabilities out of the classroom. body:
They’re about to unleash a brand new wave of political attacks the likes of which we’ve NEVER seen before.

| |
---
| | | - 170+ lawsuits
- 50+ injunctions
- An anti-Trump taskforce
- Impeachment threats

- _And now ..._

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zesrb66k0ouodbq8g70qa72esjnflhk6u6ahr2og_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdhmcpb4clh2bs)
---
Their plan is simple:

** 1.** Launch the DNC War Room
** 2.** Dominate the Fake News Media
** 3.** Sway on-the-fence voters in key battleground districts
** 4.** Retake the House Majority
** 5.** Establish a COMPLETE LIBERAL BLOCKADE of Trump's agenda

We, the People, elected our President to do exactly what he's doing.

But the Democrats won't have it - they're about to unleash a brand new wave of political attacks the likes of which we've NEVER seen before. And with their billionaire backers, it's getting harder for us to fight back...

_If we can 't strike back with everything we've got, the odds of saving our House Majority in the Midterms will absolutely NOSEDIVE!_

We're out of time and out of options.

**The Democrat Machine is mobilizing FASTER and EARLIER than ever. So we either fight back TODAY or not at all.** The size and strength of our grassroots movement is our ONLY HOPE to fight back.

_**[Can we count on you to help?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdlqd283s2cct76aeps7oo6gh75tn461gh4mq3vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdhmcpb4clh2bs "Can we count on you to help?")**_

We know it's intimidating to go toe-to-toe with the full force of the Democrat Machine.

It takes guts. But that's what makes loyal American Patriots with the courage to stand up for what's right - like YOU - so much more important!

It'll take massive numbers if we want to come out on top.

**So we're asking you to make a choice right here and right now ... _[Will you help us fight back?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhigm73m0f8qk74anjvkiukmprvf9thcc3kr6230_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cdhmcpb4clh2bs "Will you help us fight back?")_**

If Elon Musk buys MSNBC, he could build a right-wing media monopoly – **giving him control of both the federal government and the media.**

We think an unelected billionaire shouldn’t have this much power in a democracy, but we need to hear from top Democrats like you:

---

Last night felt like an out-of-body experience.
It was the greatest honor to introduce AOC, who inspired my own run for office, challenged the establishment, spoke truth to power and WON.
Caroline Gleich ⛰️ is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..dWGqIR6pC5DbQK4-pyMe4z8iD0Z-e1Hefrxg4YFhVEY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161314249)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7ea9f03f-6d2f-4fc7-94a7-638e7feea704?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I will cherish this selfie forever.
Standing on stage at the University of Utah's packed Huntsman Center, I was flooded with the same feeling I get skiing a big, committing line. The kind where everything flows. The snow is perfect. The stakes are high. You drop in, and the earth feels good beneath your feet. Your body keeps up with your mind. You're in the zone.
That's what it felt like giving this speech.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1d1b57cf-4dd6-4051-9d76-3bb5d710a711?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by Cade Robertson
The energy in the arena was electric. The cheers were deafening--at points, I could barely talk over the crowd. People tuned in to the virtual livestream from all over the world: Canada, France, Australia, Belgium. And in that moment, I felt something shift.
**Utah is rising.**
And the people in power here? They feel it. They see the change coming--and they're nervous. Because this isn't politics as usual. This is a movement rooted in dignity, democracy, and people-powered action.
Last year, I ran for U.S. Senate--not because it was easy, but because I saw our state and our country sliding backward. Our leaders banning books and Pride flags while hate symbols go unchecked. Silencing voters through rigged maps. Policing bathrooms while letting polluters poison our air. Selling off our public lands.
That's not democracy. That's authoritarianism in disguise.
Like so many Utahns, I've known the fear of losing my job if I get injured or decide to become a parent. That's not freedom. That's not the American Dream.
**The real American Dream is simple** : If you work hard, you should be able to breathe clean air, see a doctor, afford a home, and retire with dignity. But that dream is being stolen by billionaires and extremists who treat our lives like line items on a balance sheet.
That's why I said it loud--and the crowd roared it back even louder:
**OUR PUBLIC LANDS ARE NOT FOR SALE.**
**OUR DEMOCRACY IS NOT FOR SALE.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f1570b57-091e-49ca-a5e8-e7483343e280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by Cade Robertson
This isn't red vs. blue. It's the people vs. power. The many vs. the greedy few.
And here's the truth: **we** are the power.
We can balance the budget without gutting Medicare, Medicaid, or Social Security--by making billionaires finally pay their fair share. We can get big money out of politics. We can send a message to every corrupt politician:
**If you sell us out, we will vote you out.**
Now is our moment. To run for office. Donate. Volunteer. And together, we'll reclaim the American Dream--not the billionaire version, but the people's version: a future worthy of our children and our planet.
And after the rally, I got to meet Bernie.
I told him I'd run for U.S. Senate last cycle and that I wished I was working alongside him in Washington. He looked me in the eye and said:
**" It took me four tries to win."**
Then he smiled and told me:
**" Keep going."**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dfc15053-17b9-45ce-af27-1da491c6226c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by Joey Sackett
So I will. Because this fight--for public lands, for clean air and good jobs, for democracy--isn't over. And if last night showed me anything, it's that the people of Utah are ready. **We 're rising.

**And I want to say thank you--**to Senator Bernie Sanders and Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez** --for coming to Utah. For standing with us. For believing that the people here are worth fighting for.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7cd5aa03-4a35-49bb-94b8-b9b52988d8cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by Joey Sackett
* * *

* [KSL: Bernie Sanders' Fighting Oligarchy Tour](https://substack.com/redirect/58b7b07e-7a93-42c3-8cd3-2178dc7fb427?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Salt Lake Tribune Recap](https://substack.com/redirect/34fc9bd6-67a6-48a0-a765-41a263f56750?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [ABC4 Utah Rally Coverage](https://substack.com/redirect/ccb18cfa-dc8b-4d4a-b392-160a385235d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Fox13: Sanders & AOC Speak to Sold-Out Crowd](https://substack.com/redirect/7dd7b077-8bc4-407a-b502-e817afff5818?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Inside Utah Politics Interview](https://substack.com/redirect/56ef8774-d356-4d76-b6a0-6dcb680eb0d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
## **Call to Action:**
* **Get involved with[local climate,](https://substack.com/redirect/e7ec0cae-1a7e-4003-be62-1bbcaaeaa057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) democracy, and workers' rights orgs**
* **Support grassroots candidates**
* **Join us[April 19 at the Utah State Capitol](https://substack.com/redirect/fe5f342f-b5f5-4ed0-8ef9-55303b124c53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for a major protest to defend democracy, protect public lands and working people. **
