Folks, it’s the team behind Jay Jones’ campaign for Virginia Attorney General.

With Donald Trump and his far-right allies attacking our freedoms and DOGE’s illegal budget cuts and layoffs impacting Virginians’ jobs, we need strong leaders who will stand up for Virginians against any threats.

But our current Attorney General, Jason Miyares, is a MAGA hardliner who is backing Trump’s dangerous policies at the expense of everyday Virginians. He has refused to take a stand against Elon Musk and DOGE, even as they risked Virginians’ privacy and personal data and slashed resources Virginians depend on.

We love Virginia, so we can’t stand by while Jason Miyares lets Donald Trump and DOGE walk all over our great state!

We’ve set a mid-month goal to raise $10,000 by midnight on April 16 so we can ramp up our efforts to elect Jay Jones. Can you chip in $5 or more today so we can bank the resources we’ll need to win our tough race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=5]

DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=5]

DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other]

Folks, Jay has a long history of fighting for what Virginians need.

As a state delegate, he led the charge to expand Medicaid, increase the minimum wage, and raise teacher pay to make the Commonwealth a better place for its people. As Attorney General, Jay will continue making Virginians – not Donald Trump – his priority.

But we need a strong group of grassroots supporters on our side to defeat Jason Miyares. So please chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to help us hit our $10,000 mid-month goal ASAP. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=5]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Our town hall in Tucson
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I’m going to do my part — in the Senate, in Arizona, and around the country — to stop Trump’s agenda and put real checks on his power. But I can’t do that alone. I need you.
#

Hey — Mark here. I’ll keep this brief because I know you’re busy.
My wife Gabby, Cory Booker, Greg Stanton, and I had a town hall in a Republican-held district in Tucson last night. I can tell you one thing for sure: **People are angry** — and for good reason.
But there’s another part of that, and it’s what gives me hope right now: **People are showing up.** They see what’s happening, they don’t like it, and they want to do something about it.
I’m going to do my part — in the Senate, in Arizona, and around the country — to stop Trump’s agenda and put real checks on his power. But I can’t do that alone. I need you.
I’ve always been fortunate to have a big team behind me, and I need that team again now.
[**Please, if you can, I’m humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign. Anything helps, and it adds up fast.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250414-1-500&t=1&akid=6042%2E6688874%2EoLB5uz)

clean_body: I’m going to do my part — in the Senate, in Arizona, and around the country — to stop Trump’s agenda and put real checks on his power. But I can’t do that alone. I need you. Hey — Mark here. I’ll keep this brief because I know you’re busy. My wife Gabby, Cory Booker, Greg Stanton, and I had a town hall in a Republican-held district in Tucson last night. I can tell you one thing for sure: People are angry — and for good reason. But there’s another part of that, and it’s what gives me hope right now: People are showing up. They see what’s happening, they don’t like it, and they want to do something about it. I’m going to do my part — in the Senate, in Arizona, and around the country — to stop Trump’s agenda and put real checks on his power. But I can’t do that alone. I need you. I’ve always been fortunate to have a big team behind me, and I need that team again now. Our team wouldn't be bugging you so much about the unless it was critically important to our country's future. Senate Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to support President Trump's agenda and Make America Great Again, but without your cooperation, it could be all for naught. If you don't act NOW, we may have to remove you from our Republican voter database. That means you won't be counted in critical polling, and the Democrats will gain the upper hand. You can kiss it goodbye, Peter.

We took a **HUGE** blow. Despite conservatives' best efforts and a strong fight, a _RADICAL_ Leftist won in Wisconsin's Supreme Court race. This isn't a loss that we can just brush off and move on from. **If we don 't fight back NOW, _we _will_ lose the House Majority for years to come._**

_This new liberal Justice will redraw the map to turn the district I represent into the BLUEST district in the nation._ **This is how the Left will overturn President Trump 's House Majority, Peter.**

I'm a retired Navy SEAL, so I won't back down from a fight. I know we can win no matter how these Leftists gerrymander the map. _But the only way that 's going to happen is if we stand together as a Team!_

I served our country for over twenty-five years. I defended you, your family, and your friends from extremists and terrorists across the globe. Despite conservatives' best efforts and a strong fight, a RADICAL Leftist won in Wisconsin's Supreme Court race. This isn't a loss that we can just brush off and move on from. If we don 't fight back NOW, we will lose the House Majority for years to come. This new liberal Justice will redraw the map to turn the district I represent into the BLUEST district in the nation. This is how the Left will overturn President Trump 's House Majority, Peter. I'm a retired Navy SEAL, so I won't back down from a fight. I know we can win no matter how these Leftists gerrymander the map. But the only way that 's going to happen is if we stand together as a Team! I served our country for over twenty-five years. I defended you, your family, and your friends from extremists and terrorists across the globe. I've never asked to be thanked and I'm not starting now, but I am asking you to step up and do your part now if you never served. "Send in anything you can to stand with me and my Team to defend this seat and President Trump’s House Majority from the radical Left >>" | | | "STAND AND DEFEND OUR NATION >>" | | "SEND IN ANYTHING YOU CAN RIGHT NOW >>" If you didn't pick up a rifle to defend your fellow countryman in battle, I get it. If you never stood shoulder-to-shoulder with your brothers and put your life on the line for this nation, I get it. If you never fought alongside souls who paid the ultimate price for our freedom, I get it. I get it; not everyone is able to serve and not everyone feels the same call of duty. But right now, we risk losing all of the progress we 've made to the Left's gerrymandering ploy. "I’m counting on you to join me in this fight today, Friend. _The Voter Protection Project_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. body:
It’s from the heart| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6OeKZN8I_dkJAJGo_CAfbDTGO19-tworawINPKc1-a5hwSjtCl38mJ_xO2hSoc8XMg6Wxn0IP07rw9lFWc88vWlGqcrfTDcg3XDfX8DCUDu2XcKsJifIYP04mUAggglgpeCLKqlkh-qTJrnN62GxgSd7gMJxrjzoBdbZXrPeEvtzk)

Friend, The worst lies are the lies we tell ourselves.

It’s time we stop lying to ourselves about the radical left!

It’s Mike Rogers. I spent years as an FBI special Agent, coming face to face with some of the most corrupt and dangerous human traffickers, mobsters, and politicians.

I saw the dirtiest, most disgusting side of politics.

But I’ve never seen something like the far left’s total war on President Trump.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6ObD1D9WNVnIpC08cDbKIDL9IqH6gcQ9H7LgvKf9C16hO84RWeIaQLzlkXmdjUguYdKlUheQuOJt0E7MvChOi9dCeF2QZ3bhL2v6BcTp1kHs3JYwuAK7tdPYak1q43gp3n3ImW_r7ephMQNCs74sRWHBmZVRpEBvgUt80eHKUFs-N)
---
[**Here's the thing: Their dirty tactics didn’t work on him. And they won’t scare me off either. I didn’t fear corruption when I was in the FBI, and I sure as hell don’t fear it now. **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6OR9O-nDoMeBtZkiBhCAH_TMbibhLuaNWi1ItvBwft8mEYRqTZ2I70yjJXMws-YDds3clzqQoQDTPHBnR162nEqjHR22nj8NMfZrFp0wLID05kZ7KgDwaoqfO8USNZEjlOzVERFDP0246NeQFGc8GRLGqQcQA1LFC_nWfPz-mQpT1)

[**Last year, my Senate campaign in Michigan was a top target of the Democrat Machine’s massive war chest. They attacked me. They attacked my values. They even attacked my family!**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6OTCejx-_9yrINTl0Bh1b9aY_ujPV-eI-lwJXDVIvI8HyZng04LZ744h2RErYhyWb61MgqVWybKrrq4fGxdp_WRN8ConE7LhxiKpzuXpIHCRpVpRooNlarQ1lYWmBPi-Uv2yxUqp975O293UAVYKwCpp-hJ4K1a_hHfv5WCx_BQi-)

_**[_**The biggest thing I learned through it all is that the American people are WAKING UP!**_](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6OdfUKVD0UrE0zRfg1z7zfFVdk3EtMN_OmmEDNcyB8GCZ4DVeXGs9NhdCGBYQGSj7mH84DmYQ53QHAC3-elmvLQeDJMQjs1-DzFzgkLqIsL5LO8KxyBgIpDRwUTp1zjtnI_6OwHLWPWTvRXUIYdDNQtKehSkuTwQEQgW892bkvlMv)**_ You see, the radical left is in desperation mode.

They won’t stop until they get what they want...They’ve been foaming at the mouth to impeach President Trump from day 1!

But they’re coming to realize patriots like you and I won’t stand for their corrupt deranged LIES!

**[Now I’m prepared to step back into the arena to go to battle for President Trump’s agenda. My race will be the closest Senate race on the map in 2026. ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6OQR3-qWg8iJtFawmcJxFXGZUpyklDDJrk6LP-wPA_EhfK7CJV9dYJSHoxYm0HOFXEAB5m0VDa5bdoJxMyTMMRhEEfgR6K1C12CYIHB3lYakCP7ifmD0q3kK5wpiDDW5rQ4vimjRXQrZcGqZLLLZ7OGOg3cflbBVNp82IDYYSOfCY)**

No attack against me or my family, no lies about my character, and no insults about me or my support for President Trump will ever make me give up my fight.

__**[That’s why today, I’m back humbly asking that you be one of my very first endorsements!](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6OUqJAIczxOWd1uCTbZbIxyogfnYfgFG9_2Vr1Ik1sdCHOdZX8xnAF7Fp-6vozRetyA-Y-K3VWeT1Fc2oBL6REqE2u-ZTkbjrgbqcBqZrXtbw54R8Qsj3D-mZFxqtlPB7-i2Tm6eteOtIZDd0TgU0Jl88XLoGV6fRpM1PCzXuBIRJ)**__
---
[**Be one of the FIRST to endorse Mike now!**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6Oc6a1zpXSDQhj3TG0Zs60NyF1NoyFv8sT5coRK5OoZbuc6xCZXVvXh-WxWcwJRmcTyCjt3xB5KoMjjK8E3yK5BoYcsNNEZAnoF5y0rNEs4SeTVdHDdi7laHR_6gU0KqH_U1B74AM_rZguv3JM8Z2FWvGIw7kYShvmJNHzfgcma5_)
---
The leftist lunatics will go to dangerous lengths to silence the people that want to take America from their corrupt control. It’s why they came after President Trump. It’s also why they continue to do everything in their power to block his executive powers and it’s exactly why they hope you won’t stand behind me!

I’m prepared to stand with President Trump and to deliver on the MAGA mandate. But I need your help.

**[**So today, before you do anything else, can you take one minute of your day to endorse my new campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan by chipping in $50, $25, $15, or even just $10 today? **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6OWg7RbUVq0zuIkhlL-KAiD_p_h--cipXtCzrDog3N_ni1lviTDjNOBlxr0RM4bdLpHV4ZyJuPWGMEub9OkqAv4uyIFZv3bdvGeTSIEjmnEj9PquCucV8i6o7JEs6yhK2bdV64yizUzSe0KP3UVyJlyRwhNUglM8Nl3JDbQMmcSaz)**

[**ENDORSE MIKE ROGERS**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6132830a5a51473894f8550ddf00068c&_e=1VhXVSy6TFuPAdOrU-9cWLWmDCcMBu7GeI5D58MEauVXWL-KCIdtlP_1kFr2Kl5ZtXO1tM3UD7FjyBofvJ1K7lKETmkyOFrt9n137HOPSgIoNBtFm35rPU-8xlpImPDmk2-Ya36QCRuy3BuP5PF4437OrxWGQKXFiC8-ReBmlz5gnc4JJROdwytNl78o1PRMSibIYwAPCL-Wx5l9Q7RfiN0NxDTHTpkI2CI9vAeKwc5ET4j_xYCChtDNRjxIwkKprOUQDXZ8YuzqFDO3caC8oSAl4W6WNtK_pE2T0XXUj6yT6sq0ESxMtZXnjpGPaAjJfq8gt3LuLxyaA-peV6r6Odjnp6hvjPXgg8qj-9145nE2oKOlO4a0XFOi3qEgnGkgjodthGMhAQfjUywBZ3lwrO0BZo8P2xX8MzK9qh-6XpZvYY_iOreKcyOexLNQzWRwHcCGzFcduROTaFaViUQngF8XBmTESJVFtY4F5qZUFWUReMRrlM3C6-FoViH0PBKC)

Mike Rogers

I spent years as an FBI special Agent, coming face to face with some of the most corrupt and dangerous human traffickers, mobsters, and politicians. I saw the dirtiest, most disgusting side of politics. But I’ve never seen something like the far left’s total war on President Trump. - You see, the radical left is in desperation mode. They won’t stop until they get what they want...They’ve been foaming at the mouth to impeach President Trump from day 1! But they’re coming to realize patriots like you and I won’t stand for their corrupt deranged LIES! No attack against me or my family, no lies about my character, and no insults about me or my support for President Trump will ever make me give up my fight. The leftist lunatics will go to dangerous lengths to silence the people that want to take America from their corrupt control. It’s why they came after President Trump. It’s also why they continue to do everything in their power to block his executive powers and it’s exactly why they hope you won’t stand behind me! I’m prepared to stand with President Trump and to deliver on the MAGA mandate. But I need your help. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Mike Rogers | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Trump isn't being tough on China, he's being tough on St. Louisans.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Trump isn't a king, and St. Louisans shouldn't be collateral. Peter —

Donald Trump is playing economic roulette — **and Missouri’s working families are stuck holding the bag.**

Just this week, he doubled down on his plan to jack up tariffs on goods from China — and we’re not talking small increases. We’re talking 100% hikes on imports that everyday folks rely on.

That’s not tough on China. _That’s tough on Missouri._

We’ve been through this before: Families paying more every time they check out at the grocery store or replace a broken appliance, local manufacturers pushed to the brink, and small businesses stretched so thin that they're forced to close their doors permanently.

But I'm fighting for a different kind of leadership — one that doesn’t treat working people like political collateral and extremists like kings. But with our mid-month fundraising deadline just around the corner, we need to show we have the grassroots power to fight back.

[**If you’re fired up to stop Trump’s economic chaos before it starts — chip in now to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal. Peter, Donald Trump caused global chaos when he announced sweeping tariffs earlier this month. The stock market plummeted, and hardworking American people were left to worry about how they would afford _even higher_ prices on everyday items like eggs and coffee. I heard from constituents in my district who had lost tens of thousands of dollars from their retirement accounts. The economic anxiety so many of us faced was crippling. Then, on a whim, he announced a 90-day pause on many of these tariffs. And it’s quite literally illegal. = The last couple of weeks confirm one thing for certain: Donald Trump’s only agenda in the White House is to enrich himself and his ultra-wealthy friends. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

| | What could be more magical than sleeping under the stars in the majestic Grand Canyon? This experience includes a 3-night stay at Clear Sky Resort Grand Canyon in a Sky Dome for 2. Enjoy stargazing with telescopes, nightly s’mores and live music! Just 20 minutes from the south entrance to Grand Canyon Park, you’ll experience epic stargazing and witness spectacular sunrises and sunsets. Enjoy a stay in a Grand Canyon Sky Dome with a queen bed, large panoramic view window, A/C, a modern private bathroom with luxurious rain shower, and wifi. It’s an authentic glamping experience offering stunningly beautiful views of the Grand Canyon. Don’t miss your chance to win this once in a lifetime experience!
---

**About OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment** For over 25 years this event has brought together hundreds of OLCV supporters, colleagues, environmental advocates, sustainable business leaders, and elected officials for one unforgettable night. Featuring inspiring speakers, dinner and drinks, auction and paddle raise, and great company – all to benefit OLCV’s important work protecting our climate and environment. **For more information and to purchase tickets,[click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105821000/539497044/-1181493100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3NTFhYmZmLTU4MTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ypXp81wqiSW17woeI1zdvdqYMEB9J0ZeFDcRQiexCnw=&emci=c6e63ef3-ae18-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2751abff-5819-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230).** For questions about the raffle or OLCV’s Annual Celebration [email](mailto:april@olcv.org "april@olcv.org") OLCV Development Director April Christenson. name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List
subject: Senate Republicans are selling out to their billionaire backers
body:
Join the fight against corruption, Peter >> |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105821151/539497630/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE430_20250414_CuttingTaxes_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055948&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFhOTNjMi01ODE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK7D9jaXxhgip3ele1eOI2jxTrmX0br47sO392-Ekfw=) Peter,

U.S. Senate Republicans are so determined to cut taxes for the rich that they're willing to pay for it by slashing essential services and safety net programs, like Medicaid and food assistance.

_And they've even admitted that they're willing to break Senate rules to do so. Here's how:_

Following typical budget rules, if Senate Republicans wanted to cut taxes by more than $5 trillion over the next decade, they would have to find long-term spending cuts that cover the cost of that plan. So to get around that rule, they asked the Senate Budget Committee — chaired by Republican Lindsey Graham — to **provide a false estimate** claiming that their tax cuts will only cost $1.5 trillion. This is blatant corruption, Peter.

[**Senate Republicans are breaking longstanding rules and norms because they want to please their billionaire backers, and the American people deserve better. Donate now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who can take back power from the GOP:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105821152/539497631/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE430_20250414_CuttingTaxes_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055948&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFhOTNjMi01ODE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK7D9jaXxhgip3ele1eOI2jxTrmX0br47sO392-Ekfw=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105821153/539497632/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE430_20250414_CuttingTaxes_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055948&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFhOTNjMi01ODE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK7D9jaXxhgip3ele1eOI2jxTrmX0br47sO392-Ekfw=)

We can't let them keep getting away with this chaos and corruption. Democrats only need to pick up _four seats_ to flip control of the Senate next year. Let's show Republicans that we won't stand for them selling out to billionaire backers and taking away our essential services.

Democratic pro-choice women will be the key to securing the next U.S. Senate majority, and here at EMILYs List, we're laying the groundwork to make that happen.

[**So please, Peter, join the fight against corruption and help change the face of power by donating to EMILYs List today:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105821154/539497633/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE430_20250414_CuttingTaxes_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055948&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFhOTNjMi01ODE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EK7D9jaXxhgip3ele1eOI2jxTrmX0br47sO392-Ekfw=)

clean_body: Join the fight against corruption, Peter >> | = Peter, U.S. Senate Republicans are so determined to cut taxes for the rich that they're willing to pay for it by slashing essential services and safety net programs, like Medicaid and food assistance. And they've even admitted that they're willing to break Senate rules to do so. Here's how: Following typical budget rules, if Senate Republicans wanted to cut taxes by more than $5 trillion over the next decade, they would have to find long-term spending cuts that cover the cost of that plan. So to get around that rule, they asked the Senate Budget Committee — chaired by Republican Lindsey Graham — to provide a false estimate claiming that their tax cuts will only cost $1.5 trillion. This is blatant corruption, Peter. = | = We can't let them keep getting away with this chaos and corruption. Democrats only need to pick up four seats to flip control of the Senate next year. Let's show Republicans that we won't stand for them selling out to billionaire backers and taking away our essential services. Democratic pro-choice women will be the key to securing the next U.S. Senate majority, and here at EMILYs List, we're laying the groundwork to make that happen. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Senator Dick Anderson
subject: April Showers and Capital Construction
body:
Senator Anderson Legislative Newsletter
---
| | | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fcontent.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fbulletins%2F3d9a80b/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/Gg_VbaQmvHHG4zwBbJS0BbAPpg0nxt0l3_GVVknZjf4=400 "View Online")
---|---
---
|
* * *
---
Spring is in the air; the flowers are in bloom and the birds are chirping. Things are getting ever so hectic at the Capitol with the first chamber deadline- this means every bill must have a work session posted. We’ve had a few bills heard on the floor and I’ve spent my weekend on the road travelling to both Warm Springs and La Grande for Joint Ways and Means Community hearings.
In our last newsletter I touched on the budget and how the Joint Ways and Means Committee plays a central role in the state’s budgeting process. This committee has a subcommittee dedicated to capital construction. The Joint Subcommittee on Capital Construction reviews and recommends funding for these projects, ensuring they align with the state’s fiscal priorities and long-term needs.
Capital Construction can be split into two different funds- General Obligation Bonds and Lottery Funds. General Obligation projects typically involve building or significantly upgrading state-owned facilities like schools, courthouses, prisons, infrastructure, or university buildings. Whereas the Lottery Funds are for non-state-owned projects- typically water treatment facilities, fire station upgrades, roads, buildings, or utilities, however any project can apply. It is worth noting that all these Capital Construction requests are funded with lottery funds- not taxpayer money.
Historically, Oregon’s Capital Construction budget has hovered between $500 million and $1 billion per biennium. This biennium there is about $500 million in allotted funds and approximately $1.5 billion in requests from around the state for projects that communities need funded, however these numbers are just estimates. As you can imagine, this makes Capital Construction requests highly competitive, and the likelihood is not every project will be funded.
In our district there were multiple requests, some of those include:
* Lincoln City – Pedestrian crossings and affordable housing apartment complex.
* Yachats- Building and expanding water storage for infrastructure to be able to construct more housing.
* Siletz- Siletz Valley School Restoration project.
* Florence- Infrastructure and utilities to prepare for more affordable housing.
* Lane County- Lane Stabilization Center
* Bay City- Initialization of a sewer lift system
* Coos Bay- Housing Development
* Philomath- Sewer Infrastructure
* Southwestern Oregon Community College- Elevator emergency modernization

There will be one public hearing relating to capital construction requests, which will happen sometime in May. When we know the exact date, I will be sure to send out an update with that information. Capital Construction projects are the last bills to be heard on the floor in June, which means no one will know which capital construction projects from around the state will be approved until those final days of session.
A bill that had its first hearing this week was Senate Bill 5, and unfortunately it did not pass the committee, so it will not move forward to the next step in the process. This bill aimed to ensure that professors at public universities hold a master’s degree in the subject that they are teaching, which aligns with the qualifications required at community colleges. As it stands currently, professors at Oregon’s seven public universities are not required to hold a master’s degree to teach. However, if they do hold a master’s degree, it does not need to be in the subject they are teaching. Oregon’s community college professors are required to hold a master’s degree in their specific discipline to teach. I believe that by raising the standards for college professors at universities to align with those of community colleges, we create a more consistent educational standard across all institutions. We talk a lot about raising the bar and having higher standards for education across the board. It is important that those standards align for educators as well.
While SB 5 did not make it out of committee, Senate Bill 1099, which I am chief sponsor with Senator Starr, did. Senate Bill 1099, which requires cities and counties to allow preschools on church properties, passed on the Senate floor and will now move to the House to possibly become a law. Families with pre-school aged children living in 27 of Oregon’s 36 counties live in what experts have called childcare deserts. This means that there is a significant lack of accessible, affordable, or high-quality childcare options. Childcare deserts can exist in rural areas, where providers are scarce due to low population density, or in urban areas, where high costs and long waitlists make childcare inaccessible for many families. This is a huge deal because it affects parents’ ability to work, kids’ early development, and overall community well-being. Oregon urgently needs more childcare providers at all levels- infants, toddlers, and pre-K. Many churches already offer safe, community-centered environments that are underutilized during the week. This bill leverages those spaces, cutting red tape so kids have a place to learn and grow, while parents can work with a peace of mind. This is a modest step in the childcare crisis, but a crucial one.
As spring unfolds and the legislative session picks up pace, we’re at a pivotal moment where decisions made now will shape our communities for years to come. From the competitive Capital Construction requests to the push for better educational standards with SB 5 and the practical childcare solutions in SB 1099, there’s a lot on the table. I’ll keep you posted as we head toward that public hearing in May and the final floor votes in June- stay tuned for updates on which projects and policies will cross the finish line. In the meantime, I’d love to hear your thoughts on these issues of anything else you’d like me to focus on as your voice at the Capitol!
* * *
---
* * *
---
Group picture day on the Senate floor was a great success.
* * *
---
Joint Ways and Means was on the road again, this time in Warm Springs! What a great turn out and wonderful crowd we had. Thank you to everyone who joined and testified.
* * *
---
Here I am with Paul Shrader at the Children's Advocacy Center of Lincoln City Gala at Chinook Winds Casino.
* * *
---
My office received this wonderful group picture from the Ways and Means Community meeting in Astoria. Here are the committee members alongside local Astoria officials after our tour of the hospital.
* * *
---
* * *
---
[SCR 20](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSCR20/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/hdQwckA7mnJcqUPJr18GzXs0XAXgafpeVguN5a7w3jw=400)\- Recognizes and honors the Oregon Institute of Marine Biology for a century of leadership in marine research and service to the State of Oregon, the United States and all maritime nations.
[SB 433-](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB433/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/jnuwn28_gfVGTUifp8upKkfrervDY86MchMiCUE86eA=400) Changes from $300 to $1000 the threshold value above which a owner of a self-service storage facility must publish a notice of sale for personal property that is subject to a lien for unpaid rent, labor, materials or other services related to storing the personal property.
[SB 564-](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB564/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/pv2Oi4mtFOiMvO9mEzZGZd5dX6fl-n2ynZszlXm6wmo=400) Directs the department of Transportation to widen and add capacity to a portion of U.S. highway 20 between Highway 99 and the city of Philomath.
[SB 565](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB565/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/LUSj7eKqOuwGUsPsNGc3BnXMZbK_V5GgmGUYLFT6L6o=400)\- Requires the State Parks and Recreation Department to study existing, expanding and establishing campgrounds within 25 miles of the Oregon Coast.
[SB 586-](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB586/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/xmVaZKifchBYtnSPOLGPxC2crWIcxAeYcGtl7xHCDn4=400) Allows a landlord to pay a tenant to reduce the time a landlord must give a tenant to move when selling the rented home to a buyer who will move in.
[SB 974](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB974/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/_ed7CfQJOYFAc31y1yO8TZIMi28sohVjxIXdgCfM6NA=400)\- Reduces to 45 days the time under which a city or county must decide a land use application for single-family dwellings.
[SB 1086-](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB1086/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/PBs7AXgOKewqjV722rA0vdOsNJX3BKMqqI58UfRYkcI=400)Requires the Director of the Department of Consumer and Business Services to establish an apprenticeship program for building inspectors.
[SB 1099- ](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB1099/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/2Tkw65QVmmHfuKeOJxA6RHidRdO1QD3DRc0DpHQnosA=400)Requires cities and counties to allow preschools on church properties.
* * *
---
* * *
---
* * *
---
This year individuals in every Oregon county will receive payments as part of the Oregon State Treasury's Unclaimed Property Program: "Checks without Claims." This effort returns unclaimed funds to Oregonians- without requiring any action on their part. Nationally, 1 in 7 people have unclaimed property!
You can learn more about this initiative and check to see if you have unclaimed property at [unclaimed.oregon.gov](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Funclaimed.oregon.gov%2F/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/BZjynb-rXXWuFImnNBDLD0wy54YZ9O3UEgdUP-YOUpM=400)
* * *
---
[Oregon Live:](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.oregonlive.com%2Ftravel%2F2025%2F04%2Fhidden-glass-float-hunters-are-throwing-a-big-party-on-the-oregon-coast.html/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/adjdKCM1HvGkr6i9zIeQ7ZVOizMiMZf1nZtg7eniAok=400) **Hidden glass float hunters are throwing a big party on the Oregon Coast.**
Lincoln City is throwing a Finders Keepers party to celebrate 25 years of handcrafted glass floats and this beloved tradition that is a defining part of Lincoln City.
* * *
---
---
[KPTV:](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.kptv.com%2F2025%2F04%2F08%2Foregon-legislation-speed-up-housing-development-advances%2F/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/4GtPgoxkuzy-XaxQb-tMrRbQJ0O2q4E_RKp7sED3AVA=400) **Oregon Legislation to Speed Up Housing Development Advances.**
Senate Bill 974 advanced through the Senate Committee on Housing and Development.
"In a crisis, everyone must give something- and we all have to step up. Senate Bill 974 sends a clear signal to cities and counties that it's time to get housing moving in every corner of the state, for every Oregonian. "
* * *
---
[Oregon Capital Chronicle](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Foregoncapitalchronicle.com%2F2025%2F04%2F09%2Fin-warm-springs-tribal-members-and-other-central-oregon-residents-share-budget-feedback%2F/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/zsZBLLuh0wyp6syLYot0r6zc1lHdihYGTMAblpCIOY4=400)\- **In Warm Springs, Tribal Members and Other Central Oregon Residents Share Budget Feedback.**
This budget hearing was the first on tribal lands in at least two decades. This Capital Chronicle article summarizes the Joint Ways and Means Community Hearing in Warm Springs.
* * *
---
* * *
---
In 2000 Lincoln City officially launched "Finders Keepers," a year-round tradition that has thrived for 25 years. This year Lincoln City is honoring the 25th anniversary of this tradition.
The **Finders Keepers Festival** will be **Saturday April 26th, 2025** , from **11:00 AM - 3:00 PM** at _Taft Waterfront Park_ \- SW 51st Street, Lincoln City, Oregon.
You can learn more about the event and other 25th anniversary events [here. ](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.explorelincolncity.com%2Fblog%2Fcelebrate-25-years-of-finders-keepers%2F/1/0101019635748607-129c24ff-20ef-4b77-bff8-2d7dffe7b721-000000/0SmVOnmU_x6doEQfEOaePvJTAT1Rz2YZhQr2bsg7n20=400)

clean_body: Senator Anderson Legislative Newsletter | | | "View Online" ---|--- | Spring is in the air; the flowers are in bloom and the birds are chirping. Things are getting ever so hectic at the Capitol with the first chamber deadline- this means every bill must have a work session posted. We’ve had a few bills heard on the floor and I’ve spent my weekend on the road travelling to both Warm Springs and La Grande for Joint Ways and Means Community hearings. In our last newsletter I touched on the budget and how the Joint Ways and Means Committee plays a central role in the state’s budgeting process. This committee has a subcommittee dedicated to capital construction. The Joint Subcommittee on Capital Construction reviews and recommends funding for these projects, ensuring they align with the state’s fiscal priorities and long-term needs. Capital Construction can be split into two different funds- General Obligation Bonds and Lottery Funds. General Obligation projects typically involve building or significantly upgrading state-owned facilities like schools, courthouses, prisons, infrastructure, or university buildings. Whereas the Lottery Funds are for non-state-owned projects- typically water treatment facilities, fire station upgrades, roads, buildings, or utilities, however any project can apply. It is worth noting that all these Capital Construction requests are funded with lottery funds- not taxpayer money. Historically, Oregon’s Capital Construction budget has hovered between $500 million and $1 billion per biennium. This biennium there is about $500 million in allotted funds and approximately $1.5 billion in requests from around the state for projects that communities need funded, however these numbers are just estimates. As you can imagine, this makes Capital Construction requests highly competitive, and the likelihood is not every project will be funded. In our district there were multiple requests, some of those include: Lincoln City – Pedestrian crossings and affordable housing apartment complex. Yachats- Building and expanding water storage for infrastructure to be able to construct more housing. Siletz- Siletz Valley School Restoration project. Florence- Infrastructure and utilities to prepare for more affordable housing. Lane County- Lane Stabilization Center Bay City- Initialization of a sewer lift system Coos Bay- Housing Development Philomath- Sewer Infrastructure Southwestern Oregon Community College- Elevator emergency modernization There will be one public hearing relating to capital construction requests, which will happen sometime in May. When we know the exact date, I will be sure to send out an update with that information. Capital Construction projects are the last bills to be heard on the floor in June, which means no one will know which capital construction projects from around the state will be approved until those final days of session. A bill that had its first hearing this week was Senate Bill 5, and unfortunately it did not pass the committee, so it will not move forward to the next step in the process. This bill aimed to ensure that professors at public universities hold a master’s degree in the subject that they are teaching, which aligns with the qualifications required at community colleges. As it stands currently, professors at Oregon’s seven public universities are not required to hold a master’s degree to teach. However, if they do hold a master’s degree, it does not need to be in the subject they are teaching. Oregon’s community college professors are required to hold a master’s degree in their specific discipline to teach. I believe that by raising the standards for college professors at universities to align with those of community colleges, we create a more consistent educational standard across all institutions. We talk a lot about raising the bar and having higher standards for education across the board. It is important that those standards align for educators as well. While SB 5 did not make it out of committee, Senate Bill 1099, which I am chief sponsor with Senator Starr, did. Senate Bill 1099, which requires cities and counties to allow preschools on church properties, passed on the Senate floor and will now move to the House to possibly become a law. Families with pre-school aged children living in 27 of Oregon’s 36 counties live in what experts have called childcare deserts. This means that there is a significant lack of accessible, affordable, or high-quality childcare options. Childcare deserts can exist in rural areas, where providers are scarce due to low population density, or in urban areas, where high costs and long waitlists make childcare inaccessible for many families. This is a huge deal because it affects parents’ ability to work, kids’ early development, and overall community well-being. Oregon urgently needs more childcare providers at all levels- infants, toddlers, and pre-K. Many churches already offer safe, community-centered environments that are underutilized during the week. This bill leverages those spaces, cutting red tape so kids have a place to learn and grow, while parents can work with a peace of mind. This is a modest step in the childcare crisis, but a crucial one. As spring unfolds and the legislative session picks up pace, we’re at a pivotal moment where decisions made now will shape our communities for years to come. From the competitive Capital Construction requests to the push for better educational standards with SB 5 and the practical childcare solutions in SB 1099, there’s a lot on the table. I’ll keep you posted as we head toward that public hearing in May and the final floor votes in June- stay tuned for updates on which projects and policies will cross the finish line. In the meantime, I’d love to hear your thoughts on these issues of anything else you’d like me to focus on as your voice at the Capitol! Group picture day on the Senate floor was a great success. Joint Ways and Means was on the road again, this time in Warm Springs! What a great turn out and wonderful crowd we had. Thank you to everyone who joined and testified. Here I am with Paul Shrader at the Children's Advocacy Center of Lincoln City Gala at Chinook Winds Casino. My office received this wonderful group picture from the Ways and Means Community meeting in Astoria. Here are the committee members alongside local Astoria officials after our tour of the hospital. \- Recognizes and honors the Oregon Institute of Marine Biology for a century of leadership in marine research and service to the State of Oregon, the United States and all maritime nations. Changes from $300 to $1000 the threshold value above which a owner of a self-service storage facility must publish a notice of sale for personal property that is subject to a lien for unpaid rent, labor, materials or other services related to storing the personal property. Directs the department of Transportation to widen and add capacity to a portion of U.S. highway 20 between Highway 99 and the city of Philomath. \- Requires the State Parks and Recreation Department to study existing, expanding and establishing campgrounds within 25 miles of the Oregon Coast. Allows a landlord to pay a tenant to reduce the time a landlord must give a tenant to move when selling the rented home to a buyer who will move in. \- Reduces to 45 days the time under which a city or county must decide a land use application for single-family dwellings. the Director of the Department of Consumer and Business Services to establish an apprenticeship program for building inspectors. cities and counties to allow preschools on church properties. This year individuals in every Oregon county will receive payments as part of the Oregon State Treasury's Unclaimed Property Program: "Checks without Claims." This effort returns unclaimed funds to Oregonians- without requiring any action on their part. Nationally, 1 in 7 people have unclaimed property! You can learn more about this initiative and check to see if you have unclaimed property at Hidden glass float hunters are throwing a big party on the Oregon Coast. Lincoln City is throwing a Finders Keepers party to celebrate 25 years of handcrafted glass floats and this beloved tradition that is a defining part of Lincoln City. "In a crisis, everyone must give something- and we all have to step up. Senate Bill 974 sends a clear signal to cities and counties that it's time to get housing moving in every corner of the state, for every Oregonian. This Capital Chronicle article summarizes the Joint Ways and Means Community Hearing in Warm Springs. In 2000 Lincoln City officially launched "Finders Keepers," a year-round tradition that has thrived for 25 years. This year Lincoln City is honoring the 25th anniversary of this tradition. The Finders Keepers Festival will be Saturday April 26th, 2025 , from 11:00 AM - 3:00 PM at Taft Waterfront Park \- SW 51st Street, Lincoln City, Oregon. You can learn more about the event and other 25th anniversary events The connection between people and their governmen t is bolstered when the public has substantial opportunity to let their concerns be heard by their elected officials. This is also where you can view committee hearings online. \- This is a wonderful resource with everything you will need to know about how to participate in the Legislative Session. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: None of this is by accident.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Folks are fed up with the dysfunction they are seeing from the Trump administration, and they’re ready to put in the work to reclaim power.
#
Team —
The movement we’re building across America right now is nothing short of incredible.
In city after city, folks are filling up town halls to hold their elected officials accountable.
Young people, people of color, LGQBT+ folks, and working class candidates are running for office.
And Americans are saying enough is enough. Just this month, voters in Wisconsin soundly rejected Elon Musk and Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate in the Supreme Court race and showed that the far-right is no match for real people power.
**Let’s be clear: None of this is by accident.** Folks are fed up with the dysfunction they are seeing from the Trump administration, and they’re ready to put in the work to reclaim power.
They’re speaking out. They’re organizing in their communities. And they’re winning elections.
Now is when the hard work begins.
I started The Long Run to support changemaking candidates across our country. These are candidates who will work to rebuild the middle class, stand up to special interests, and work to ensure everybody has a fair shot at the American Dream.
[**And with your support, The Long Run can help candidates like these retake the House, flip state chambers, and make real, lasting change across the country. name: Team Hayes
subject: Increasing food accessibility
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105821981/539500310/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWIyNDQ3ZC01YTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qh-e7EICqw_Fh0vfaDnHKkYYPd0TWErXBcCLQEekTBA=&emci=b8c11c77-5a19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4eb2447d-5a19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15529135) | Team — The 2018 Farm Bill laid the foundation to expand the Thrifty Food Plan, a program designed to offer a nutritionally adequate diet at a low cost that offers the basis for the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program. Thanks to this work, Congress was able to increase the benefits threshold for the first time _in over a decade_. And while we have made great strides in reducing hunger in the United States, we are far from where we need to be to eradicate this crisis. **[Whether fighting to ensure that our veterans have access to healthy meals or that food-insecure college students do not go hungry, Jahana has always been committed to putting an end to the hunger crisis. body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=E1SQ6hqFnJnFvGg3cUSpY1mJzLowLLE02Bjm0fDIrvx8rZ9q/72V+0EX0hSLieU4s4sPnMMCu4r50IonuyGihevxUh+jueHhfTks/F77+uA=]
New Yorker: The Case for Dumping the Electoral College [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=E1SQ6hqFnJnFvGg3cUSpY1mJzLowLLE02Bjm0fDIrvx8rZ9q/72V+0EX0hSLieU4s4sPnMMCu4r50IonuyGihevxUh+jueHhfTks/F77+uA=]
The Electoral College has been described as “ a loaded pistol pointed at our system of government. ” They warned that it created “a game of Russian roulette” because the way it distorts the will of the people could threaten our democracy.
We've already seen the popular vote loser win the White House five times, including twice in the last twenty years .
And this obtuse system of choosing a national leader led directly to the former President -- one of those five who lost the popular vote (in 2016) but still won the office -- attempting to subvert the will of the people by twisting the Electoral College into a mess and when that didn't work, fomented a literal insurrection with supporters breaking into the Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the election.
Opponents of voting rights have shown they'll bend these rules and go to any length in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=E1SQ6hqFnJnFvGg3cUSpY1mJzLowLLE02Bjm0fDIrvx8rZ9q/72V+0EX0hSLieU4s4sPnMMCu4r50IonuyGihevxUh+jueHhfTks/F77+uA=]

The same anti-democracy forces that stormed the Capitol are back in power. The actions they are already taking are threatening our elections and our fundamental right to vote.
We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California.
We're getting close to ending this once and for all! Put us over the top by supporting our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=E1SQ6hqFnJnFvGg3cUSpY1mJzLowLLE02Bjm0fDIrvx8rZ9q/72V+0EX0hSLieU4s4sPnMMCu4r50IonuyGihevxUh+jueHhfTks/F77+uA=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] New Yorker: The Case for Dumping the Electoral College [=] The Electoral College has been described as “ a loaded pistol pointed at our system of government. ” They warned that it created “a game of Russian roulette” because the way it distorts the will of the people could threaten our democracy. We've already seen the popular vote loser win the White House five times, including twice in the last twenty years . And this obtuse system of choosing a national leader led directly to the former President -- one of those five who lost the popular vote (in 2016) but still won the office -- attempting to subvert the will of the people by twisting the Electoral College into a mess and when that didn't work, fomented a literal insurrection with supporters breaking into the Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the election. Opponents of voting rights have shown they'll bend these rules and go to any length in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [=] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] The same anti-democracy forces that stormed the Capitol are back in power. The actions they are already taking are threatening our elections and our fundamental right to vote. We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California. We're getting close to ending this once and for all! Put us over the top by supporting our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today >> [=] Onward, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. body:
| | | |

| | | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86b17075-ad62-4db4-9c16-4e765cff9b2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| FIRST: Ever since Mikie entered the race for New Jersey governor, she has held a lead in poll after poll. New Jerseyans know Mikie has what it takes to deliver solutions to the issues voters care about most and stand up to Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s attacks on New Jersey families. THEN: A new poll released shows Mikie still has an edge, but that 38% of voters still don’t know who she is and what she stands for. And with the share of voters who remain undecided plummeting from 52% to 23%, we can’t wait to reach out to those voters. NOW: We need to double down on our efforts to elect Mikie as our next governor. The latest poll shows that when New Jerseyans learn more about Mikie, they’re fired up to vote for her. But now with less than two months to go, our mission is to make sure we can introduce Mikie to more of the electorate and get her name out there. [Will you split $10 or more between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us reach undecided voters in all 21 counties in New Jersey? Grassroots support is what has kept Mikie leading this race — and it’s the single most important factor for our success in the next few weeks.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tacbf435a-0912-4aba-9989-e20ad6a66fbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9617f205-49f1-4af2-a424-04e444575214/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter,

We have just taken the first steps to send President Trump his “one big, beautiful bill” that will cut YOUR taxes, address needs in military spending, unleash American energy, secure our border, and more.

But like I said, this was just the first step. There is still much to do if we are going to make this a reality, and Democrats are going to fight us tooth and nail to keep it from happening.

The Left is going to unload their coffers right here, right now with lying attacks on TV, on the radio, on billboards, and with digital ads across social media with 1 singular goal in mind...

... to spread misinformation, rile up their base and independents, and kill this bill that will deliver so much for the American people.

I need your help if we’re going to be able to fight back and set the record straight.

subject: Join Us For Our Time to Ditch Durbin Event

body:
Let's Take Out The Dick Once and For All 🇺🇸

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/goodmanforillinois/join-us-for-our-time-to-ditch-durbin-event?e=94c8429215)

---
| Friends,
I want to invite you our first TIME TO DITCH DURBIN fundraiser. Come on out to have a beer and hear my plans to defeat Dick Durbin, and hear about my vision for the US Senate and helping Illinois. It's also a great opportunity to get to have a beer with a candidate.
Ticket Prices:
[$50](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=62a19aa2e4&e=94c8429215) per person / [$75](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=dffde0664c&e=94c8429215) per couple
[$25](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=c3b964e42e&e=94c8429215) Precinct Committeemen / Veterans
[$20](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=940eac50ea&e=94c8429215) Young Republicans
Sponsorships are available:
[$250](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=65769bb841&e=94c8429215), [$500](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=7ef5ea7dd5&e=94c8429215), [$1,000](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=3c17762fc3&e=94c8429215), [$2,500](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=892b46cc9f&e=94c8429215), [$3,500 ](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=4dbef48ff0&e=94c8429215)
---
[](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=7237ca5735&e=94c8429215)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | _For America,__John Goodman_ _Republican Candidate for US Senate serving Illinois_ P.S. - I ask that you share my emails with all your friends, and follow my socials. Every Precinct Committeeman, Volunteer and Voter is a vital part of my campaign. This campaign is not just about me, it’s about each of you and how we can fix Illinois. Please consider [Volunteering](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=f66ff72fa6&e=94c8429215) for my campaign today, as well.

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: Raised by my Mamaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnaIY-OjaFdp0fjMR-YxA1wjY6CEkWttTpy4KSschrm7QlxjDcKfaVTir6wVF7awcHWIRoiA9rxlhMpcZ5KlUx2rNR9Q9L1G6mAjobIOKKYD-eu7BYMkdEal4ccaK_aNej3nN5onTXlSn-NJt-tqmL-ermlzKM3elb3XLUXyFIN93S2ZTfFdtQbpP48UAgu8QP9VaTW8HGpYHqu4pRj9rLAq2MPu3fcDNe-AFhj7IYSia6l3TG5yDmwWQxAts-w2ag0UWX1cYD0aEPpwDk5czeZDgCeJSCE637bNgL9mCrxrx66rMDKYjB_byfi5XD538CsfL3lztyX64-V0Kri0CuYmxydIWnIsGjvr_DXK8mO6kw%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnaIY-OjaFdp0fjMR-YxA1wjY6CEkWttTpy4KSschrm7QlxjDcKfaVTir6wVF7awcHWIRoiA9rxlhMpcZ5KlUx2rNR9Q9L1G6mAjobIOKKYD-eu7BYMkdEal4ccaK_aNej3nN5onTXlSn-NJt-tqmL-ermlzKM3elb3XLUXyFIN93S2ZTfFdtQbpP48UAgu8QP8cSqkRm_usg0_ljunDJmfyZTInwKpe_BWuwmuftlcpISp5OCi_R5vA4xyhaOCh8Uo_6LXgI8G2pSACVzhBBFFzy5tWjSX5sQeZvnnrZiG-YQimj0xaGIBGsZR4QUoirFkKldS4NvKXxBBo7sxSPFWgHaGFIwe5NIqn3PxnLhCqjg%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnaIY-OjaFdp0fjMR-YxA1wjY6CEkWttTpy4KSschrm7QlxjDcKfaVTir6wVF7awcHWIRoiA9rxlhMpcZ5KlUx2rNR9Q9L1G6mAjobIOKKYD-eu7BYMkdEal4ccaK_aNej3nN5onTXlSn-NJt-tqmL-ermlzKM3elb3XLUXyFIN93S2ZTfFdtQbpP48UAgu8QP9II9T3-OnNpXS8ihnmaAuy8zD9MycnKgjNC9dWXi2kpYROZFIdH8jtLOmWp68oGtiTQBtQPpHjw1JVU2nwh0DMHzzLfHH9hdUw65x3rhw-IScUDyFvyrUWBdYtk13OrlYHP4j8dMIskP1PIxKxP_3GYcNmrYMvdKYjLdPGfoNxyg%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnaIY-OjaFdp0fjMR-YxA1wjY6CEkWttTpy4KSschrm7QlxjDcKfaVTir6wVF7awcHWIRoiA9rxlhMpcZ5KlUx2rNR9Q9L1G6mAjobIOKKYD-eu7BYMkdEal4ccaK_aNej3nN5onTXlSn-NJt-tqmL-ermlzKM3elb3XLUXyFIN93S2ZTfFdtQbpP48UAgu8QP_ajn6ZvuCzu9t0uLPkhro8frPSGjDGNIGCSe6ght_2fgl3PB9eTtniVliiTVLSGQl9xpav78Osq7IBYJtTSlIO6OdKIywVQq2p05HORp_CCWfasfi_hirYJcMwmUo5Vh2508-JvJRf__mYoNsmX7p3K4Lmfs6MTSw-lY0y1T39LQ%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnaIY-OjaFdp0fjMR-YxA1wjY6CEkWttTpy4KSschrm7QlxjDcKfaVTir6wVF7awcHWIRoiA9rxlhMpcZ5KlUx2rNR9Q9L1G6mAjobIOKKYD-eu7BYMkdEal4ccaK_aNej3nN5onTXlSn-NJt-tqmL-ermlzKM3elb3XLUXyFIN93S2ZTfFdtQbpP48UAgu8QP-x47WJT_bdls2nC5ETR9PlmhmCyXX0LOXsmUEBzB5zo2qktsIBE4wedyDj_gp7-_lUBhf8bduCXveGAAE_m3kLGBVRODHcbrLsm38XPJhkJDBiRr4lMSQ1nm6ADZLJz3Dmn923YrIkn7MsWXGZnS2pqjze9lYat6EK85U-6NNFBQ%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnaIY-OjaFdp0fjMR-YxA1wjY6CEkWttTpy4KSschrm7QlxjDcKfaVTir6wVF7awcHWIRoiA9rxlhMpcZ5KlUx2rNR9Q9L1G6mAjobIOKKYD-eu7BYMkdEal4ccaK_aNej3nN5onTXlSn-NJt-tqmL-ermlzKM3elb3XLUXyFIN93S2ZTfFdtQbpP48UAgu8QP_FheCzWpo79QctHJmIk42-kr7mD7Rcm6Qe426QzIhalvqPRDpanx9JLQdgqIbXiAubeLXy6MhdxZ6tOvy3F6gnjfxWfbRkpH-GqLBa3faZanEVFFklhtlXdjZAkcbxtcS9hvryjswF3VMJAYmYRUJRqD2SU8QQxTsYvD5edvVGpQ%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnaIY-OjaFdp0fjMR-YxA1wjY6CEkWttTpy4KSschrm7QlxjDcKfaVTir6wVF7awcHWIRoiA9rxlhMpcZ5KlUx2rNR9Q9L1G6mAjobIOKKYD-eu7BYMkdEal4ccaK_aNej3nN5onTXlSn-NJt-tqmL-ermlzKM3elb3XLUXyFIN93S2ZTfFdtQbpP48UAgu8QP9ajmU9LH7QOSkTfpPD9wECfcm1qFY6ObWU1XG4TjjXNhJ3XseKUgas4L6rJ-MUHfjFg0ehnRTi_FTQWGbsrnpZt0oii2S0tUyRboSoXEwgxuMlRVRkLgszj7WIlYroP8xLP2JpfRwQoot_sfzfjwDT9XfEdhHEV4S0Vc2dTJOTDA%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

| |

---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnYtRzyi63uQZ1gRNLtkCL72O-RLJsFBkeE3r_KHYE5Md_L2pysC-6NbP1YUw2udqkLshBaYTlQr3mi1Gd8bp1zEGRQW0RcpoQlsP5egWhV2vzgIRC_EN-T7VC-NgrfNV_hhKKs4b0tbms104xa_ZWp5jajBHLlW_njsZWOXA_8xiqfVfjdhOdCUT2BCkp7rXT52YVmjIJ_GVNfHKTq8DPamOj7FwOmJ_h-vH4ErE9cgfNKoA5iTtStZ1-CEN9ZfEvpBL149uxxt-QdIySGMoI7lIrBG1r3uXdlKzPqI7XuAGyOJy-eLT0jJol4EZrp9mhvW8t5VQjh1WGXIIHO0xY4X3cIcNCQMe8ORVDyP6tDqZwLZRBbSDa4z6Pb-x5KETyc%3D "First 100 Day Survey")

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cb087fd6e1104958b310e9998fe9c005&_e=v3aHNc1_Z-8GNbK2yf5KsdkZousdD5LsFpphRHhjNnYtRzyi63uQZ1gRNLtkCL72O-RLJsFBkeE3r_KHYE5Md_L2pysC-6NbP1YUw2udqkLshBaYTlQr3mi1Gd8bp1zEGRQW0RcpoQlsP5egWhV2vzgIRC_EN-T7VC-NgrfNV_hhKKs4b0tbms104xa_ZWp5jajBHLlW_njsZWOXA_8xiqfVfjdhOdCUT2BCkp7rXT52YVmjIJ_GVNfHKTq8DPampGTfMG8QTG_hIId8JxOsB3nlIlfPJV-H5geBH6jNKKxM2K6-nInW0hutXr2sz8MdZwrZlYP09r_8v6E0E1dRzRApmzFLggQNgcu9KVA1NBer-xxgdyypZbhtmHWDKQ9FrMOti35fuLFKaidBIh4VwP4gMslmMLQ52B1j92-5C3A%3D "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/OfXBncl6Ue9oOlg137xh98KCq7rBhMELfWI-Na3c7XuYGk66R-XlA_6Wulav-asf7sWQSdCY64zvAAk9bri1lMI1fUM-h6delIli7IQGtQKzYFF22ci22WwjWBeyqz69VvLKRMCOb-hGam-Gouzqfb8A7UbuEbhlBDDEks5DRjc45hPLU9Fh-z_-aahtNTeL_rV4DopJJ5S1p-mZNECzidirI11KYOGme2S8oB4rcQFCc1Y90T3Cs2y7uF0zQ0X6QckecMwT4i9dw45RuoPCXeFysNKLl09Qtr0aBkdTSQ-Jki9q4BS_rtoaEqXp9WZ5ceV4Cgf79zgDrOJwcaCx-HiuTaceqcOkvtHrxs-27yFI_R-FyBFyHD4GSm9WfzMBm2nD6PcjFInvGZJmc27bChg7hljR8dn69-Vg80sdaRCVmmh5OJDqeAaadoQmFXW7m_fctXWWvWvapQIWlj0bCRo3mu9QBYkdF-gJyyj5Ew/bT2eSEGSIl4TeJG7ig3TfGZ2izwqYNqe/8 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/P7digvAz-T9JZa8pXRE2hQ4h68uEk2eueOISvZTCYBHOb8iZaRLKdIysuSmYUs7MdsMBQIYx4taOtCzB5-yPlrUxrw9uDmEQqVwkKOv9syACK2lMvia9XJOkU6_vtpH_G4VLiMHKS0FbMVDtUjwrH8UDMF1cKcWrr7B5IMNX4SoxFUmRDm0AC0hsKSCCOw9DG16Sl-EaAEBOfawSq4fr6T2gkfDOmB0dOjzFMTlF7wm3EqHtl3oDi0EaQsuyx79Yp5vWIuetth3Ob7UuAnyLzM007RDp6HfUP-UfjPS7RUpUShPs3Q3QSXeG3txe2r-__QyFX7dmVXqZl1iiAOdfptcWPMc1cQZjAMN9vjMibKISDIaTgY_FV7ev-UMIX6dlXbgPr3wnMMCCDiKdP_m3xoKLSylPHLZCv6UCFLxFgX-ThruReoy_oZhIODuKMpIWiOVefakGG8ghPMCH7UFkUUB1LEzl0o4dkjlPS_5lUw/5PB0dU3C57VjUGhpV-FaWuerpKAL5p5H/8 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/x0W3yDTZ5qNSq-k0oj7lwLoOZySLgfdp47NlsGINEIAgiUbnjP08jKIeMju284aVfQhpPUBxlfiVTr8aSOIHOui2jzEEUGawt5Pvs6Tagu-ujhUHu4jYK0pZhzK0UI82Fk_Lr8MmwNQU23Cz0m7N0qYUtsPXorZzO_9YtYTFy9TZRdvR-VZLtVG9qUU9J1Keb5uUtGRHExO9YvA3ax6lkrxmh8aDltdhgwjJ0H2VDyDFNMuyLDf8C4NrhV8A5oxxmIGBKzWTbwK2SsDUqzX4j4F7juPsDX6x79vOkE7PJg7NWwJazlv6rQnONTbysK2FtBCktwgljQmBzUk3lIsZjtyn38nL9SHD6f5NOa8XDkebuX7oMv2ugWrdOX22L6c69AQ42dAeEdoLTaI6zUeA8yVKMxjF7mKohNps4jh63f_YuisQeowymf1abekwG4JZHHzupn-ZQMZD76fpdvPpfnRDFfY7aO1IzAxoEbgChg/3J8wlZqI5fwWEczL5uDKFTfAvEmI2ERN/8 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

clean_body: | | | Thank you for opening my email. 99% of people scroll right past — but not you. That means everything to me. I’m Derrick Evans: a husband, father, and rancher from West Virginia. I’m just a working man with a family to raise and bills to pay—not a D.C. insider with a team of lobbyists and lawyers on speed dial. In 2021, my life was flipped upside down. I was thrown into a Biden Regime Gulagfor almost 100 days. Why? Because I peacefully protested on January 6th – standing up for President Trump and the 74 million Americans who voted for him. Biden sent a FBI SWAT TEAM to bustdown my front door. My wife and kids were terrified. Prison was going to be my home now. I wore my cross necklace every day in Biden’s Gulag. It reminded me that I can’t give up on life, give up on my family, or give up on my country. ____________________________________ President Trump OFFICIALLY PARDONED ME on January 20th, 2025. It was an honor to meet him and say thank you for giving me and 1,500 J6 prisoners our freedom back.____________________________________ I will never take my freedom for granted again. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate – something I NEVER imagined doing. Where I’m from in West Virginia, we don’t trust politicians. And for good reason. The D.C. elites have sold us out —shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren’t the only ones feeling this. Hard-working families are gettingCRUSHED in all 50 states. I’m fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. My campaign is 100% powered bypatriots like you. If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —I need you in this fight with me. 99% of Republicans will ignore this message. Even fewer will donate. Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way? $10, $20, or $30 today could change everything. Let’s take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump. THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! Derrick Evans Former Biden Regime PrisonerRepublican for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555 | | |

| | Hi team, We could all use some uplifting updates these days. So let’s catch up with a few candidates you helped elect last year as part of this team — two of them flipped Republican-held seats in Georgia’s General Assembly, one of them held off a GOP challenger by _48 votes_ , and you’ll be glad to see that they’re continuing to fight the good fight. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105825466/539512469/91564639?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250414_f_Endorsements_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBjYzkzYy02MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCovKUXqBJmO3jHEyf9zr6VYABy4sVKgCBsOrG1KQNI=)
