**Rep. Floyd Griffin (H.D. 149)**
A retired Army colonel, Rep. Floyd Griffin now serves in the Georgia House of Representatives. He recently introduced a bill to repeal the state’s school voucher program, which he said has failed to meet the needs of rural and urban students in particular, while it has cut vital resources for public education.
***
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105825467/539512470/91564639?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250414_f_Endorsements_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBjYzkzYy02MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCovKUXqBJmO3jHEyf9zr6VYABy4sVKgCBsOrG1KQNI=)
---
**Rep. Tangie Herring (H.D. 145)**
Rep. Tangie Herring describes herself as a “career classroom teacher, small business owner, and advocate for neighborhood revitalization and affordable housing.” She recently introduced bills to expand Medicaid, invest in clean energy, and increase salaries for school teachers.
***
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105825468/539512471/91564639?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250414_f_Endorsements_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBjYzkzYy02MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCovKUXqBJmO3jHEyf9zr6VYABy4sVKgCBsOrG1KQNI=)
---
**Rep. Mack Jackson (H.D. 128)**
Late last year, while also working to counter a GOP attempt to challenge his election victory, Rep. Mack Jackson co-chaired the House Rural Development Council as they released their 2024 policy recommendations, including on how to help communities recover from Hurricane Helene and increase rural access to health care.
***
We hope you’re proud to see how these leaders are fighting for their constituents. And we hope their work reminds you that — no matter how bleak the political headlines get — there are still strong public servants out there who treat elected office as a solemn opportunity to improve people’s lives.
And we get to have their backs.
We’re proud to have supported Rep. Griffin, Rep. Herring, and Rep. Jackson as part of our investments in last year’s elections. We engaged and turned out voters to help 33 pro-democracy champions defeat anti-voter Republicans in races for the Georgia General Assembly:
* Flipping two GOP-held seats (see above!)
* Holding three vulnerable Democratic seats — one by just 48 votes (see above!)
* Picking up two seats in the State House
* With no losses of Democratic seats in the State Senate

In 2025 and beyond, we’ll continue working to elect voting rights champions to state and local office in Georgia — while helping to advance pro-democracy leadership across the South.
And your support makes it possible. Thank you for everything you do.
The Fair Fight Team

clean_body: We hope their stories make you proud to be on this team and have their backs. | | | Hi team, We could all use some uplifting updates these days. So let’s catch up with a few candidates you helped elect last year as part of this team — two of them flipped Republican-held seats in Georgia’s General Assembly, one of them held off a GOP challenger by 48 votes , and you’ll be glad to see that they’re continuing to fight the good fight. | = Rep. Floyd Griffin (H.D. 149) A retired Army colonel, Rep. Floyd Griffin now serves in the Georgia House of Representatives. He recently introduced a bill to repeal the state’s school voucher program, which he said has failed to meet the needs of rural and urban students in particular, while it has cut vital resources for public education. * = Rep. Tangie Herring (H.D. 145) Rep. Tangie Herring describes herself as a “career classroom teacher, small business owner, and advocate for neighborhood revitalization and affordable housing.” She recently introduced bills to expand Medicaid, invest in clean energy, and increase salaries for school teachers. = Rep. Mack Jackson (H.D. 128) Late last year, while also working to counter a GOP attempt to challenge his election victory, Rep. Mack Jackson co-chaired the House Rural Development Council as they released their 2024 policy recommendations, including on how to help communities recover from Hurricane Helene and increase rural access to health care. We hope you’re proud to see how these leaders are fighting for their constituents. And we hope their work reminds you that — no matter how bleak the political headlines get — there are still strong public servants out there who treat elected office as a solemn opportunity to improve people’s lives. And we get to have their backs. We’re proud to have supported Rep. Griffin, Rep. Herring, and Rep. Jackson as part of our investments in last year’s elections. We engaged and turned out voters to help 33 pro-democracy champions defeat anti-voter Republicans in races for the Georgia General Assembly: Flipping two GOP-held seats (see above!) Holding three vulnerable Democratic seats — one by just 48 votes (see above!) Picking up two seats in the State House With no losses of Democratic seats in the State Senate In 2025 and beyond, we’ll continue working to elect voting rights champions to state and local office in Georgia — while helping to advance pro-democracy leadership across the South. And your support makes it possible. Thank you for everything you do. The Fair Fight Team = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, | | | | Donald Trump has spent his Presidency wreaking havoc on the American people. He and his "Co-President" Elon Musk have GUTTED federal agencies providing crucial benefits, have bullied and slapped crippling tariffs on close allies, and even boisterously refused to follow court orders! We know American leadership like Trump's only leads to uncertainty, chaos and isolation, and the destruction already unleashed onto the government might take DECADES to repair! But we 're not sure how many Americans approve of Trump's leadership three months into his presidency. | | | Looking for your response. \- Fight for Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-federal will be used in End Citizens United Non-federal’s sole discretion and are not being earmarked for use in any particular state or election.

Hi Peter, it’s the Team at Foushee HQ checking in.

Here’s the deal: our mid-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and we’ve set a goal of $5,000 that we can’t reach without your help.

We’re forwarding yesterday’s email from Valerie about the games Donald Trump is playing with our livelihoods. [Give it a read and seriously consider donating to support Valerie today — even just $10 makes a major impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105825630/539513010/164693686?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_041425_MM_180DO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjU1ZjdhYi02MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPClzCKqbYModaq0TQAIuo9T9vZCQxtSdA7e1RmOH5A=)

_Begin Forwarded Message from Valerie Foushee:_ Peter, it’s Valerie –

Donald Trump — **who has filed for chapter 11 bankruptcy six times and left our economy in tatters by the end of his first term** — showed his incompetence once again this week by flip-flopping on his tariffs after it crashed the stock market and threw American consumers and businesses into financial uncertainty.

I’m working with my colleagues in Congress to stop Trump’s horseplay that is jeopardizing our economy and the financial well-being of American families. [Will you chip in any amount to my campaign before our mid-month deadline as we fight back against Trump’s tariffs and keep up the pressure on his administration?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105825631/539513011/164693686?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_041425_MM_180DO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjU1ZjdhYi02MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPClzCKqbYModaq0TQAIuo9T9vZCQxtSdA7e1RmOH5A=) | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105825632/539513012/164693686?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_041425_MM_180DO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjU1ZjdhYi02MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPClzCKqbYModaq0TQAIuo9T9vZCQxtSdA7e1RmOH5A=)

You should also see what he said a few hours before reversing his course on the tariffs and causing the stocks to skyrocket — he said: **“THIS IS A GREAT TIME TO BUY!!!”**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105825633/539513013/164693686?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_041425_MM_180DO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjU1ZjdhYi02MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPClzCKqbYModaq0TQAIuo9T9vZCQxtSdA7e1RmOH5A=)
So it’s clear as day: **Trump is playing games with our wallets and hard-earned money** while he and his billionaire buddies profit off of the financial instability that has paralyzed working families and small businesses.

**It’s time to put an end to this nonsense.** [Will you chip in and join me as we fight back against Trump's tariffs and make sure every American can afford the life they want?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105825634/539513014/164693686?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_041425_MM_180DO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjU1ZjdhYi02MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPClzCKqbYModaq0TQAIuo9T9vZCQxtSdA7e1RmOH5A=)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: This is fascism in practice.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
If they can do this to Kilmar, they can do this to anybody.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1592%2E791427%2EWgsMFR)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4195?t=2&akid=1592%2E791427%2EWgsMFR)
Friend — This is a story about fascism under Donald Trump. I hope you’ll read to the end.
Kilmar Abrego García is a husband and father from Maryland. Last month, he was abducted by ICE despite having legal residency status in the US.
He was given no due process, and like hundreds of others he was accused of being a gang member with no evidence — an accusation that the Trump administration used to justify his illegal deportation to a mega-prison in El Salvador.
Now Kilmar finds himself in a foreign prison where torture, violence, and slave-labor is common, despite committing no crimes and following all the right steps to stay in the US legally.
Last week, the Supreme Court ruled that Kilmar was wrongly deported and that the Trump administration must return him to the US. But the Trump administration is flat out refusing to obey that order and bring Kilmar home.
Friend, I know fascism can sound like a buzzword sometimes. **But this is what fascism is in practice.**
Someone can be snatched up off the streets, given no hearing or chance to prove it was a mistake, sent to a foreign prison, and be refused their return even when it's ordered by a federal court.
**If they can do this to Kilmar, they can do this to anybody.** Today, Trump sat in the Oval Office and admitted he would like to start deporting American citizens to El Salvador as well.
I’m reminded of one of the most famous poems about the rise of the Nazis in Germany:
“First they came for the socialists, and I did not speak out—
Because I was not a socialist.
Then they came for the trade unionists, and I did not speak out—
Because I was not a trade unionist.
Then they came for the Jews, and I did not speak out— Because I was not a Jew.
Then they came for me—and there was no one left to speak for me.”

Well, it’s our responsibility to be the ones to speak out, right here, right now. Because this erosion of due process and the rule of law will affect everyone, regardless of your citizenship or immigration status.
I’m doing everything I can in Congress to hold this administration accountable, but the truth is it’s going to take a massive popular movement of people of all backgrounds coming together to defend our democracy from fascists like Donald Trump.
If you want to be a contributing part of that movement, you can **[use this link**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250414-1-180&t=3&akid=1592%2E791427%2EWgsMFR) or the button below to chip in and power our organizing.
We live in a democracy, not a dictatorship. That means the people get the final say. Americans voted in Trump and the GOP, and they're already getting buyer’s remorse after three months of chaos and authoritarianism.
Let’s keep up the pressure and lay the groundwork for victory against these fascists in 2026 and beyond.
In solidarity with everyone fighting back today,
Ilhan Omar
**[DONATE HERE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250414-1-180&t=4&akid=1592%2E791427%2EWgsMFR)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1592%2E791427%2EWgsMFR)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=1592%2E791427%2EWgsMFR)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=7&akid=1592%2E791427%2EWgsMFR)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1592_791427_WgsMFR&akid=1592%2E791427%2EWgsMFR)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Mark Kelly (via Democrats.org)
subject: Yesterday’s town hall:
body:
---
Derek, Sen. Cory Booker, Rep. Greg Stanton, my wife Gabby Giffords, and I held a town hall yesterday in Arizona’s 6th District, and we heard from a lot of scared, frustrated people. They’re scared because Elon Musk and Donald Trump are tanking the stock market and our economy. They’re worried because Republicans have made it clear that they’re trying to cut hundreds of billions of dollars from Medicaid. In Arizona, that could mean hundreds of thousands or even millions of people lose access to health care. People are frustrated because too many of their Republican representatives won’t even show up to listen to them. That’s why we held yesterday’s town hall — because _everyone_ deserves to be heard, no matter who they cast a ballot for in November. I’m showing up to town halls because I want to hear directly from my constituents. And I think Republicans in Congress should have to hear from theirs, too. But if they won’t show up to a town hall like this, then we have to be so loud they can’t ignore us. [**Democrats are organizing town halls like these all over the country — a chance for all of us to make our voices heard in response to what we’re seeing from Trump and Musk. If work like this is worth a few dollars to you, I’m asking you to pitch in to the DNC to help fund it:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250414_3196_fr&refcode2=3196_22930333_mwH9C7&akid=3196%2E22930333%2EmwH9C7) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250414_3196_fr&refcode2=3196_22930333_mwH9C7&akid=3196%2E22930333%2EmwH9C7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250414_3196_fr&refcode2=3196_22930333_mwH9C7&akid=3196%2E22930333%2EmwH9C7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250414_3196_fr&refcode2=3196_22930333_mwH9C7&akid=3196%2E22930333%2EmwH9C7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250414_3196_fr&refcode2=3196_22930333_mwH9C7&akid=3196%2E22930333%2EmwH9C7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250414_3196_fr&refcode2=3196_22930333_mwH9C7&akid=3196%2E22930333%2EmwH9C7)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250414_3196_fr&refcode2=3196_22930333_mwH9C7&akid=3196%2E22930333%2EmwH9C7)**
---
****
A lot of people are wondering what they can do right now — and here is my number one piece of advice: **Keep showing up, keep doing the work, and don’t give up.** The non-stop bad news can wear you down. But giving up and accepting defeat is exactly what Trump and Elon want. They’ll only succeed if we let them.
Thank you for all you’re doing, and for taking the time to read this message.
Mark
Mark Kelly
U.S. Senator, Arizona
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250414_3196_fr&refcode2=3196_22930333_mwH9C7&akid=3196%2E22930333%2EmwH9C7)
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Add your name to join them and demand the EPA reverse course.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105826061/539514624/1328794144?refcode=ea.2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4OTNmMmY2LTY0MTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r9IMe74_X21f65LHzbn_AaKHwA0RV6yjWAv01O7HKf0=&emci=52aa3bf6-5e19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
🚨 **BREAKING: 180 Democrats in Washington just SLAMMED the EPA administrator in a public letter that condemns their Polluters First agenda.** This is the moment when we need our most engaged grassroots supporters to take a stand. Right here, right now. Let's show the Trump administration just how many of us are ready to fight back. **[There’s no time to waste: Click here to join the resistance and DEMAND the EPA reverse its Polluters First agenda.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105826063/539514626/-1834185628?refcode=ea.2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4OTNmMmY2LTY0MTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r9IMe74_X21f65LHzbn_AaKHwA0RV6yjWAv01O7HKf0=&emci=52aa3bf6-5e19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)** | [**ADD MY NAME →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105826065/539514628/-1834185628?refcode=ea.2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4OTNmMmY2LTY0MTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r9IMe74_X21f65LHzbn_AaKHwA0RV6yjWAv01O7HKf0=&emci=52aa3bf6-5e19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2893f2f6-6419-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
Here’s what happened:
In a scathing public rebuke, lawmakers from both chambers of Congress called out EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin for pushing a Polluters First agenda that protects corporate interests and hurts working families.
Democrats made it clear: **Zeldin’s deregulation and legislative rollbacks will _drive up_ medical bills, _unleash_ toxic air linked to Alzheimer’s, miscarriages, and asthma, and _gut_ a clean energy industry that’s already delivered 400,000 jobs and over $400 billion to our economy.**
Lee Zeldin doesn’t care. Trump doesn’t care. Big Oil sure doesn’t care.
They want to dismantle the EPA because it was built to protect everyday people — not Big Polluters or corporate billionaires.
But we care. And we have people power on our side.

clean_body: Add your name to join them and demand the EPA reverse course. | 🚨 BREAKING: 180 Democrats in Washington just SLAMMED the EPA administrator in a public letter that condemns their Polluters First agenda. This is the moment when we need our most engaged grassroots supporters to take a stand. Right here, right now. Let's show the Trump administration just how many of us are ready to fight back. | Here’s what happened: In a scathing public rebuke, lawmakers from both chambers of Congress called out EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin for pushing a Polluters First agenda that protects corporate interests and hurts working families. Democrats made it clear: Zeldin’s deregulation and legislative rollbacks will drive up medical bills, unleash toxic air linked to Alzheimer’s, miscarriages, and asthma, and gut a clean energy industry that’s already delivered 400,000 jobs and over $400 billion to our economy. Lee Zeldin doesn’t care. Trump doesn’t care. Big Oil sure doesn’t care. They want to dismantle the EPA because it was built to protect everyday people — not Big Polluters or corporate billionaires. But we care. And we have people power on our side. Let’s do this. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for Epstein Client Lists
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records regarding Jeffrey Epstein, including any records on the identities of clients or associates of Epstein (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-01056)).

### [Legal watchdog scores with elimination of 5 million ineligible voters ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73393&L=34946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvNS1taWxsaW9uLWluZWxpZ2libGUtdm90ZXJzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1f5a7ff82073f119c6e8b8a41252f8a05ffd111ddfde8f6ed7d852554081e8f6) Washington Examiner A long-term campaign by a conservative legal watchdog to clean up the nation’s voter rolls has led to the erasure of over five million ineligible names since 2017.

In less than 10 years of legal action targeting sloppy voter lists, Washington-based Judicial Watch has used the National Voter Registration Act Of 1993 and its requirement that states regularly clean their lists to press for the elimination of bad names in nearly a dozen states and localities. ## Idaho AG Hails State Court Ruling on Abortion Rights Restrictions
Idaho has won a major pro-life victory in state court. Judge Jason Scott of Idaho’s 4th Judicial District Court on Friday held that there was no expansive right to an abortion under the state’s constitution while acknowledging the state’s two exemptions to the general ban on the procedure. The ruling follows a separate win last [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/4ZqewOaRSw63xF18Fni3EhRXHljFuWog_OjLHIMSmTcO4wP8yyK9jdXEo1XWwflpuwlI0BK_lkhYceiK0dFM8wn2V3kzGFv-oLNPSVJSafeooB3gTQJmTOUbXBt7Hpi2mOCz_ipQTVz_bGfnHb5uT7372gqhkLEISSJXnWJHrHrz5DFsza6zf14OWweJ2foxQyqg2YuLQhZmcvv1Dl7wmV_2oTSVYQ_EajRxDYAx3pziKmmout5v7aa9RvM-Cf3dcflzms2XfjjRsVvT8LK5TO6OZ6GbEjWeyvsp7V0yLGKPaWtetnjjBnfk7BACZP6NPv6yuOOdfnXGZwxooRXs5pJtBz7hTy6g9R1xSPs/DesTm0_zEdbGQBmunDBPQe-elEjsR9v-/8)

body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Sign: Tell RFK Jr. to STOP spreading misinformation about measles >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc743d89e-9122-4b32-98c6-97ec5608b3da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5343d3d6-5a66-4467-987b-8fda6d0f4e8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | In just four months, the US has already seen more than double the number of measles cases it saw in all of 2024. But instead of working to contain this outbreak, our top Health official, RFK Jr., is downplaying the danger, and fanning the flames of anti-vaccine nonsense. Vaccines were the main reason that measles cases went from widespread to nearly zero by 2000. But RFK Jr. has said the measles vaccine wasn’t “safety tested” (it was) and that the vaccine’s protection “wanes very quickly” (it provides lifelong protection). He said we’re “always going to have measles, no matter what happens” (ignoring the fact that we went from millions of cases to near zero.) RFK Jr. has spent years spreading this nonsense, and many people didn’t vaccinate their children as a result. He needs to stop. [Sign your name: Tell RFK Jr. to STOP spreading misinformation about measles >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T644c7d87-f7b2-4436-8e0f-2cb86ed95206/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| |

We are proud to have played such a crucial role in all of these important elections: this team registered thousands of voters, sent hand-written postcard notes directly to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and countered Elon Musk's millions with our own hard-hitting ads. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxNjg2NjUyMzMyMzQ1MTA1LFwiclwiOjE1MTY4NjY3NTUyMzcwMDY3OX0iLCJzIjoiYmI3ODEwYWNjMjQwMzk1YyJ9)

---
|
Team,

If you haven’t heard of insufferable right-wing college campus “celebrity” **Charlie Kirk** , consider yourself lucky, and we apologize in advance for making you aware of him.

Known for his videos where he _“_ owns _”_ liberal college students in _smarmy_ gotcha “debates” that he posts on the web. Kirk is the poster boy of**Turning Point USA** \- the spearhead of the extreme-right’s efforts to expand their presence on college campuses and convert students to their ideology.

Unfortunately their effort is working. College aged men overwhelmingly voted for Trump in 2020 and that trend is at risk of expanding into 2026 _**unless the left does something about it** :_
---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxNjg2NjUyMzQxNzgyMjkyLFwiclwiOjE1MTY4NjY3NTUyMzcwMDY3OX0iLCJzIjoiMGI5MGQwMDYxY2FhNDNkMSJ9)
---
| National Ground Game PAC’s mission is to organize everywhere, especially in places where the party has either neglected or given up on, and we _cannot_ afford to cede our college campuses to the right.

That’s why in less than two weeks time we’ll be showing up at Texas A&M to train progressive college students on how to organize on their extremely conservative college campus.

Our visit to A&M also coincides with Charlie Kirk’s speaking stop there so we figured why not give him a taste of his own medicine. We are going to **_ambush_** him with progressive Tik-Tok sensation Dean Withers (2.8 million followers) who we are flying in to challenge him in the same way he ambushes unsuspecting liberal students.

The left needs to fight tooth and nail the same way the right fights us but _no one_ is doing this. _No one but us.

__**We are fighting in rural congressional districts, cities where support for dems has taken a nose dive, and even on deep red college campuses.**[National Ground Game is doing the deep canvassing work to take this country back from the clutches of the extreme right - can we count on you to support our work with a donation of whatever you can spare?](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxNjg2NjUyMzQ0OTI4MDIzLFwiclwiOjE1MTY4NjY3NTUyMzcwMDY3OX0iLCJzIjoiYWQ3Y2NiMzRjZDcxNmJmMCJ9)_

clean_body: | | We are proud to have played such a crucial role in all of these important elections: this team registered thousands of voters, sent hand-written postcard notes directly to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and countered Elon Musk's millions with our own hard-hitting ads. | | | | | Team, If you haven’t heard of insufferable right-wing college campus “celebrity” Charlie Kirk , consider yourself lucky, and we apologize in advance for making you aware of him. Known for his videos where he “ owns ” liberal college students in smarmy gotcha “debates” that he posts on the web. Kirk is the poster boy ofTurning Point USA \- the spearhead of the extreme-right’s efforts to expand their presence on college campuses and convert students to their ideology. Unfortunately their effort is working. College aged men overwhelmingly voted for Trump in 2020 and that trend is at risk of expanding into 2026 unless the left does something about it : | | | National Ground Game PAC’s mission is to organize everywhere, especially in places where the party has either neglected or given up on, and we cannot afford to cede our college campuses to the right. That’s why in less than two weeks time we’ll be showing up at Texas A&M to train progressive college students on how to organize on their extremely conservative college campus. Our visit to A&M also coincides with Charlie Kirk’s speaking stop there so we figured why not give him a taste of his own medicine. We are going to ambush him with progressive Tik-Tok sensation Dean Withers (2.8 million followers) who we are flying in to challenge him in the same way he ambushes unsuspecting liberal students. The left needs to fight tooth and nail the same way the right fights us but no one is doing this. No one but us. We are fighting in rural congressional districts, cities where support for dems has taken a nose dive, and even on deep red college campuses. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Let’s get in the mud. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: What my 2025 race means for the 2026 midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
On Election Day this November 2025, I don’t just want to win — I want to win big.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105827021/539517724/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM0MmNhYWYtNjgxOS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Qp_szGQ1HZ-7oDuGumM6LFNQS-8foP63SWGVfPDhcXg=)
---
| Peter,

On Election Day this November 2025, I don’t just want to win — _**I want to win big.**_

Because, as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we’ll send about the 2026 midterms.

People in Virginia and across the country are looking at our race as a bellwether for Democrats. In every zip code and every community, Democrats are understandably frightened and angry about the chaos coming out of Washington. And to them, our race is a beacon of hope. It’s an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation’s history.

And can I be honest for a minute? That’s a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I’m ready to seize the moment and win big. I feel honored that people have put so much hope into our campaign, and it’s a big reason why I’ve worked to stay above the fray and focus on what matters: **winning big and delivering real, meaningful change when we do.**

And I hope that as you read this email, you’ll buy into that vision, too, because there is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going. So let’s win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond.

[_**But we can’t do it without you! Will you contribute to my campaign today to make sure we have what it takes to win big this November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105827022/539517725/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM0MmNhYWYtNjgxOS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Qp_szGQ1HZ-7oDuGumM6LFNQS-8foP63SWGVfPDhcXg=)

name: Team Bennet
subject: The future we’re fighting for starts in Colorado.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act]
Hi folks,
Michael Bennet is running for Governor of Colorado because he knows our state is a beacon of hope when things seem at their darkest.
It’s also right here in Colorado that we have won big fights before—Michael knows we can put up a bold fight against Trump’s agenda while building the bright future we all deserve.
🩷 In our state, we’ve enshrined reproductive freedom and marriage equality into our constitution.
🏡 Coloradans have shown you can support working families raising children by creating universal pre-K and full-day kindergarten, as well as passing a statewide Child Tax Credit modeled after Michael’s expanded federal Child Tax Credit, which cut taxes for 96% of Colorado families and reduced our nation’s childhood poverty rate nearly in half.
🌎 Colorado has been a leader in fighting climate change by reducing our emissions and investing in renewable energy, while creating good paying clean energy jobs.
🏔 We’ve fought for our public lands, protecting hundreds of thousands of acres, including Camp Hale, Chimney Rock, Brown’s Canyon, and Camp Amache.
Together, we can make life more affordable for families and make it easier for entrepreneurs to start small businesses. We can also bring our education system into the 21st century so that everyone can look to the future with optimism. We’ve shown time and again that here in Colorado, we can take on tough challenges and build the future we all deserve.
Michael knows the change we want and the best solutions to our challenges will come from us working together here at home, in every corner of our state. If you’re ready to join us, consider chipping in a few bucks today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act]
Together, we can continue to make Colorado the best state to live, work, and raise a family, and provide the leadership and vision our country desperately needs.
Michael is ready to get work, you with us friend? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250414_forcolorado_act]
Thank you,
Team Bennet

subject: Outraised 10-1

body:
Democrats aren’t letting up. They’re already expected to post record-breaking fundraising numbers for their 1st quarter. If this keeps up, every Republican Senate seat is in jeopardy. |
---
[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=f01601d4ce8a4e218f79eb52c31ac94a&_e=QkLQNGqU4Zz0oniTy-hqpfyqrT8i3EpNTaMlBUqtPdQ-c9gWcyYhQlQcgdTVnVqgR3BRnmKgQRbu-w60QlG2NH37nIqujy_oE1a7yE94q-gFC3TWvnyxE2m0rg-LuawmilmYHBz6OhnyUrs58zBOtU06OGHxBha0_Cd65NrWAO8MgROwFEhMUuJsIP7G5pIn2WjysATsBI_Dj2whqPNv0dbgG1E7K8qo1MPUx0STGVXVZeMZZfHZEINdXb9zoyx9KM8c6ZC8WPsn0L1rbzplQsD-O_eUrv0qM17kMN7OCcEFvqiUu2cXaEPWHNRSMY2xFu2OiBb-IlEuk-I2XEVvCn7T3SZB8q3vK6tK5LVSvauN4BGXf90_B7L5M2N8cx_80Vr_GAe9wkfrEC19Njaw39TNpD5hkvwxbmeRz7vF-hM%3D) Fellow American, I’ll be upfront with you. April got off to a rough start.

**First** -- we barely made our End-of-Quarter fundraising objective, hitting our goal just minutes before midnight.

_**Second** -- Democrats outraised Republicans in Florida’s Special Election 10 to 1!_

**Finally, and worst of all** -- we’re already behind on April’s fundraising numbers.

Democrats aren’t letting up. They’re already expected to post record-breaking fundraising numbers for their 1st quarter. If this keeps up, every Republican Senate seat is in jeopardy.

I have just over 24 hours before my April mid-month fundraising deadline. To get our fundraising back on track, I need to raise $10,502 by midnight tomorrow. [**Will you help by pitching in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can afford by midnight tomorrow?**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=f01601d4ce8a4e218f79eb52c31ac94a&_e=QkLQNGqU4Zz0oniTy-hqpfyqrT8i3EpNTaMlBUqtPdQ-c9gWcyYhQlQcgdTVnVqgR3BRnmKgQRbu-w60QlG2NH37nIqujy_oE1a7yE94q-gFC3TWvnyxE2m0rg-LuawmilmYHBz6OhnyUrs58zBOtU06OGHxBha0_Cd65NrWAO8MgROwFEhMUuJsIP7G5pIn2WjysATsBI_Dj2whqPNv0dbgG1E7K8qo1MPUx0STGVXVZeMZZfHZEINdXb9zoyx9KM8c6ZC8WPsn0L1rbzplQiO3MW84xR3YPy3UcZF-NVqQbttTCg9ScSB103pl8cU_zaRE7HIJtj71F790J6BPBMGLRnVftLs5noXNgluAjd7VwUJeR7mxN43AHoxWNC6WBFf2kRxFqnQha9fPY-Sxnr5n9bPHkMAy377kRyaY334%3D)

clean_body: Democrats aren’t letting up. They’re already expected to post record-breaking fundraising numbers for their 1st quarter. If this keeps up, every Republican Senate seat is in jeopardy. | Fellow American, I’ll be upfront with you. April got off to a rough start. First -- we barely made our End-of-Quarter fundraising objective, hitting our goal just minutes before midnight. Second -- Democrats outraised Republicans in Florida’s Special Election 10 to 1! Finally, and worst of all -- we’re already behind on April’s fundraising numbers. Democrats aren’t letting up. They’re already expected to post record-breaking fundraising numbers for their 1st quarter. If this keeps up, every Republican Senate seat is in jeopardy. I have just over 24 hours before my April mid-month fundraising deadline. To get our fundraising back on track, I need to raise $10,502 by midnight tomorrow. Democrats have already announced they have the money and resources to put seats like mine at the top of their target list. I already have a declared Democrat opponent. It could be just a matter of days before Schumer starts flooding Montana with paid consultants and activists. Our first line of defense is the support of patriotic Americans like you Fellow American. because Democrats are fired up about flipping this seat. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

body:
We’re fighting for health equity and reproductive justice. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhE3KUtd-3AvUmQV2eqr7CJmIYsQaB4XK1zPpn0oBVQZ12D1zCbcx03FSkK2HFXoKQEUb_yJ5_6lhgFGDWNFfu-l-1NdYIaMAMZP0P95ispgMP2S-k9l9bJ2mx0Iau7R9qtNotu6a7gkWWyp8yVlwY4wWEM9xGXJJVuG9f-oyJJtWylikdv5HCtOQxSLKfpYnrW2l3JJXTMZjM3M45SKsqjOcijafyXJERv5YGKLLTU0/4fn/vo3rBk61ToSzBMeXuiqN1g/h0/h001.ZKY7-Rtm6tDnfT8yAVu02U255E2kOgLMdfkbSKlgtCk)
---
Friend, It’s Black Maternal Health Week, which means it’s time to demand equitable healthcare and push for solutions to our country’s growing maternal mortality crisis. In the United States, the maternal mortality rate is much higher than that of similar countries, and it disproportionately impacts Black women—who are 3 to 4 times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women. Most of these deaths are preventable, and we know many of the solutions that are needed to save lives. Many of these solutions are part of vital legislation I’ve cosponsored: the _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_. This policy package would invest in social determinants of health like housing and nutrition, fund community-based organizations**** that are working to improve maternal health outcomes, grow and diversify the workforce of birthing-related healthcare providers, and establish programs to address racism in maternity care settings. Especially as the right-wing attacks civil rights and reproductive rights, we must urgently advance this legislation and save Black women’s lives. [**Will you take a stand for Black maternal health today and sign on to support the**** _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_****?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmuSI_EFHFpZvhWrXmIYPfmJGiOw6VxN0EfPznHFhPYip2dRCIOT6Lah-lnm3V38hGXQcMTtSgORRaSEq8QM3XQ9aDXQtXZZJ7DZJ3qQDNEbdpiSdtAbNEy47pG01foe0SxJ2IXt7ruZgpRizn1fi1ZZvYawtbpJ-QBDm_7NXhazWEKX8DD5VoupPMTpJj8J5OY8DjNFF7fVOxqX0Sqh258YpyXpTdl3q1nHeWXsyv_zi3Y9yjsTX5CxnA0YTzximvgsHVunojKvlSUee7UQYhVtsLpCoHts69E3_m7kO12ytf2-Y36F4xsCGhJUaa7YgyE9BdQk5MvUagRgDFvt4EkD7t6qDio-qIQ0h5Mz6iBtv4AQsp95B74pA78lzJ12B3/4fn/vo3rBk61ToSzBMeXuiqN1g/h1/h001.8u_B20t2BW97R5UWfEBusLqzQ1SAbTxjFK22gKw6R9A) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmuSI_EFHFpZvhWrXmIYPfmJGiOw6VxN0EfPznHFhPYip2dRCIOT6Lah-lnm3V38hGXQcMTtSgORRaSEq8QM3XQ6A1C7os2q1QJY2GQStvHBvySINqr3xHcX8BB6yRFOLIARFHBBJmxq6RRh9eH8acmA8Rtn-SbyEJ4gRfXd_qPMYydH-_z6kH_uDC8HGxi49ATd3S4YMkhMviovbFaiEE3X18Mj8AV1LfmR_mQfgWufhbx_Q0jvE2a2fh7uMinHDyezXDMRtOnDPJx2UTFpbyyckz_KqKPOqfgUZNbExdqSxy0JXGATBBtKMXhr1A9iTRE2D83lUrcf63BaWkuCYJLPodz0j5hnV-9frbDmxsbthe1f4Alv3N02jppDpriH_z/4fn/vo3rBk61ToSzBMeXuiqN1g/h2/h001.ePO13rkdm3jFnU-_81YcIG6wHlS-MQIEDdCPcj9NJcc)
---
“Black Mamas deserve equitable, culturally affirming care and community-driven solutions that drive lasting change,” wrote Black Mamas Matter Alliance, which founded the annual Black Maternal Health Week. The _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_ would invest in that care and those solutions.
Together we will keep pushing to dismantle systemic racism, expand our civil rights, bring about reproductive justice and health equity, guarantee healthcare as a human right, and build a country with a truly multi-racial democracy—where everyone can thrive with dignity.
We will keep honoring the humanity of Black women and affirming that Black lives matter.
With you in this fight,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Apr 12, 2025
Subject: Sign to support the Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This is Black Maternal Health Week, a time to address the unacceptable racial disparities in our country’s healthcare system.
Due to systemic racism, Black women are 3 to 4 times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women. The U.S. maternal mortality rate is higher than in similar countries—and it’s rising. Most of these deaths are preventable; I’m fighting to prevent them.
This week of activism and awareness was founded by Black Mamas Matter Alliance, a national network that includes Detroit-based Mothering Justice. I’ve had the honor of partnering with Mothering Justice for years, including starting the Mamas’ Caucus in Congress to uplift mothers of color and fight for changes like paid leave, affordable childcare, and health equity.
I’m also part of the Black Maternal Health Caucus in Congress and a co-sponsor of **the**** _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_****—a comprehensive policy package to address the Black maternal mortality crisis and save people’s lives.**
The _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_ would:
* **Make critical investments in social determinants of health** that influence maternal health outcomes, like housing, transportation, and nutrition.
* **Extend WIC eligibility** during postpartum and breastfeeding periods to provide crucial nutrition for parents and babies.
* **Fund community-based organizations** that are working to improve maternal health outcomes, promote equity, and reduce levels of and exposure to pollution and climate change-related risks.
* **Grow and diversify the perinatal workforce** (e.g. nurses, midwives, physician assistants, doulas). Culturally affirming care from Black birth workers is proven to improve outcomes for Black birthing people.
* **Support anti-bias trainings** for employees in maternity care settings and establish Respectful Maternity Care Compliance Programs to address racism and promote accountability.
* And more

[**Can you add your name to support the**** _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_****so we can eradicate racial health disparities and save lives?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmuSI_EFHFpZvhWrXmIYPfmJGiOw6VxN0EfPznHFhPYip2dRCIOT6Lah-lnm3V38hGXQcMTtSgORRaSEq8QM3XQ8D18jC262A4A6M3fm2PzQDb2CcyXUs-_LdMszJEPAXZ59UZRjnAoGWdEdQIV3SmQnO9go7WOgraIAAjCuIc9K-eAwFHkRCmyayESLxoBmepljj6OPFxarwaBjtwEjVnvi0sFFR7Pet0tQSrmbM5LbB83qwCUlvKHnkVRIPXeAAo-oPl0FZVwDmbilDOU5ARkSHKMW4fGbJvxw55twQbP05bhFNKDNbd8EUKS30sUXt9rmkf7JAPQSutFKSC_XpkoB34MnMuddsU4Y0651K3IWdCdxnuTGmarp5IaL7Oprs1/4fn/vo3rBk61ToSzBMeXuiqN1g/h3/h001.nRpxfxLqKW5spea2dKYTQWjykc9QkDKiuuIskAc6Joo)

We must urgently implement solutions to the Black maternal health crisis, especially as the right-wingers in power attack civil and reproductive rights.
I will continue pushing in Congress to defend programs like Medicaid and to expand policies and services that help dismantle systemic racism. Together, we will keep building a more equitable society where Black women and birthing people thrive.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: We’re fighting for health equity and reproductive justice. | | | Friend, It’s Black Maternal Health Week, which means it’s time to demand equitable healthcare and push for solutions to our country’s growing maternal mortality crisis. In the United States, the maternal mortality rate is much higher than that of similar countries, and it disproportionately impacts Black women—who are 3 to 4 times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women. Most of these deaths are preventable, and we know many of the solutions that are needed to save lives. Many of these solutions are part of vital legislation I’ve cosponsored: the Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act. This policy package would invest in social determinants of health like housing and nutrition, fund community-based organizations** that are working to improve maternal health outcomes, grow and diversify the workforce of birthing-related healthcare providers, and establish programs to address racism in maternity care settings. Especially as the right-wing attacks civil rights and reproductive rights, we must urgently advance this legislation and save Black women’s lives. | “Black Mamas deserve equitable, culturally affirming care and community-driven solutions that drive lasting change,” wrote Black Mamas Matter Alliance, which founded the annual Black Maternal Health Week. The Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act would invest in that care and those solutions. Together we will keep pushing to dismantle systemic racism, expand our civil rights, bring about reproductive justice and health equity, guarantee healthcare as a human right, and build a country with a truly multi-racial democracy—where everyone can thrive with dignity. We will keep honoring the humanity of Black women and affirming that Black lives matter. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib**** Date: Sat, Apr 12, 2025 Subject: Sign to support the Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This is Black Maternal Health Week, a time to address the unacceptable racial disparities in our country’s healthcare system. Due to systemic racism, Black women are 3 to 4 times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women. The U.S. maternal mortality rate is higher than in similar countries—and it’s rising. Most of these deaths are preventable; I’m fighting to prevent them. This week of activism and awareness was founded by Black Mamas Matter Alliance, a national network that includes Detroit-based Mothering Justice. I’ve had the honor of partnering with Mothering Justice for years, including starting the Mamas’ Caucus in Congress to uplift mothers of color and fight for changes like paid leave, affordable childcare, and health equity. I’m also part of the Black Maternal Health Caucus in Congress and a co-sponsor of the** Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act—a comprehensive policy package to address the Black maternal mortality crisis and save people’s lives. The Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act would: Make critical investments in social determinants of health that influence maternal health outcomes, like housing, transportation, and nutrition. Extend WIC eligibility during postpartum and breastfeeding periods to provide crucial nutrition for parents and babies. Fund community-based organizations that are working to improve maternal health outcomes, promote equity, and reduce levels of and exposure to pollution and climate change-related risks. Grow and diversify the perinatal workforce (e.g. nurses, midwives, physician assistants, doulas). Culturally affirming care from Black birth workers is proven to improve outcomes for Black birthing people. Support anti-bias trainings for employees in maternity care settings and establish Respectful Maternity Care Compliance Programs to address racism and promote accountability. And more We must urgently implement solutions to the Black maternal health crisis, especially as the right-wingers in power attack civil and reproductive rights. I will continue pushing in Congress to defend programs like Medicaid and to expand policies and services that help dismantle systemic racism. Together, we will keep building a more equitable society where Black women and birthing people thrive. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: All On The Line
subject: This needs to get more national attention, Peter:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Help hold the line against attacks like the SAVE Act.
|
---

This needs to get more national attention, Peter: Last week, the House of Representatives passed the SAVE Act, an extreme anti-voter bill that could disenfranchise millions of Americans.
**Here’s the good news though: We have a real chance to stop it in the Senate. But that’ll require every member of this grassroots team stepping up when it matters most.**
All On The Line is mobilizing activists to speak out across the country, from calling their members of Congress to submitting letters to the editor about why the SAVE Act would be so harmful to our democracy. With so much at stake, we must throw everything we can into this fight before it’s too late. So we’re asking:
[**Please, rush a $15 donation to power All On The Line’s campaign to protect our democracy from these kinds of brazen attacks.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105828224/539521776/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEUpdate_email_20250414-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250414-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEUpdate_&utm_campaign=SAVEUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MGMyYTBiLTZiMTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zx5SKBsHf02ZD5BaTSlvgA7sV-6pRVK-n9pIwOyTk5g=)

Despite its name, the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act would do absolutely nothing to make our elections safer. Instead, it would put up barriers designed to prevent millions of eligible voters from casting their ballot by:
• Requiring all eligible Americans to provide proof of citizenship chiefly by presenting a passport or birth certificate when registering to vote;
• Upending online voter registration, a practice in 42 states;
• Making it likely impossible for Americans to register to vote by mail; and
• Putting an end to many voter registration drives nationwide
If it passes the Senate and is signed into law, these changes would disproportionately impact military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, working-class Americans, and the tens of millions of married women who have changed their names. About half of American citizens — nearly 150 million citizens — do not have a passport, and elderly Americans are one of the demographics least likely to have one.
**The SAVE Act is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation — and we must do everything we can to prevent it from becoming law.**
[**Can we count on you to make a $15 donation to All On The Line to hold the line against attacks like the SAVE Act?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105828231/539521783/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEUpdate_email_20250414-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250414-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEUpdate_&utm_campaign=SAVEUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MGMyYTBiLTZiMTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zx5SKBsHf02ZD5BaTSlvgA7sV-6pRVK-n9pIwOyTk5g=)

subject: The DOJ is not Trump’s personal law firm.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, **The Department of Justice is supposed to serve the people — not the political whims of one man.** But under Donald Trump, the DOJ is being twisted into a tool for revenge and political favors. And Republicans in Congress are doing nothing to stop it. That’s why Mazie and her fellow Democrats on the House and Senate Judiciary Committees held a spotlight hearing last week — hearing from former Justice Department officials on how the Trump administration is politicizing the rule of law, punishing dissent, and rewarding loyalty. Trump wants the DOJ to be his own personal law firm, and we won’t let that slide. Here’s the truth: Trump is trying to bend our justice system to serve _him_ — and Republican leaders are too afraid (or too complicit) to stop him. **Mazie is fighting back. clean_body: | Peter, The Department of Justice is supposed to serve the people — not the political whims of one man. But under Donald Trump, the DOJ is being twisted into a tool for revenge and political favors. And Republicans in Congress are doing nothing to stop it. That’s why Mazie and her fellow Democrats on the House and Senate Judiciary Committees held a spotlight hearing last week — hearing from former Justice Department officials on how the Trump administration is politicizing the rule of law, punishing dissent, and rewarding loyalty. Trump wants the DOJ to be his own personal law firm, and we won’t let that slide. Here’s the truth: Trump is trying to bend our justice system to serve him — and Republican leaders are too afraid (or too complicit) to stop him. Mazie is fighting back. But this work depends on grassroots supporters like you.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This isn’t just about one administration. ## How Budget Battle Could Preserve or Sink Johnson’s Speakership
Speaker of the House Mike Johnson is staking his political future on one daunting task—delivering a budget reconciliation bill that will satisfy both houses of Congress. In order to pass “one big, beautiful bill” to fulfill President Donald Trump’s campaign promises, Johnson will have to make good on his own commitments to the most fiscally [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/n0mkqDqfB5OcwKlnXCAKKz7WtNfciUUwRGGpd01z6zF34I-m2ASWziAZfAD9Fs1Gsu_H79y2CW4hSQIM1WzxTIa3T1M_dg_gy6ihaoMHArCcopzsHsSyoUefKKb9-ncGpqURCrzQsZ8T2yJHcWE6LZ5pyG97Bg2WtPlIHD3LEnGAxMZjsyRfPGBkUtccXymgFv0COcF0r5KGoELwynTAy7WlF1AstLF8ZcCqp-0rVJU3Dd8C3fY2yWPde0nx4J4MOolbqhLi_2EMujbIIML-u7pkmSdMFGNnFz2MzJOhj-XT5xdmoDrivJ0Z_zPoNqVaD0M6-rVtMC7yOrCiwvIZRT7qBUDdpA/mtvSlGz5xxpDfbb_41Ovp6eUybhArAbI/8)

## Idaho AG Hails State Court Ruling on Abortion Rights Restrictions
Idaho has won a major pro-life victory in state court. Judge Jason Scott of Idaho’s 4th Judicial District Court on Friday held that there was no expansive right to an abortion under the state’s constitution while acknowledging the state’s two exemptions to the general ban on the procedure. name: Eleni Kounalakis
subject: I am all in for our state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
body:
Eleni Kounalakis for Governor Logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62802/images/ekg-logomark-min.png]

Peter - Two years ago, I announced my campaign for Governor of California because the challenges facing our state are steep, and I have exactly the right experience to tackle them.

I’m sending you this message to make absolutely clear - I am ALL IN as a candidate for Governor and ALL IN for our state.

The threats our country faces today are more challenging than ever. Instead of leadership, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are bringing a daily dose of chaos and corruption. They are dismantling democratic institutions and profiting along the way. And here in California, families are rightfully worried about whether the American Dream is within reach for the next generation.

As Lieutenant Governor, professional diplomat, and former businesswoman, I bring a unique combination of decisive leadership, experienced problem-solving, and much-needed diplomacy to this fight. I pledge to work with all Californians and all stakeholders to ensure a brighter future.

I don’t take anyone’s support for granted. When I launched this campaign, I knew it would be a tough fight and require me to give all of myself to show that I will be a governor for all Californians.

I am so grateful for your support! And I will never forget all of you who stood by my side when we were just getting started.

In 2026, we will break California’s glass ceiling.

I hope you’re ready because I can’t wait to do this together.

Best,

Eleni Kounalakis

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eleni-em-apr25?refcode2=1aa2763c-6f19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7]

Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
2443 Fillmore Street #300
San Francisco, CA 94115

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Update: Meet and Greet Moved to Larger Venue
body:
|

---
Dear friends and neighbors,
On Friday, we announced our Bowie office open house, and registration reached capacity within an hour of the announcement! Due to high demand and my desire to see as many Marylanders as possible, I am pleased to share that we will still host the open house from 2pm - 6pm at our Bowie office, but have now moved the mingle and fellowship to a larger venue in Landover. I will be on hand from 6pm to 8pm to meet Marylanders where they are.
RSVP [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14224.7086815.5246550.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fforms.gle%2fQJijCe7SNbVirMgt5&redir_log=789991337832236) for details, and I can assure you we will have additional opportunities! Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=14224.7086815.5246550.7190525)

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe9NspajPkPVQiJN1ZH-tkt57Ax3hfRT26OmFGdwSu8WLL86C9vP4ORlWcJrTjbe8PQ0CfwlqyKMVoyo8sBRWgRiSUm1SdIfGlWRCQttRl8BTmjJs_fGvfo53TuF3EUN50yK3vaebZpRhA1EWIVZWDEDeJ41h8gzQ8UmYRdDSU-rHW5DcMe-o5yRY29oVSFxisot1Ks8_Zpe2A8TORnW1zrriOrUCCXVgr1pREkrqd008uXWTaNfNkjbA3MYoX5Dn9XktYg2KYUu22MDJgBcbEfHrhQc-GTlPQIEwu5mTfUEatrkGhF5j0Zy7IG-r_16MdEW-AVS9qVOxxZm6wcBTzO-_ll5GKSDV9fLc4uJN6o9dg%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe9NspajPkPVQiJN1ZH-tkt57Ax3hfRT26OmFGdwSu8WLL86C9vP4ORlWcJrTjbe8PQ0CfwlqyKMVoyo8sBRWgRiSUm1SdIfGlWRCQttRl8BTmjJs_fGvfo53TuF3EUN50yK3vaebZpRhA1EWIVZWDEDeJ41h8gzQ8UmYRdDSU-rHW5DcMe-o5yRY29oVSFxisot1Ks8_Zpe2A8TORnW1zrrm5olVw_ysWLzQdDksuWGtRjJ2Y0MrPIL-wYn4kkoO6spBXnbC5bpuMhqIAQSWV7mOz45vPg3Mff1SvGvGYhF9G28kye6TFSk59lQsQVbUrhP8e3LEvEu0TOj0v3dDrhRG1ePDQCP-quqfLwC1yZwsw%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe9NspajPkPVQiJN1ZH-tkt57Ax3hfRT26OmFGdwSu8WLL86C9vP4ORlWcJrTjbe8PQ0CfwlqyKMVoyo8sBRWgRiSUm1SdIfGlWRCQttRl8BTmjJs_fGvfo53TuF3EUN50yK3vaebZpRhA1EWIVZWDEDeJ41h8gzQ8UmYRdDSU-rHW5DcMe-o5yRY29oVSFxisot1Ks8_Zpe2A8TORnW1zrrWN-jhPfcjz4Hr_PA4L8oaX-wn2PYmM_hx97LGMDbgWE3zM62usFIhX-7Xk-XiiQN78eWvEQgyWnR-4N1_6LegwibbcoXDUFSuk4oafzrk-lYj2RFaFj5oaTlaTl3sNvNtltBVa6jCHRYkqyxPj_fmA%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe9NspajPkPVQiJN1ZH-tkt57Ax3hfRT26OmFGdwSu8WLL86C9vP4ORlWcJrTjbe8PQ0CfwlqyKMVoyo8sBRWgRiSUm1SdIfGlWRCQttRl8BTmjJs_fGvfo53TuF3EUN50yK3vaebZpRhA1EWIVZWDEDeJ41h8gzQ8UmYRdDSU-rHW5DcMe-o5yRY29oVSFxisot1Ks8_Zpe2A8TORnW1zrr7eiaHb2jiX9Md8PPirmnvAzUeKTrIhCY6ONZ98NB_gyvl5Ldi833MlrcmObPtJ_DNJq1rNPQlHQLV5ti_xnQxIU0Qe0YuR08CqxyBkGBiTAqNlyA_GoJhX9LoJuuLdbts8G-l0TEwS62rn56ZCiuoA%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe9NspajPkPVQiJN1ZH-tkt57Ax3hfRT26OmFGdwSu8WLL86C9vP4ORlWcJrTjbe8PQ0CfwlqyKMVoyo8sBRWgRiSUm1SdIfGlWRCQttRl8BTmjJs_fGvfo53TuF3EUN50yK3vaebZpRhA1EWIVZWDEDeJ41h8gzQ8UmYRdDSU-rHW5DcMe-o5yRY29oVSFxisot1Ks8_Zpe2A8TORnW1zrr6dvYietedjIIFy807-w0wA28grM3JYzDRLEAx9r4v9bAi5wgRSzEBMel3QmL2hW--yJBkvoo3IG42wRmVsyXg4ynsfRDpn0RaOXrnkAF8edo3DkGACg6cpVONUlju5ZIS4nMJCyaMibLeOW4NhvogA%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe9NspajPkPVQiJN1ZH-tkt57Ax3hfRT26OmFGdwSu8WLL86C9vP4ORlWcJrTjbe8PQ0CfwlqyKMVoyo8sBRWgRiSUm1SdIfGlWRCQttRl8BTmjJs_fGvfo53TuF3EUN50yK3vaebZpRhA1EWIVZWDEDeJ41h8gzQ8UmYRdDSU-rHW5DcMe-o5yRY29oVSFxisot1Ks8_Zpe2A8TORnW1zrriuuOBZ8o2xfiGomXrskm2RtndkBK_jvl31ETyk-o65q3CGvIV6Mx44MNLCklF8g0W3cxNG4xqlV7m3MBTYJmzTNBWLve_5kGOO-YEkULitoIW3Yy7-Svy2M32hZCE6zbo9nPLh8DUc9VKhC62wRZzA%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe9NspajPkPVQiJN1ZH-tkt57Ax3hfRT26OmFGdwSu8WLL86C9vP4ORlWcJrTjbe8PQ0CfwlqyKMVoyo8sBRWgRiSUm1SdIfGlWRCQttRl8BTmjJs_fGvfo53TuF3EUN50yK3vaebZpRhA1EWIVZWDEDeJ41h8gzQ8UmYRdDSU-rHW5DcMe-o5yRY29oVSFxisot1Ks8_Zpe2A8TORnW1zrr_m_voDUe7ZJK23b-o_5AHyMIiR5hxPVWq9aPiK3uxa3ByRwlooW5_jFzo1yC5f92CPqM5AN9kvE2pwHPrDm475StJgL_Ogumnk7dHiMZQUqTE-nmbSAevSLq14BOYxl4CNwn0GjL6c4pWAlSZyJmww%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe8Pebd8kja7Ce2oaBeDKspu3tQcYJKKdFA56vNllQ3vOWAAzDsfZxdzVxq7HehZpBJeMYDtxYCdN9r-907Xes06ymRWvYQQxLhIUx_9ai2vaMdgLtIA3dA7V8iDMfpZL79-18o2RAqQbzqt1nAg-lTFbEoQ9v5gtic48yWW1yDuuibMUu7ulGctD9PFYF_4CI5-uIpXpuhoUecPBYCwdsHwaqcsSQKLCR5cEh2QAO0ewx1UI4Tu5_MOK9gPSjeG7dGqShA75zOeN2Qp7jPk7JNvgNhWzETdZ6C35PxweocFw9DS2FthiiGst1QfI9PmvIewJdLxpYprP1p5GaqfCxO2dTdY5R5rO37OwP0z1ec8mCd0OE3pIDBQx221NsM-Uws%3D "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9b1df44bffb407c84caae39e7a0d1b6&_e=sgYwGgFTs-G6BjYe103WIfhHQ0W33LzRCt88iGzRhe8Pebd8kja7Ce2oaBeDKspu3tQcYJKKdFA56vNllQ3vOWAAzDsfZxdzVxq7HehZpBJeMYDtxYCdN9r-907Xes06ymRWvYQQxLhIUx_9ai2vaMdgLtIA3dA7V8iDMfpZL79-18o2RAqQbzqt1nAg-lTFbEoQ9v5gtic48yWW1yDuuibMUu7ulGctD9PFYF_4CI5-uIpXpuhoUecPBYCwdsHwaqcsSQKLCR5cEh2QAO0ew5_3lrZ6NCUsX_1ziTW5Sy9rFuCGnEJUlLxHN9_z6FkJhJjCtfMn6MxlhkmMIRndY6awO3IOMDcPJphZ5zSPpYCTxIZKqI11fU8wIuJ1EyoHEP6EkvsfxtML5XxOY6gP_pJsVhNEQIiCMs3OQYERnGY%3D "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.combecause you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.combecause you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Reckless & wasteful
body:
| | Peter,

We know firsthand that hyperpartisanship doesn’t solve the real problems our community faces. All it does is divide us, instill hate, and endanger our core values.

I’ve been named one of the most bipartisan members of Congress because that principle is central to my work, and I always strive to be an independent voice for Southwest Washington – **that’s why I voted no on the latest budget framework.**

Here’s the thing: you can’t claim to champion fiscal responsibility while pushing for a budget that adds nearly $5.8 trillion to the national debt in order to cut taxes for the wealthiest Americans. I simply can’t support a plan that guts programs that advance our national health, like Medicaid and food programs, just to pad the pockets of the top 0.1% of earners.

That’s just reckless and wasteful. Working families see right through the guise that the far right wants them to believe, and they deserve better.

Peter, I’ll keep working across the aisle to uphold our shared values and deliver results on the issues that really matter to Southwest Washingtonians, whether it’s bringing down everyday costs, uplifting the middle class, or supporting rural communities.

We have a lot of work to do – and I’m grateful to have you on our team as we continue forging ahead.

– Marie

clean_body: | | Peter, We know firsthand that hyperpartisanship doesn’t solve the real problems our community faces. All it does is divide us, instill hate, and endanger our core values. I’ve been named one of the most bipartisan members of Congress because that principle is central to my work, and I always strive to be an independent voice for Southwest Washington – that’s why I voted no on the latest budget framework. Here’s the thing: you can’t claim to champion fiscal responsibility while pushing for a budget that adds nearly $5.8 trillion to the national debt in order to cut taxes for the wealthiest Americans. I simply can’t support a plan that guts programs that advance our national health, like Medicaid and food programs, just to pad the pockets of the top 0.1% of earners. That’s just reckless and wasteful. Working families see right through the guise that the far right wants them to believe, and they deserve better. Peter, I’ll keep working across the aisle to uphold our shared values and deliver results on the issues that really matter to Southwest Washingtonians, whether it’s bringing down everyday costs, uplifting the middle class, or supporting rural communities. We have a lot of work to do – and I’m grateful to have you on our team as we continue forging ahead. – Marie | | = | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC.
