name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Trump wants to cut billions from Medicaid. Not on my watch.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
They want to cut $880 billion from it, and early estimates tell us that would threaten health care for 80 million Americans. They’re saying that care won’t be affected, it’ll be fine, don’t worry about it — and that’s all a lie.
#

Peter, Ruben here.
The GOP passed Trump’s framework for the budget they want last week. It’s one step in a long process to give Elon Musk and a bunch of other billionaires a massive tax break.
It’s light on specifics, but what it does include is bad. Real bad.
The biggest cut targets Medicaid. They want to cut $880 billion from it, and early estimates tell us that would threaten health care for 80 million Americans. They’re saying that care won’t be affected, it’ll be fine, don’t worry about it — and that’s all a lie.
You can’t take $880 billion out of Medicaid without impacting care. You just can’t. It’s impossible. But if Trump and the GOP get one big thing passed in Congress this year, they want it to be this.
They want to give trillions in tax breaks for billionaires and millionaires and massive corporations. They want to gut programs millions of people depend on to pay for it. And they’re destroying our economy while they do it — raising prices for people who can’t afford it, endangering jobs, slashing retirement funds.
I know what it’s like to struggle to make ends meet. I watched my mom go through it, and I worked all the way through school to help. It sucks. It takes a huge toll on you.
Trump and the GOP want to take what little help struggling people have and give trillions of dollars to the richest people in the country. Nah.
Not on my watch. Not while I’m in the Senate. As long as I have breath in my lungs I am going to stand in their way. People are depending on us, and we can’t let them down.
Time to saddle up and get to work. Hope you’re with me.
Semper Fi,
Ruben
Trump, Elon, and the GOP want us afraid.
They’re hoping we won’t stand against them.
**They’ve got another thing coming.**
We’re going to need to fight harder than ever to stop them, but we can defeat them if we stay united.
[**Help Ruben keep up the fight by chipping in whatever you can afford today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr25.dU9j8y&refcode=em250414-1-90&t=1&akid=3816%2E734936%2E8yzJdy)

name: Becca Balint
subject: How are you feeling, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105829832/539527245/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDU1MGM4MS03MTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_agsgcnKTiro8M_yHFT2kFvFKLKia4VwqDE_SBFjZa8=)
---
Peter, Last weekend, millions of people in the United States and across the globe took to the streets to say "no" to this administration. I was proud to attend one of these protests myself in Brattleboro alongside hundreds of Vermonters. Things have felt pretty bleak recently, but the fact that so many Americans came out and had their voices heard truly matters. I've heard from countless Vermonters that they're horrified at the actions of the Trump administration and the lack of message and cohesive response from the Democratic Party. I'm doing everything I can to speak out against the Trump administration and their Republican enablers in Congress and empower folks like you to use your voices to demand better. **[But I want to know: How do you feel about how Democrats are responding to this moment? What can we do better? And what are we doing right? Let me know by completing this survey>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105829833/539527246/-1827934949?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDU1MGM4MS03MTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_agsgcnKTiro8M_yHFT2kFvFKLKia4VwqDE_SBFjZa8=&emci=23b9d078-7119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c4550c81-7119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43402272)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105829834/539527247/-1827934949?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDU1MGM4MS03MTE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_agsgcnKTiro8M_yHFT2kFvFKLKia4VwqDE_SBFjZa8=&emci=23b9d078-7119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c4550c81-7119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43402272)

Dear Derek,
We wanted to make sure you saw Katie’s email from this weekend about the calls she’s making to grassroots supporters.
**[TL;DR If you chip in any amount to this email, we’ll add you to the list of people Katie could call this week. Don’t miss out!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250414_1_ak?refcode=em20250414-39638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39638_3422442_qbg90-&akid=39638%2E3422442%2Eqbg90-)**

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Katie Porter [info@katieporter.com]
To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
Date: Sun, Apr 13, 2025
Subject: Ring ring!_
Hi, Derek. It’s Katie.
This week, I’m going to be calling grassroots supporters to thank them for chipping into my campaign. **[Donate any amount today for a chance to get a call from me!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250414_1_ak?refcode=em20250414-39638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39638_3422442_qbg90-&akid=39638%2E3422442%2Eqbg90-)**
A lot of political candidates spend a lot of their time doing “call time,” in which they call corporations and ask for a big check.
I do a different kind of call time. Whether you chip in $5 or $5,000, you have just as much a stake in our democracy as anyone else, and you have just as much a chance of getting a call from me.
Talking directly with people and hearing their ideas for how we build a better future are some of my favorite parts of campaigning. So I’m excited for the chance to chat with you!
**[Make a contribution through this email, and I just might be calling you in the near future.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250414_1_ak?refcode=em20250414-39638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39638_3422442_qbg90-&akid=39638%2E3422442%2Eqbg90-)**

Talk soon,
Katie
PS: Don’t forget to turn your ringer on!

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: I will never forget this magical moment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
An unbelievable ****20,000**** people in UTAH came to rally last night.
I will never forget this magical moment.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250414.FU0fpS&refcode=em20250414-8607-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8607%2E2526796%2ESGH2OM)
Thank you to everyone who came and made us feel so welcome, and who are starting their organizing journey today.
A better world is possible.
Let’s fight for it,
Alexandria
**Something special is happening.** Working people are ready to stand together and fight for our democracy.
[ Will you donate right now to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road? These town halls take major resources to host safely.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250414.FU0fpS&refcode=em20250414-8607-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8607%2E2526796%2ESGH2OM)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250414.FU0fpS&refcode=em20250414-8607-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=8607%2E2526796%2ESGH2OM)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250414?refcode=em20250414-8607-P_FND_RES_GRM&t=22&refcode2=8607_2526796_SGH2OM&akid=8607%2E2526796%2ESGH2OM)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250414-8607-P_FND_RES_GRM&t=23&akid=8607%2E2526796%2ESGH2OM)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=8607%2E2526796%2ESGH2OM) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=8607%2E2526796%2ESGH2OM) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=8607%2E2526796%2ESGH2OM)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: New Dems
subject: Help New Dems pass an agenda that empowers working families! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
we’re only asking for $1

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105830895/539530116/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzIwNGY2Zi03MzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SV4iVYzkhB9PyaJsyb2oMeFMu8uYqNZCH2XLFJ64KAE=)
---
**$1.**

That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. **Yes, we’re only asking for $1.**

**$1** to help us **unseat the MAGA Republicans** that have broken their promise to lower prices for everyday Americans.

**$1** to **hold Donald Trump and Elon Musk accountable** for gutting the federal workforce, fighting to eliminate Social Security, and giving tax breaks to billionaires.

**$1** to **help common-sense Democrats FLIP** the House so we can be on track towards an agenda that empowers working families.

I will continue standing up to Donald Trump, our unelected co-president Elon Musk, and all their MAGA extremists if it’s the last thing I do — and no one will silence me. But I need you with me to keep up the fight, so if you’re proud to stand with me on the right side of history, chip in any amount between my campaign and Path to Progress right away. >>](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTUxNjkxNjU1Nzg3ODQwODQ3LFwiclwiOjE1MTY5MTcyMzA4NzU0NTc5MH0iLCJzIjoiMmI3YTgzNjAyNWE0ZjRjNSJ9)**__**

That starts with making sure Democrats like me have the funds we need to fight back and take a stand.****[

So please, if you’re on my team, chip in any amount, between me and Path to Progress and let’s continue bringing the fight to MAGA Republicans every day. >>](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTUxNjkxNjU1Nzk2MjI5NDYxLFwiclwiOjE1MTY5MTcyMzA4NzU0NTc5MH0iLCJzIjoiZTVkZmFkYTRiMWY4YzYwMiJ9)**__**

name: Team Nikki
subject: The SAVE Act would disenfranchise millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105831399/539531896/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC120_20250414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTM1ZTM0Ny03NDE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=si8TfUUZ0Rg6fZ9zNfAhC5I5LwfED7SPGxHVyCXde6E=)
---
Folks, we need to talk to you about the SAVE Act. Last week, House Republicans passed a bill that will fundamentally change the way we vote in this country. **Nikki voted NO on this legislation, friend — here’s why:** Elections need to be safe and secure so that we can peacefully transition power and uphold the Constitution and the laws of the land. This legislation, however, is an attack on the right to vote and will disenfranchise _**millions**_ of American citizens. If enacted, this legislation would require that everyone show a birth certificate or passport in-person to vote in U.S. elections.

More than 21 million people nationwide don’t readily have access to documents like these. Only about half of Americans own a passport. And millions of married women across the country could lose the right to make their voices heard at the ballot box simply by failing to change their name on their birth certificate. **While Republicans claim that this bill is designed to prevent undocumented immigrants from voting,_that’s already against the law._** **[We can, and must, secure our elections without disenfranchising millions of American citizens from the ballot box. clean_body: | = Folks, we need to talk to you about the SAVE Act. Last week, House Republicans passed a bill that will fundamentally change the way we vote in this country. Nikki voted NO on this legislation, friend — here’s why: Elections need to be safe and secure so that we can peacefully transition power and uphold the Constitution and the laws of the land. This legislation, however, is an attack on the right to vote and will disenfranchise millions of American citizens. If enacted, this legislation would require that everyone show a birth certificate or passport in-person to vote in U.S. elections. More than 21 million people nationwide don’t readily have access to documents like these. Only about half of Americans own a passport. And millions of married women across the country could lose the right to make their voices heard at the ballot box simply by failing to change their name on their birth certificate. While Republicans claim that this bill is designed to prevent undocumented immigrants from voting,that’s already against the law. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The SAVE Act would also disproportionately affect rural communities who would have to travel farther to fulfill the in-person requirements in the bill, as well as veterans and military members who vote with a military ID, an ID that would no longer be considered sufficient to vote. Nikki is fighting hard in Washington against any attack on our right to vote — a bedrock of our democracy. = = Thanks for everything, Team Nikki | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

I’ve got to tell you – the enthusiastic support I’ve received since relaunching my campaign in this critical battleground seat has me fired up! | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=5c301b8a6efc4d36a31766f3aef4ab7a&_e=5_eJIjlQoEEFrweWInG7t-yWcPKrgOIQKYlVRQf1H3YwGBcf3RUuIGk7PfCo-g1ljC_jlgBRnCoadla6tuGvTS-gi8pmIQebhR9E1MkS1e9Vs_9AXKCuWH-qGWQIdd67GUQUuu3YpPQ8cDhYCi8QdX6kOJtvQnHf4TMctVrMkYnK_SDCM3AVhK6R_T1tth3Yc20537Jhg28i7xVX4aRXI8Iu1VNX5B_D4dtItHz8IJdjGnS27N9lmPO4wVEPTJthJlF1D1w0Zsj3yzPDRroMq1jgf5sFrempY1dXiRBUv5nvqUURqG1a63nMbvhZvUo3-W7FFGVnPq_q7Md73ixwy5aBPrOYnP3VN4ap4VrXpkafWIh0UnTN7RCCC9yF_Xk0M_mBCTAv0GbXDsY7PhpwRQ%3D%3D)

Hey there, friend,

It’s Marty O’Donnell—I’m the composer who scored the _Halo_ video game franchise’s epic battles—now fighting a real one right here in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District.

I’ve got to tell you – the enthusiastic support I’ve received since relaunching my campaign in this critical battleground seat has me _**fired up!**_

But my radical liberal opponent, **Susie Lee** , keeps making this easier. She just voted NO on the SAVE Act – a no-brainer bill that would require voter ID to stop non-citizens from voting and clean up our messy voter rolls.

_Apparently, Susie Lee wasn’t actually serious when she lectured us about defending our Democracy._

Susie and the radical Left wanted us to show proof of COVID-19 vaccination just to enter buildings, **but they couldn’t care less** about proving you’re a citizen in order to cast a vote that determines the fate of our nation.

Here’s the kicker: the Cook Political Report just flagged our district as a battleground seat that could decide who controls the House in 2026.

They’re also giving Democrats a slight edge in the midterms, which means [**we’ve got to start turning up the volume now if we’re going to flip this seat.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=5c301b8a6efc4d36a31766f3aef4ab7a&_e=5_eJIjlQoEEFrweWInG7t-yWcPKrgOIQKYlVRQf1H3YwGBcf3RUuIGk7PfCo-g1ljC_jlgBRnCoadla6tuGvTS-gi8pmIQebhR9E1MkS1e9Vs_9AXKCuWH-qGWQIdd67GUQUuu3YpPQ8cDhYCi8QdX6kOJtvQnHf4TMctVrMkYnK_SDCM3AVhK6R_T1tth3Yc20537Jhg28i7xVX4aRXI8Iu1VNX5B_D4dtItHz8IJdjGnS27N9lmPO4wVEPTJthn5j5GEmHMMOg_O4OY_U4o9jPD9deNhoeXjYF65W6YpBki_9wvPHQfJV6b--X0YSengGBIAG61vmYxGhjjnbG-pDl3QBywQlB0lLVJ74cSJ0owaomV0aBjKbUYUcuS8Gn8zuUrHFxmVkK-NCyQ4-iFA%3D%3D) I’m ready to change the tune in Washington, but I need you on my team.

[**Can you chip in $7, $28, $117, or another amount today to help us take on Susie Lee and fight for secure elections?**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=5c301b8a6efc4d36a31766f3aef4ab7a&_e=5_eJIjlQoEEFrweWInG7t-yWcPKrgOIQKYlVRQf1H3YwGBcf3RUuIGk7PfCo-g1ljC_jlgBRnCoadla6tuGvTS-gi8pmIQebhR9E1MkS1e9Vs_9AXKCuWH-qGWQIdd67GUQUuu3YpPQ8cDhYCi8QdX6kOJtvQnHf4TMctVrMkYnK_SDCM3AVhK6R_T1tth3Yc20537Jhg28i7xVX4aRXI8Iu1VNX5B_D4dtItHz8IJdjGnS27N9lmPO4wVEPTJthG7D8Yuz6TbWpoceQ_MZyqhNDgCHnAmNrSYRn57gYDiIzurRPi5pd34vJ07bJxSaj50inPtqmqkhOF8f_MmxE9VIDUj7LdRgRzgPTCZpj9Wg2jGIuCcoKlL4hRL_K0hLqBybOePvEeWHx2yMmqwbj_g%3D%3D)

She may have a long list that disqualifies her from being fit to cast a vote on our behalf in Congress, but that doesn’t mean she’s going to be easy to beat.

Let’s show her that we aren’t just background noise—we’re the main track.

Thanks,

**Marty O’Donnell**
Republican for Congress, NV-03

clean_body: I’ve got to tell you – the enthusiastic support I’ve received since relaunching my campaign in this critical battleground seat has me fired up! | Hey there, friend, It’s Marty O’Donnell—I’m the composer who scored the Halo video game franchise’s epic battles—now fighting a real one right here in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District. I’ve got to tell you – the enthusiastic support I’ve received since relaunching my campaign in this critical battleground seat has me fired up! But my radical liberal opponent, Susie Lee , keeps making this easier. She just voted NO on the SAVE Act – a no-brainer bill that would require voter ID to stop non-citizens from voting and clean up our messy voter rolls. Apparently, Susie Lee wasn’t actually serious when she lectured us about defending our Democracy. Susie and the radical Left wanted us to show proof of COVID-19 vaccination just to enter buildings, but they couldn’t care less about proving you’re a citizen in order to cast a vote that determines the fate of our nation. Here’s the kicker: the Cook Political Report just flagged our district as a battleground seat that could decide who controls the House in 2026. They’re also giving Democrats a slight edge in the midterms, which means I’m ready to change the tune in Washington, but I need you on my team. She may have a long list that disqualifies her from being fit to cast a vote on our behalf in Congress, but that doesn’t mean she’s going to be easy to beat. Let’s show her that we aren’t just background noise—we’re the main track. Thanks, Marty O’Donnell Republican for Congress, NV-03 | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Together, we will change the game
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
It’s time for a new chapter.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)
I believe every New Mexican deserves to have a voice.
Our state has had 32 governors, yet most of them never had to worry about the challenges working families are facing right now. That’s why I am running to lift up the voices and stories of working people.
**I’m running to be a voice for struggling families.** When raising my child as a single mom, we relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries. I will never forget how that felt, or the kindness of those who helped us. _As someone who lived through economic hardship, I’m committed to defending programs like Medicaid and SNAP that provide a lifeline for our communities’ most vulnerable._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250414_1_voice?amount=5&refcode=em20250414-1329&refcode2=1329_400544_u_lVv7&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)_After all we’ve been through together, I couldn’t be prouder of my Somáh._
**I’m running to be a voice for New Mexico’s farmers.** I’m a proud descendant of farmers who’ve been cultivating this land for hundreds of years. The best memories I have are of my grandpa and me picking worms off ears of corn in the field below our village. We’d irrigate and hoe weeds against the towering red mesa of our village of Mesita. _I carry those memories with me as I advocate for the prosperity of our New Mexico farmers and for policies that support our state’s agricultural economy._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250414_1_voice?amount=5&refcode=em20250414-1329&refcode2=1329_400544_u_lVv7&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)_Corn, beans, and squash have been staples of New Mexican agriculture for centuries._
**I’m running to be a voice for small business owners.** I started my homemade salsa business when Somáh was two years old. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. When I wasn’t busy cooking, I’d strap Somáh in her car seat and we’d drive for hours delivering salsa orders to mom-and-pop shops. _So when creative, hardworking New Mexicans want to start a small business like I did, our government should make it easier – not harder._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250414_1_voice?amount=5&refcode=em20250414-1329&refcode2=1329_400544_u_lVv7&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)_I drove for hours delivering jars of salsa in our red GMC van, often with Somáh in her car seat. Occasionally, we got creative with shoe polish._
For too long, corporate greed and deep-pocketed special interests have been allowed to drown out our voices. But together, I know we can begin a new chapter.
**New Mexico has never been led by a voice like mine.** But with your help, we can change that together. **[Will you contribute your very first $5 so we can grow our grassroots campaign and build a future for our state that gives a voice to all its people?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250414_1_voice?amount=5&refcode=em20250414-1329&refcode2=1329_400544_u_lVv7&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250414_1_voice?amount=5&refcode=em20250414-1329&refcode2=1329_400544_u_lVv7&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)**
Thanks for hearing my story,
Deb
P.S. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and fight for progress as governor. Not in spite of challenges I’ve faced in life, but because of them. **[If you’re with me, please consider chipping in $5 today so we can win this grassroots campaign for New Mexico.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250414_1_voice?amount=5&refcode=em20250414-1329&refcode2=1329_400544_u_lVv7&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250414-1&t=2&refcode2=1329_400544_u_lVv7&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1329%2E400544%2Eu_lVv7)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

President Donald Trump and several members of his cabinet **[tore"low ratings" CNN reporter Kaitlan Collins apart](https://substack.com/redirect/5ef28943-5727-4e75-af83-72b1c95ac938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she asked an "arrogant" question during today's White House meeting with El Salvador President Nayib Bukele.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5ef28943-5727-4e75-af83-72b1c95ac938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5ef28943-5727-4e75-af83-72b1c95ac938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Let's hear the question from this very low-rated anchor at CNN," Trump said as he picked on Collins to ask a question.
"Thank you Mr. President Trump," Collins said. "Do you plan to ask President Bukele to help return the man who your administration says was mistakenly deported to El Salvador?"
Collins' question referenced illegal immigrant Kilmar Abrego Garcia, who's deportation to El Salvador the Supreme Court called illegal and asked the Trump administration to facilitate his return. Trump officials said the decision to return the man was ultimately up to the El Salvadorian president.
Trump turned the question over to U.S. Attorney general Pam Bondi.
"First and foremost, he was illegally in our country," Bondi explained. "The Supreme Court ruled that if El Salvador wanted to return him, we would facilitate it, meaning provide a plane."
**["You are doing a great job!"](https://substack.com/redirect/5ef28943-5727-4e75-af83-72b1c95ac938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Trump told Bondi, before asking Stephen Miller to chime in on the question.
"He is a citizen of El Salvador," Miller told Collins. "It is very arrogant of the American media to tell El Salvador how to handle their own citizens,... We had a deportation order that was valid, which meant that under our law he is not allowed to be present in the United States and had to be returned due to the 'foreign terrorist' designation!"
Collins asked President Bukele to respond as well, "Do you plan to return him?"
"How can I smuggle a terrorist into the United States?!" he asked her right back.
Watch Trump's cabinet and Bukele completely shut down the CNN reporter:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5ef28943-5727-4e75-af83-72b1c95ac938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Dear Reader,
They're getting desperate...
Democrats have filed a massive lawsuit to bring DOGE to a grinding halt...
And an Obama-appointed judge seems hellbent on helping them do it.
It all looks to me like another rigged effort to stop DOGE from revealing the government's dirty laundry, including the **[FDA's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/58fdf292-0278-4218-8f85-abf0e5fa23e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**[It's a secret](https://substack.com/redirect/58fdf292-0278-4218-8f85-abf0e5fa23e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that could stop hundreds-of-billions in profits and dark money political donations, so they're doing everything in their power to keep you from hearing it. Which is exactly why we're not waiting around to see how this plays out.

We're revealing everything right now in this **[FREE video.](https://substack.com/redirect/58fdf292-0278-4218-8f85-abf0e5fa23e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# Stephen Miller SHUTS DOWN rude interrupting reporter: "Quiet when I'm talking!!"
Stephen Miller **[snapped at a reporter for rudely interrupting](https://substack.com/redirect/142388d8-f48a-4a4c-9d44-3c0b718dd8cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** his answer to a question during a White House lawn press conference this morning.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/142388d8-f48a-4a4c-9d44-3c0b718dd8cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/142388d8-f48a-4a4c-9d44-3c0b718dd8cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Is the President going to ask for him to be returned to the United States or no?" a reporter pressed Miller about a man who was "mistakenly deported" to El Salvador according to **[some reports](https://substack.com/redirect/6fa8f8ae-188d-475e-bbe0-27ec9847fe78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Justice Department officials reportedly acknowledged that the man in question, Kilmar Abrego Garcia, was mistakenly sent to El Salvador due to a 2019 order from an immigration judge barring him from being sent there. The Supreme Court has deemed his removal illegal and asked the Trump administration to "facilitate" his return while Trump officials dispute that a mistake was made in the first place, arguing that the law is on their side in deporting the man.
Miller answered by saying, "There was no mistake that was made," then asking, "What do you think would happen to him if he came back to this country? With your understanding of immigration laws, what do you think would happen?! Let's see if any of you researched anything about this issue at all!"
Another reporter cut off Miller, asking, "Do you really think the Supreme Court..." he began to say.
"I'm talking now!" Miller snapped. "You need to stop, I'm talking now!" When the reporter still would not stop talking, Miller said "You're done."
"Do any of you know the answer to the question?! Any of you?!!" Miller asked the group.
Watch the tense moment here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/142388d8-f48a-4a4c-9d44-3c0b718dd8cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

We’re waiting on your signature!!!
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS**
* * *
We’re reaching to top Democrats who have **not signed** onto our time-sensitive petition to CANCEL Trump’s wasteful and self-righteous Military Parade ↓ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250414_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=19530%2E878179%2ERP6gSH) **_They want us to sit back and do _NOTHING_ while Trump wastes MILLIONS of dollars to praise himself, spending money that could be used on essential programs like Medicare and Social Security!_**

[**That’s why we urgently need your support. Sign on to our emergency petition IMMEDIATELY to CANCEL and DEFUND Trump’s Birthday Military Parade! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250414_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=19530%2E878179%2ERP6gSH) | [TELL CONGRESS: DEFUND TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250414_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=19530%2E878179%2ERP6gSH)

Thank you,
_Voter Protection Project_

FROM: DISGUSTED (protectvoting.org)
TO: Top Democrats
Subject: Trump wants you to pay for his military parade
**BREAKING: Trump Planning $100 Million Military Parade for 79th Birthday**

A military parade is straight out of an authoritarian dictatorship.

**And Trump wants to use OUR taxpayer dollars to fund it!_We’re FUMING!!_**

[**Sign our urgent petition by MIDNIGHT to CANCEL Donald Trump’s disgusting military parade »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250414_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=19530%2E878179%2ERP6gSH) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250414_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=19530%2E878179%2ERP6gSH) | [TELL CONGRESS: DEFUND TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250414_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=19530%2E878179%2ERP6gSH)

**This is a slap in the face to the American people. We won’t stand for it, so we’re calling on Congress to act IMMEDIATELY.**

[**Join 25,000 Democrats in our virtual protest and add your name NOW to cancel Trump’s military parade!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250414_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=12&akid=19530%2E878179%2ERP6gSH)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: three things you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10035%2E434096%2EklVV54)
| | |
---
Derek, Team Fetterman here with a quick update. We’ve only got about 24 hours to hit our $10,000 mid-month goal, so before we ask you to [**chip in $5**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51005?t=11&akid=10035%2E434096%2EklVV54), there are three things we need you to know:
**1.****The GOP is trying to gut Social Security and Medicaid** to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. 🙄 It’s a terrible idea. It’ll hurt millions of working families, and we can’t let it happen.
**2\. We’re still behind****on our fundraising goal.** We need to hit our numbers, so we mean it when we say *every* dollar counts. _Every_ _dollar_ helps John and this grassroots team keep up our work to fight for regular folks in PA and across this country.
**3\. If we come up short, Republicans and their cronies will see it as a win.** These wealthy dudes are counting on everyday Americans feeling helpless and giving up so they can keep pushing their tax cuts for the top 1%. Not on our watch, Derek. 😤
**[So will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford to help us hit our $10,000 goal and send a message to Trump and his billionaire buddies to get their hands off Social Security?🙏](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50999?t=12&akid=10035%2E434096%2EklVV54)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51000?t=13&akid=10035%2E434096%2EklVV54)

Thanks for sticking with us. We couldn’t do it without you.

– Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=jtk45-fr-fl-footer&t=17&refcode2=10035_434096_klVV54&akid=10035%2E434096%2EklVV54)**

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Virginia Republicans are scrambling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
Republicans in Virginia know they’re in trouble.
A dozen of their incumbents are barely clinging to swing districts that voted for Kamala Harris — districts that have trended blue for years. They’ve quietly banded together, swapping campaign tips, hiring the same consultants, and doing everything they can to hold off a Democratic wave.
Why? Because they’ve seen the writing on the wall.
The map isn’t working in their favor anymore — and neither is the national climate. Trump’s economic chaos and blatant attacks on our rights are dragging them down. And no matter how they try to rebrand, their records are tied to the same dangerous playbook.
At GOTV PAC, we’re seizing this moment. These Republicans are vulnerable — and we’re building the grassroots operation to win and flip as many districts as possible this November.
But here’s the truth: they’re already flooding these districts with money. The most competitive seats in Virginia are also the most expensive. If we’re going to beat them, we need to reach out to voters early and in the most consequential places.
So, can you chip in today to help us turn out voters and flip the House of Delegates? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04142025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We’re finalizing our fall target list — and the more we raise now, the more voters we can reach in these must-win districts.
Let’s make 2025 the year Virginia finally leaves Trumpism behind.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04142025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04142025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. clean_body: [] Peter, Republicans in Virginia know they’re in trouble. A dozen of their incumbents are barely clinging to swing districts that voted for Kamala Harris — districts that have trended blue for years. They’ve quietly banded together, swapping campaign tips, hiring the same consultants, and doing everything they can to hold off a Democratic wave. Why? Because they’ve seen the writing on the wall. The map isn’t working in their favor anymore — and neither is the national climate. Trump’s economic chaos and blatant attacks on our rights are dragging them down. And no matter how they try to rebrand, their records are tied to the same dangerous playbook. At GOTV PAC, we’re seizing this moment. These Republicans are vulnerable — and we’re building the grassroots operation to win and flip as many districts as possible this November. But here’s the truth: they’re already flooding these districts with money. The most competitive seats in Virginia are also the most expensive. If we’re going to beat them, we need to reach out to voters early and in the most consequential places. So, can you chip in today to help us turn out voters and flip the House of Delegates? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $60 [] DONATE $120 [] OTHER AMOUNT → [] We’re finalizing our fall target list — and the more we raise now, the more voters we can reach in these must-win districts. Let’s make 2025 the year Virginia finally leaves Trumpism behind. GOTV PAC [] Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts. Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member. name: Crow HQ
subject: Every vote matters

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Every vote matters, team.

Republicans have a historically narrow majority, which means flipping the House blue is within reach.

As the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s (DCCC) new Recruitment Co-Chair, Jason is leading the House Democrats’ strategy to take back the House in 2026 and hold Donald Trump accountable.

Here’s the plan to get that done: Show up and compete everywhere. That starts right at home in Colorado.

Voters across Colorado’s 64 counties could determine which party wins the House majority in 2026, which is why we’re planning an ambitious strategy to share Jason’s message all across Colorado in the leadup to the midterm elections — from Logan County all the way down to Plata.

So if you can, please chip in $6.40 or more to help Jason reach voters across the state’s 64 counties. Your support will put us one step closer to electing more Democrats in Colorado to Congress and securing a House Democratic majority that will deliver for working families. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25?amount=6.40]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Board President David Canepa
subject: Celebrating Our Story - San Mateo County
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7c72f16875df/celebrating-our-story-san-mateo-county?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### Join us:

**May 15th, 2025 in Redwood City**
---
| | |
---
| | | | **Celebrating Our Story**

San Mateo County and the San Mateo County History Museum cordially invite you to attend the 169th Anniversary of San Mateo County and the Dedication and Unveiling Ceremony for 500 County Center.

**_Schedule_**
_**5:00 p.m.:**_
Gather at the San Mateo County History Museum (2200 Broadway, Redwood City) for a program exploring the County's start with reenactors and live music.

_**5:30 p.m.:**_
Procession to 500 County Center for Dedication and Unveiling of the new building.

body:

Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription!
* * *
# [MAGAs Are Punishing Women For Taking Their Husband's Names](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=161276241&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjc2MjQxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ2Njk2ODcsImV4cCI6MTc0NzI2MTY4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4A5MhNbibdTV2CTzzo5ZTITNeTIvrM0to-Ggc5SV3uA)
### Here's how my wife Ayesha responded when I asked if she would change her last name to Rashid
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Apr 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=161276241&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjc2MjQxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NDY2OTY4NywiZXhwIjoxNzQ3MjYxNjg3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OsfhQhe7cOOUNCRAgFDWzog-2fSZaXgy6n_pFdE32dw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=161276241&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjc2MjQxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ2Njk2ODcsImV4cCI6MTc0NzI2MTY4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4A5MhNbibdTV2CTzzo5ZTITNeTIvrM0to-Ggc5SV3uA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=161276241&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMjc2MjQxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ2Njk2ODcsImV4cCI6MTc0NzI2MTY4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4A5MhNbibdTV2CTzzo5ZTITNeTIvrM0to-Ggc5SV3uA)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9tYWdhcy1hcmUtcHVuaXNoaW5nLXdvbWVuLWZvci10YWtpbmc_.DrHhLSHv4jq2psBd8wLb-TVIqUdU_-rpbL2I9-KAofE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/magas-are-punishing-women-for-taking?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

My wife Ayesha grew up in Pakistan and did her Masters in the United Kingdom. When we got married now nearly 18 years ago, I asked if she would take on my last name?
She paused, looked at me, and said, "_Why would I give up my father 's name?? Wait do women in America seriously change their entire identity when they get married? What happens if they get divorced? What about passports and ID cards? Social security cards? Tax documents? What about Driver's Lic_--"
"_Ok, Ok I get the point_!" I finally responded. "_Sheesh. A simple no would 've sufficed_!"
Anyway, like with most everything--she was right--likely more than even she realized at that time. And unless we act quickly to stop the SAVE Act, tens of millions of women in America will suffer a historic level of voter suppression. **Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.** **Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UmC90EogoffrNG1H3AvWUFasOq3_FrEI0tFLWzOVyqQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161276241)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ab8287b6-b35e-40e1-a208-450e9f36776a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A protestor holds up a sign that says "Voter Suppression" crossed out.
The MAGA SAVE Act is punishing women who dropped their maiden names and took their husband's names after marriage. As The Brennan Center for Justice [stated after the House passed the SAVE Act last week](https://substack.com/redirect/56289fd4-11b3-4062-bda0-c4ede321c999?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The House has just passed one of the worst pieces of voting legislation in American history. The Senate must stop it. The SAVE Act would put voting out of reach for millions of American citizens. It should not become law. More than 21 million American citizens don't have the documents required by the SAVE Act readily available. The bill would effectively eliminate forms of voter registration that millions of voters rely on: registering by mail, online, and through voter registration drives would no longer be possible. The SAVE Act would also create chaos for election administration by imposing significant burdens on election officials and disrupting the systems that keep our elections running smoothly.
## The SAVE Act Punishes Women In Particular
While the SAVE Act punishes a wide array of otherwise eligible voting US Citizens, it harms women in particular because of the western practice of women taking on their husband's names after marriage. As NPR [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/d40637b9-ccbb-495a-9ae8-b2e80c6b513f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Among the most notable changes outlined in the bill is the requirement to prove U.S. citizenship before registering to vote. Acceptable documents will include a birth certificate, U.S. passport, naturalization paperwork and certain versions of the [Real ID](https://substack.com/redirect/0547b402-a30e-43cf-bcc4-37a78e89dc84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that indicate citizenship. **But for as many as 69 million American women who have taken on their spouse's name, their birth certificates no longer match the names they use today** , according to an analysis by [the progressive Center for American Progress](https://substack.com/redirect/009ea976-32a3-4103-86a9-81184267829a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Meanwhile, more than half of all Americans do not have a passport, according to [a 2023 YouGov survey.](https://substack.com/redirect/57393da3-cc2d-4829-a49c-00c722575e91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [emphasis added]
It's remarkable how MAGAs claim to support "traditional marriage" and are now happily punishing women who took the "traditional act" of changing their names. But the MAGA malice doesn't stop here. After all, won't suppressing women from voting _also_ suppress Republican women from voting? Well, herein lies the rub. The answer is both yes, it will hurt Republican voting women, but more importantly, it will hurt Democratic voting women _more._
**If you 're finding value in this article, I invite you to become a free or paid subscriber.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UmC90EogoffrNG1H3AvWUFasOq3_FrEI0tFLWzOVyqQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161276241)
## MAGAs Are Banning Women From Voting Because Women Vote Blue
If you study gender based voter data over the last nine Presidential elections up through the 2024 Presidential election, you find a clear trend. Men generally vote red by about 10 points, and women are the opposite. Here is the data on how men vote:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f0ed2e6d-0569-4d54-b140-2ddaf1beab7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Men consistently vote Republican over Democrat by about 10 points
Likewise, women generally vote blue by about 10 points. Here is the data on how women vote:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/55645883-c7e1-4fee-848d-cdc78093eb56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Women consistently vote Democrat over Republican by about 10 points
Therefore, if you are the MAGA party in power and want to ensure you maintain control--then you do so by suppressing the vote. And you suppress the vote in such a way that even if you disenfranchise millions of your own voter base, that's okay, as long as you disenfranchise millions _more_ of the opposing side's voter base.
And that's exactly what the SAVE Act does.
Even though Trump disbanded two of his own so-called "election fraud commissions" because they were unable to find any actual fraud, MAGAs are pushing the voter suppression SAVE Act under the claim that it is necessary to combat voter fraud.
Let's be clear--if your path towards 'winning' an election is through voter suppression, then it isn't democracy you support, it's dictatorship. This is what MAGA politicians (and the four House Democrats who voted for the SAVE Act) are telling us they support. We should believe them. And we should take action by raising our voices.
Here are two quick ways you can take action. Contact your Senator either by email or by phone and let them know that they must vote NO on the SAVE Act.
[Email Your Senator](https://substack.com/redirect/6269b0a3-4ffe-4df4-aaff-f353b882349f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Call Your Senator](https://substack.com/redirect/20647bef-92b3-497c-b92e-91dbdc7ff322?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Conclusion
My wife Ayesha still has her maiden name, and won't be changing it any time soon. And she's still right to not ever change it. It is an outrage that those women who changed their names upon marriage now have to pay hundreds of dollars to get new documents to exercise their basic right to vote. This is a poll tax by any other name.
The fact is, voting is a constitutionally protected right, and every citizen should have that right guaranteed without suppression. But because MAGAs know that if only women voted in the Presidential election, Kamala Harris would have won by a landslide. Therefore, MAGAs are working overtime to enact voter suppression of women before the next election. This is not a surprise. This was what Project 2025 forewarned. And this is what the "Again" in MAGA has always meant, i.e. a return to the time when only wealthy white land owning men had power.
That's what these fascists are trying to revive again today. And this is why we must stand united to stop them.
**Let's Address This is made possibly by you --the thoughtful person reading this. Add your email below and subscribe to our movement for justice.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UmC90EogoffrNG1H3AvWUFasOq3_FrEI0tFLWzOVyqQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161276241)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aaee19b9-15e1-4cd2-ab4b-5b590e52e518?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

body:
ADD YOUR NAME if you want property tax relief, friend. | | | _Do you want a ~$1,000 rebate check on your property taxes this year?_
**[SIGN NOW TO SUPPORT GOVERNOR DESANTIS’S PROPOSAL](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/PKTVPU7KWPNEzLHiLoxwU7TaaQy8rYJv5hNj4z-DpXA7DSNBCIel4BdRYm6IEbZaTEbIhLdr9_8Sh3oIMYX0H8B9SV0JbwceQP81-GW0Jmu0JBD0SWkP4tQLB7EBI1fP7DtD6ETJhnpYEShIHQyusn4UrFtVVcjrQbIcWk6vwSUeNCWRNZPNNNAW68w0H3krQTExrCP-cXc6zlzA0lGa9siVvk5cWWKQMOTqpdaBIJcehxkRRekY9-xsfg3sD1EmEL9n4C3tSvoYmP1600b8i1Wydo9rF_OZHL7Zc9Hr0ILOKQO6uyBivHYpggLNT9QcuDklOvO9HiFXzjwouzKCZETL3DUzJ0IPxGJ4HmsKoYRJsKnP27x4kZbr2I36oVaxxBcKiWJVQnL15RcCey3rtBs/PvbY-XOjQa0cMkRUGGpDj_memNWYsVyz/8)**
---
| | Friend, Now that tax season is coming to a close... wouldn’t you like to LOWER your taxes?

[**Governor DeSantis proposed a plan that will result in—on average—$1,000 rebate checks for each homestead as a discount on their property taxes.**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/QC3YrWmE3q7bxOMzNq50YRSRtmn-uqqAC5l49e-tbfyTjxDgUTBc37-Dp4QT1uLzX7hV48zFvpkA5d5FAyqiqA1HXRsgLb57G_a6cYHpv3Y5yqVT4QzD62IcoqGRJmLMOzXoepk0U0nXCp-XyS-9kyHaY5mRBpqV9XvdkF4w27sm_kjD_TsqY_RT-U6H1OKjntbf21BCnRn0ZupAjNvtXr-dYrkHKRifxAvRpEDBqviSsu0dgxRa5cykjVl3BbZYMGKpk9BKxlsAosIO0AGf_QK9xdTC1KclJ2F1fM5GpjDVjz-HLnwtbk3Fz9tbfQ5vgwyDwpz5cKOwzLHhXH4ATuV29d1Xe2ueBR6ZxJlNZCAkB89UbBmYpNBoL-g-9CZH7tUEUUBv8b772U8T53XqdgY/fh013-vdbl2klqf4Jy-x9MLOhQHKj8CE/8)
**We can get this done THIS YEAR if the Legislature acts now.**
---
[**SIGN OUR PETITION**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/pmYCqXzC1Uzi03pdLDtbEKq3el9_gYGpi890WlTLOckZCSypkyOHvCjCyEsRbdIXcZW0k1JN4imAw6j6zcGG5KHyVOdRHm741l-OQGmfPCq81FbBh8JT5jGQS2wXJ0OKuGAWxp90gQCo-bgSrjsDLi9sLl-Xtk3DU4pwOwPye6EbJXBGs80FfIRaAkGWfnf9loyOUfAkoHltdRbpYtDPIe67LySMDe7xcPDWMAdS0IzeOG42VIA3-iDoRw0KTjFu7xAMQcwa-v4TsUKt7suBMOQ_OUPC_PkNUvawCgwiuyVu4e509eagAYzWKq5JLQm73SJwwjZ8Tpf2-KLEOIrR5DVYCM19LeD5ljwpz2qdMzB3JP3pq3xIpBv-q4UN06Nhckj2soax4-xEwk4hZyzgbIs/YJt2mJcv_vVeRIA_CHj4EDv1sbV06g9C/8)
---
Unfortunately, the RINOs in the house are dragging their feet on this key priority. _They’re too busy squabbling over _who gets which parking space_ at the State Legislature._ We wish we were kidding, friend — but it’s true. _Property taxes effectively require homeowners to pay rent to the government. It’s time to cut homeowners a break._ **Let’s show the RINOS in the House of Representatives that the people WANT property tax relief. Sign our petition demanding that they act now!** **[**> >> ADD YOUR NAME NOW <<<**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/zHA4JMVM5nkE77uzdmn50CHltZWk6ewnQmufCD63WgOT2M0ANLBVUgXQQiRzuR6mek0jtzkwQfPJ-j567EUMe9u4IGqIEZ52k65U_txXNMcLo0OWPuetmhwwTHKoZVeziEKF7A_wWRIR_mYe2FPyCdtM7ZXMEb5Jod4-oVCcO34dUwE-2CK3yQGRZ6uQd-5TM8TKNuklew5AlpYVIGDeLSopHiGfSrWkJBSbIPqfbSyWYxo7tX21I2lvjJCZbdfHISAz0G0XhGIqaXR4KBubhpJ5a2lw33u28Am3q_eqzVMgltD2aEgh3512N8J7fc8b4z-dt8iiXOjjF4LDo_nl3nP3gGxkYr_y38FHdQRTKYbR8El99HZRgnoRecd11xwVD2YVStbt40nCDV1J520ga50/sEmVsjI60ZXTygWmGSIwBHiobmIJ51Ss/8)**
---
Thank you, Florida Freedom Fund

It's Holy Week and the White House has some extraordinary events planned as we lead up to Easter. President Trump assured Easter will get the "celebration it deserves." NBC's SNL stooped to a new low in a completely tasteless and unfunny sketch mocking Easter, Christians and President Trump. There was no hiding how SNL is really just a propagandist arm of the Democratic party. President Trump releases his physical fitness test results which showed him to be in excellent health due to his active lifestyle and lifelong avoidance of alcohol and tobacco. Many countries have come to the table to negotiate a reciprocal trade deal and U.S. trade rep Jamison Greer expects to lock those deals in within the coming weeks. President Trump's bold stand against China has been ridiculed in left-wing media when in reality every single Democrat, including Obama, has expressed this needed to be done. President Trump is the only president in our lifetime with the gumption to do it. Realigning the world economy by putting America first is undoing decades worth of entirely unfair trade agreements that have caused a national security threat to the United States. Bill Maher finally reported on his meeting with President Trump and admitted how likeable and authentic President Trump actually is in person.

name: Gregory Wrightstone, CO2 Coalition
subject: Separating Climate Fact from Climate Fiction
body:
Get the facts the Green Lobby doesn't want you to see.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmvv6dxyuhgrvc4xah4vs9tzqyqdc56eribs8nhddimhmgolygxrvxy2b72rn640om1m6zqencnkt3inju&__stmp=suqaiu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
– Get the facts the Green Lobby doesn't want you to see. – The news and analysis you need to see through the lies of the Green Lobby – Join thousands who've discovered the truth about climate science with our weekly newsletter. – I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. – In-depth news and analysis on the most pressing climate debates
| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. The so-called "settled science" of climate change is a giant propaganda campaign –– one the Green Lobby uses to scare you and take your hard-earned tax dollars. _**[Friend, I want to personally invite you to subscribe to the CO 2 Coalition's informative weekly newsletter to get the facts about the REAL science behind climate change.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h)**_
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h) [**Get the Latest Climate Science News Now**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h)
---
Are deserts expanding? Are there more hurricanes today? Have droughts become more frequent? These are the questions our experts explore in their hard-hitting news and analysis, Friend –– and their findings _will_ _likely make you question everything you've been told about the so-called "settled science."_ The truth is, true scientific inquiry shows different results than the doom-and-gloom scenarios pushed by the Climate Cult and their allies in the mainstream media, the education establishment, and the Green Lobby! In fact, the CO2 Coalition's scientific analysis, independent research, and in-depth, state-by-state studies consistently reveal something the Climate Cult doesn't want you to know: ecosystems are thriving, not dying –– and we've got the hard data to prove it. _**[That's why I'm urging you, Friend, to subscribe to our weekly newsletter today and discover the truth about climate science –– and expose the lies being pushed by climate alarmists.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h)**_
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h) [**Get Reliable Climate Science News Now**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h)
---
Since 2015, the CO2 Coalition –– a group of 180+ respected U.S. scientists and researchers, along with a Nobel-Prize-winning physicist on our board –– has brought truth directly to the American people. Our team of leading scientists and researchers has been featured in major media outlets. We've testified before Congress, armed with the facts that debunk the Climate Cult's false narratives. And we've reached over 200,000+ Americans with our educational campaigns. In short, the CO2 Coalition is the "tip of the spear" in the battle between scientific truth and politically-motivated science fiction! _**[If you want to learn more Climate Facts and debunk Climate Fiction, please sign up for CO 2 Coalition's weekly newsletter today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h)**_
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h) [**Get the Latest Climate Science News Now**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suqaiu&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for joining the CO2 Coalition in our crucial education and outreach efforts. Together, we're building a movement of informed citizens who understand the real science behind climate change –– not the politicized version pushed by special interests in the Green Lobby. Gregory Wrightstone
Executive Director
CO2 Coalition

clean_body: Get the facts the Green Lobby doesn't want you to see. – Get the facts the Green Lobby doesn't want you to see. – The news and analysis you need to see through the lies of the Green Lobby – Join thousands who've discovered the truth about climate science with our weekly newsletter. – I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. – In-depth news and analysis on the most pressing climate debates | | | Friend, I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. The so-called "settled science" of climate change is a giant propaganda campaign –– one the Green Lobby uses to scare you and take your hard-earned tax dollars. Are deserts expanding? Are there more hurricanes today? Have droughts become more frequent? These are the questions our experts explore in their hard-hitting news and analysis, Friend –– and their findings will likely make you question everything you've been told about the so-called "settled science." The truth is, true scientific inquiry shows different results than the doom-and-gloom scenarios pushed by the Climate Cult and their allies in the mainstream media, the education establishment, and the Green Lobby! In fact, the CO2 Coalition's scientific analysis, independent research, and in-depth, state-by-state studies consistently reveal something the Climate Cult doesn't want you to know: ecosystems are thriving, not dying –– and we've got the hard data to prove it. Since 2015, the CO2 Coalition –– a group of 180+ respected U.S. scientists and researchers, along with a Nobel-Prize-winning physicist on our board –– has brought truth directly to the American people. Our team of leading scientists and researchers has been featured in major media outlets. We've testified before Congress, armed with the facts that debunk the Climate Cult's false narratives. And we've reached over 200,000+ Americans with our educational campaigns. In short, the CO2 Coalition is the "tip of the spear" in the battle between scientific truth and politically-motivated science fiction! Thank you for joining the CO2 Coalition in our crucial education and outreach efforts. Together, we're building a movement of informed citizens who understand the real science behind climate change –– not the politicized version pushed by special interests in the Green Lobby. Gregory Wrightstone Executive Director CO2 Coalition 2677 Prosperity Avenue, Suite 300 Fairfax, VA 22031 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs are draining working families while his billionaire buddies cash in.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105833279/539538224/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-04-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE4YjJmYi03YjE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZQA8fQEMry7g6-VQ3OdLFQ_gjixr1Vj-pxW4I5IP-U=)

| Peter,

Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs are draining working families while his billionaire buddies cash in. He’s playing both the **arsonist and the firefighter** —creating economic chaos, then pretending to save us while his cronies make billions.

That’s why I’m introducing the**Stopping a Rogue President on Trade Act—[ _but I need your support to keep up the momentum. This bill will:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105833282/539538226/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-04-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE4YjJmYi03YjE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZQA8fQEMry7g6-VQ3OdLFQ_gjixr1Vj-pxW4I5IP-U=)**

**🛑 ****End Trump’s Tariff Hikes** – Rolling back his economy-wrecking tariff spikes on everyday goods.

**🤝 ****Protect Our Closest Allies** – Prevent Trump from using trade as a weapon against Mexico and Canada.

**⚖️ ****Restore Congressional Authority** – No more backroom deals. Congress must approve new tariffs before they take effect.

Small businesses are struggling, families are worried about skyrocketing grocery bills, and retirees are watching their savings disappear. Meanwhile, Republicans are sitting back and **waiting for the chaos to pass** —but we can’t afford to wait. We need leaders who will**stand up and fight back NOW.**

body:
I’m running for Senate because service is what I’ve always done. I will always fight to put America First! Will you join me?

| | | [](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=a9c30b905391408abc206da5bab29458&_e=9L3VtWL8IJ7hE_xmA5xuLHXNl6z-wGj8KapkLYzGuTdx_S62TQ-BwS19AK6iTB0A-MdDJ4vI8UZi3UnN651QtVSi9r0eeEid5rdw3lzIwJMI1rSUyMzFFky1TNN3m7KUV9BUO01WlsO5Wktjz4nkEfwHsWG9pwrYV1Fu9Scjme8WjmBm3L8p4ym8AIyc4T5wreOT9UTyqEaIFycO9r6ujCdPog5OiNyZTeuUJJagrNFxS3J77QZ5SJQXqTemUQuMLwoKLzKcU0LohGyo2RYAHpmWVbygec5lQFnqOtayiRajurFIN8Itps4VseET-b2JRep5Qrgkt3WQHSPzRTkyOotgqTi0Udyo-HynA92plTSsSXjcv1S0JqSCqi-_PmxkSd6Y1HjfxFRpwow1sFaRuefLsw13TAK3dnxTHmcqqIgAonURutPjl70yOGgmHEGK00zbvnTwqEDhjpAsVPg5jA%3D%3D)

**Friend****, I’m running for Senate because service is what I’ve always done. I will always fight to put America First.****_ _** I’m proud of my family’s generations of military service:**_ _** ⭐My uncle served in the Army Air Corps in WWII and my father served in the Air Force in the 1950s.⭐My brother and I both served as Army officers. ⭐My son also stepped up to serve our country in the Navy.⭐My wife worked for the Department of Defense in Iraq and comes from a long line of military veterans as well. **_ _****Now, I’m volunteering one more time to serve my country and make America great again for the benefit of future generations in my family and yours.** **_ _** _**[_**Friend, will you help me win this Senate race and keep fighting for you?**_](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=a9c30b905391408abc206da5bab29458&_e=9L3VtWL8IJ7hE_xmA5xuLHXNl6z-wGj8KapkLYzGuTdx_S62TQ-BwS19AK6iTB0A-MdDJ4vI8UZi3UnN651QtVSi9r0eeEid5rdw3lzIwJMI1rSUyMzFFky1TNN3m7KUV9BUO01WlsO5Wktjz4nkEfwHsWG9pwrYV1Fu9Scjme8WjmBm3L8p4ym8AIyc4T5wreOT9UTyqEaIFycO9r6ujCdPog5OiNyZTeuUJJagrNFxS3J77QZ5SJQXqTemUQuMLwoKLzKcU0LohGyo2RYAHpmWVbygec5lQFnqOtayiRajurFIN8Itps4VseET-b2JHa0yruGRxo8t9ngXGq0FeCnE9DEHv-B3D1mNL8wqZIauxmRy-BRA77eZn9XivVpUWeqjjUCKNICdzT3xx6oStQf4gQJCxIO4AEbsAAUx1-EOzuHLUsT0mdKG8bS7c-LyLyDzvVwL3kP76UErRbiYdA%3D%3D)**_
---
| | [**JOIN MY TEAM**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=a9c30b905391408abc206da5bab29458&_e=9L3VtWL8IJ7hE_xmA5xuLHXNl6z-wGj8KapkLYzGuTdx_S62TQ-BwS19AK6iTB0A-MdDJ4vI8UZi3UnN651QtVSi9r0eeEid5rdw3lzIwJMI1rSUyMzFFky1TNN3m7KUV9BUO01WlsO5Wktjz4nkEfwHsWG9pwrYV1Fu9Scjme8WjmBm3L8p4ym8AIyc4T5wreOT9UTyqEaIFycO9r6ujCdPog5OiNyZTeuUJJagrNFxS3J77QZ5SJQXqTemUQuMLwoKLzKcU0LohGyo2RYAHpmWVbygec5lQFnqOtayiRajurFIN8Itps4VseET-b2JzRnpNkJUvobVkSUwtXKyXDfCuRXbGF5-RibDYAVHjWAwiA7V0Je2Jyy18ClRtL7Z8M3G2gxD3C9Wz8KoLIgEqldPBi8N_0A9fysbB12VuT0Y-E3_zeJInl5mF6J3BgWo-tHCpHkKzI_q69oQ2-Ed9w%3D%3D)
---
For too long Michigan has been represented by two-faced liberal politicians, who say they’re “moderates” but vote as radicals when they get to Washington. That ends now! **I’ll fight for Michigan values in DC — like standing up to the woke mob, protecting our seniors, cutting wasteful spending, and bringing down the cost of gas and groceries.** **I’ll stand with President Trump and will deliver on the MAGA mandate given to him by the American people.** **I know that when duty calls, it’s time to step up and get tough.** Throughout my career in the military, law enforcement, and Congress, I’ve arrested mobsters, stared down Russian generals, and helped lead our country in the tough days after 9/11. _But this race won’t be easy._ It will be the No. 1 Senate seat that Democrats seek to defend and they’ll do anything to stop me. That includes raising and spending millions of dollars on attack ads. _**[_**We need to be even tougher than the Democrats to win. Will you join my team and help me win this fight?**_](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=a9c30b905391408abc206da5bab29458&_e=9L3VtWL8IJ7hE_xmA5xuLHXNl6z-wGj8KapkLYzGuTdx_S62TQ-BwS19AK6iTB0A-MdDJ4vI8UZi3UnN651QtVSi9r0eeEid5rdw3lzIwJMI1rSUyMzFFky1TNN3m7KUV9BUO01WlsO5Wktjz4nkEfwHsWG9pwrYV1Fu9Scjme8WjmBm3L8p4ym8AIyc4T5wreOT9UTyqEaIFycO9r6ujCdPog5OiNyZTeuUJJagrNFxS3J77QZ5SJQXqTemUQuMLwoKLzKcU0LohGyo2RYAHpmWVbygec5lQFnqOtayiRajurFIN8Itps4VseET-b2JfC6QanLBkDt95A8O_sjnvctTwpHlnxma_u5EYhZwgPtM3a0s7CDDHN-r5GjfNSdButCITkK7EeKgUNEkBxHy4M1O6NqsGlCE4xM-zwFxo5C-MnMu60zTAYsCzPCEUe4I1ECOshzcX5xVLIWdWtS94A%3D%3D)**_

name: Board President David Canepa
subject: Join Us May 15th! Celebrating Our Story - San Mateo County
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/73590c77a1af/celebrating-our-story-san-mateo-county-10961586?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### Join us:

**May 15th, 2025 in Redwood City**
---
| | |
---
| | | | **Celebrating Our Story**

San Mateo County and the San Mateo County History Museum cordially invite you to attend the 169th Anniversary of San Mateo County and the Dedication and Unveiling Ceremony for 500 County Center.

**_Schedule_**
_**5:00 p.m.:**_
Gather at the San Mateo County History Museum (2200 Broadway, Redwood City) for a program exploring the County's start with reenactors and live music.

_**5:30 p.m.:**_
Procession to 500 County Center for Dedication and Unveiling of the new building.

_**6:00 p.m.:**_
• Enjoy a short video of the building and explore the lobby and board chambers
• Explore the county's past with kids' crafts
• Live music by DJ John Beaver

Thursday,
May 15, 2025
FREE Event Parking at the San Mateo County Jury Parking Garage
(400 Middlefield Road, Redwood City)

Kindly RSVP by May 12, 2025.
[bmurdock@smcgov.org](mailto:bmurdock@smcgov.org) or 650-363-4572

In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We need to prepare for what’s next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Resistance Lab is designed to get us prepared to resist no matter what the radical Trump administration throws at us.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250414-4948-footer&t=1&akid=4948%2E420207%2EfWApfG)
Hi Peter, Pramila Jayapal here.
**We need to prepare for what’s next** , which is why my team and I launched the Resistance Lab — to learn from other countries that’ve dealt with dictators and democratic backsliding, and learn the tools and tactics that _work_.
The Resistance Lab is designed to get us prepared to resist no matter what the radical Trump administration throws at us, and I’m thrilled that so many people are attending.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250414?refcode=em20250414-4948&amount=3&refcode2=4948_420207_fWApfG&akid=4948%2E420207%2EfWApfG)
Just yesterday, more than 2,700 people (including Joan Baez!) joined us on Zoom to learn how to combat authoritarianism. And there are more trainings to come in the near future.
We’re going to continue hosting these in-person and virtual trainings to make sure as many people as possible are ready to fight back against Trump and his authoritarian, billionaire-led administration — **but we need your support.**
[**With our mid-month fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow, will you pitch in $3 right now to help us reach our $5,000 goal and host even more Resistance Lab trainings?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250414?refcode=em20250414-4948&amount=3&refcode2=4948_420207_fWApfG&akid=4948%2E420207%2EfWApfG)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250414?amount=3&refcode=em20250414-4948&refcode2=4948_420207_fWApfG&akid=4948%2E420207%2EfWApfG)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

clean_body: The Resistance Lab is designed to get us prepared to resist no matter what the radical Trump administration throws at us. Hi Peter, Pramila Jayapal here. We need to prepare for what’s next , which is why my team and I launched the Resistance Lab — to learn from other countries that’ve dealt with dictators and democratic backsliding, and learn the tools and tactics that work. The Resistance Lab is designed to get us prepared to resist no matter what the radical Trump administration throws at us, and I’m thrilled that so many people are attending. Just yesterday, more than 2,700 people (including Joan Baez!) joined us on Zoom to learn how to combat authoritarianism. And there are more trainings to come in the near future. We’re going to continue hosting these in-person and virtual trainings to make sure as many people as possible are ready to fight back against Trump and his authoritarian, billionaire-led administration — but we need your support. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Team Wiley
subject: Thom Tillis is rattled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
| Peter — We knew launching this campaign would send a message. We saw this coming — what we didn’t expect was just how fast Thom Tillis would panic. Wiley went live on _The Last Word_ with Lawrence O’Donnell last Wednesday to talk about why he’s running — because North Carolina needs a real fighter. Judging by how quick Tillis went on the offensive, it’s safe to say we hit a nerve. _“Trump’s tariffs are bad for North Carolina. We wanted to make this issue front and center in my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Thom Tillis is the most vulnerable Republican, and my concern is the families, the farmers, the seniors in North Carolina who are going to be hit incredibly hard by rising costs... name: Sarah McBride
subject: My friend Mikie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
When I think about our future as Democrats, I think about fearless and effective leaders like Mikie.
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250414-1?refcode=em20250414-1899&amount=5&refcode2=1899_21716_7diLoP&akid=1899%2E21716%2E7diLoP)
Hi, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.
I have the honor of representing Delaware in the House of Representatives, but today I’m reaching out to you in regard to our neighbors to the north — it’s about my colleague and friend, Mikie Sherrill.
When I think about our future as Democrats, I think about fearless and effective leaders like Mikie.
Mikie has spent her career in service to this nation — as a Navy helicopter pilot, a federal prosecutor, and now a member of Congress. She has a proven ability to build broad coalitions and deliver for New Jerseyans. I’ve watched her do it in the United States Congress, and I know she’ll do the same as governor.
As Republicans obsess over culture war issues and ignore the crises Americans face, we need leaders like Mikie who fight relentlessly to drive down costs and make life better for the people she serves.
But she can’t do it alone. That’s why I’m asking: [**will you join me in supporting Mikie’s campaign by making a split donation of $5, or whatever you can? Every dollar will help Mikie reach voters across New Jersey and build the momentum she needs to win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250414-1?refcode=em20250414-1899&amount=5&refcode2=1899_21716_7diLoP&akid=1899%2E21716%2E7diLoP)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250414-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250414-1899&refcode2=1899_21716_7diLoP&akid=1899%2E21716%2E7diLoP)**
Thank you,
Rep. Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250414-1&t=1&refcode2=1899_21716_7diLoP&akid=1899%2E21716%2E7diLoP)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1899%2E21716%2E7diLoP)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1899%2E21716%2E7diLoP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1899%2E21716%2E7diLoP)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

I’ll cut to the chase: **Elon Musk has abused his wealth and influence to try to buy our democracy.** Since Donald Trump took office, Elon Musk has used his immense wealth and power to dismantle our democratic institutions, attack and fire government employees and do Donald Trump’s bidding at every turn — all in an effort to grow his bottom line. That’s why this week, I demanded that Elon Musk be removed from his unelected role and position of influence in our government. We can’t allow billionaires to buy our government and run it into the ground, and I’m counting on you to stand with me in defense of our democracy. [Our mid-month fundraising deadline is this Thursday, and we need to raise $8,000 by then to fuel our fight.
